1.en: Here, take this and let me leave in peace!
1.trans: 给你，拿着这个，别再烦我了！

2.en: Just take this and I'll be on my way.
2.trans: 这个你收下，我就走了。

announce_pocketwatch_mark.en: That will make a fine anchor point.

announce_lunar_rift_max.en: Did anyone else feel that temporal burst?
announce_lunar_rift_max.trans: 还有谁感受到了时空的爆裂？

describe_plantstressorhappiness.en: Do I really have to talk to it?
describe_plantstressorhappiness.trans: 我真的有必要和它说话吗？

announce_cold.en: Brrr... w-when did it get so cold?
announce_cold.trans: 咳咳……什么时候变这么冷的？

announce_yotb_learn_new_pattern.trans: 新东西，多么令人激动啊！

announce_firenettle_toxin_done.en: Whew... it looks like the effects aren't permanent.
announce_firenettle_toxin_done.trans: 嗨……看起来那些症状只是暂时的。

1.en: I learned something new! Or at least remembered something I forgot...
1.trans: 我学到了一些新东西！或者至少记起了一些我忘记的东西……

announce_cavein.en: No no no! Everything's falling apart!

announce_nodaysleep_cave.en: I don't have time to waste on sleeping right now.
announce_nodaysleep_cave.trans: 我现在没有时间浪费在睡觉上。

announce_damp.en: A little water shouldn't be anything to worry about.

announce_eyeofterror_arrive.en: I feel a chill, did someone leave an interdimensional door open?
announce_eyeofterror_arrive.trans: 我感到一阵寒意，是不是有人没关维度门？

announce_despawn.en: Wait, stop! I need more time--!
announce_despawn.trans: 等等，停下！我还需要时间——！

announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.en: It'd be more efficient to put it closer to the judge's booth.
announce_cantbuildhere_yotb_post.trans: 把它放在离裁判席更近的地方会更有效率。

announce_plant_randomseed.en: I wonder what it'll be? Maybe I should jump ahead and sneak a peek...
announce_plant_randomseed.trans: 我想知道会长出什么？也许我应该跳到前面去偷看一下……

announce_hot.en: I've got to get out of this heat...
announce_hot.trans: 我得离开这个炎热的地方……

1.en: There's a regal air about you.
1.trans: 你身上有帝王之气。

2.en: The crown suits you.
2.trans: 这皇冠跟你太搭了。

3.en: I'm in the presence of royalty.

announce_lightsout_shadowhand.en: That's strange. You don't belong down here.
announce_lightsout_shadowhand.trans: 真奇怪。你不属于这底下。

announce_rabbitkinghorn_badspawnpoint.en: I should have known this was the wrong place.
announce_rabbitkinghorn_badspawnpoint.trans: 我早该知道走错地方了。

announce_shadowthrall_stealth.en: What was that? Expose that foul beast!
announce_shadowthrall_stealth.trans: 那是什么？邪恶的野兽露出你的真面目！

announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.en: Did I just hear a rustle? Perhaps it's nearby...
announce_ticoon_near_kitcoon.trans: 我刚才听到了沙沙的声音吗？也许它就在附近……

announce_is_feasting.en: I guess it is nice to slow down every once in a while.
announce_is_feasting.trans: 我想每隔一段时间放慢脚步是很好的。

out_of_water.en: Didn't I just fill this up? Gardening is so tedious...
out_of_water.trans: 我不是刚把这个装满了吗？园艺是如此乏味……

burning.en: I'm burning!

targetincombat.en: I'm in a hurry, but not that much of a hurry.
targetincombat.trans: 我虽然赶时间，但也没那么赶时间。

mismatch.en: Hold on... these are the wrong plans! What a waste of time!
mismatch.trans: 等一下……方案错误！真是浪费时间！

notready.en: This might not be the best time...
notready.trans: 现在可能不是最佳时机……

empty.en: I thought I'd already put... ah, I must've done it later.
empty.trans: 我以为我已经把……啊，我一定是后来做的。

hermitcrab_relocate.en: That's right, it's dry. I'll try again later.
hermitcrab_relocate.trans: 没错，是干的。我晚点再试试。

toofar.en: It gets to live another day.

no_teleport_zone.en: The timestream here is too unstable... I shouldn't risk it.
no_teleport_zone.trans: 此时间流极其不稳定……我不该冒险。

revive_failed.en: It looks like I was too late...

shard_unavailable.en: There's too much wobble wibbling the timestream.
shard_unavailable.trans: 时间流有太多的摇摆不定。

generic.en: It'd be too risky.
generic.trans: 那样风险太大了。

nothing_inside.en: I forgot it would be empty.

inmood.en: I don't have the patience to deal with a mean-tempered beefalo.
inmood.trans: 我没有耐心去对付一只脾气暴躁的皮弗娄牛。

beef_hitched.trans: 等等，我已经这样做过了！

needbeef.en: What am I forgetting? Something's ringing a bell...
needbeef.trans: 我忘记了什么？似乎想起点什么了……

needbeef_closer.en: Come on now, trot your way over here.

busy.en: I don't have time to wait around!

dead.en: No, no, I'm doing this out of order!

sleeping.en: You couldn't sleep a little faster, could you?

full.en: If you want this, you'd better drop something fast.
full.trans: 你想要的话，最好先丢点东西。

unsuitable_for_plants.en: Whoops, almost gave the plants sea water!
unsuitable_for_plants.trans: 哎呦，差点给植物浇了海水！

oversizedveggies_too_small.en: Too small. I guess I shouldn't have picked it so early...
oversizedveggies_too_small.trans: 太小了。不该这么早就摘下来的……

notamerm.en: I don't expect there's anything in there I'd care to take.
notamerm.trans: 我不指望里面有我想拿的东西。

restricted.en: I'll not waste time with that.
restricted.trans: 我不会在那上面浪费时间。

inuse.en: I'll have to check it later. Or earlier?
inuse.trans: 我一会再看看。或是回到之前去看看？

notsouljarhandler.en: The imp can do whatever he wants with these.
notsouljarhandler.trans: 让小恶魔去处理这些吧。

notmasterchef.en: It takes too long to cook a fancy meal.
notmasterchef.trans: 做顿好饭简直太费时间了。

generic.en: This is a waste of my time.
generic.trans: 简直就是浪费我的时间。

inuse.en: Are you writing a novel? What is taking so long?
inuse.trans: 你是在写小说吗？这么长时间干什么呢？

generic.en: I don't have time to fuss with that.
generic.trans: 我可没时间浪费在那种事情上。

no_racers.en: What am I forgetting? Oh! The carrats!
no_racers.trans: 我忘记了什么呢？哦！胡萝卜鼠！

nogeneratorskill.en: Please. That would be like trying to put a pendulum on a watch.
nogeneratorskill.trans: 求别闹。那不跟在手表上装钟摆一样么。

carnivalgame_invalid_item.en: It needs something that will fit into this small slot...
carnivalgame_invalid_item.trans: 它需要一个能装进这个小槽的东西……

notdish.en: Well... that was a waste of time.

mushroomfarm_needsshroom.en: Whoops, almost put that in the mushroom planter.
mushroomfarm_needsshroom.trans: 哎呀，差点就放进蘑菇农场里。

nomoon.en: This isn't going to work if I can't see the moon.
nomoon.trans: 我连月亮都看不到这怎么成。

slotfull.en: I can't fit anything else in there.

foodfull.en: Oh what luck, someone already made food ahead of time!
foodfull.trans: 真走运，有人已经提前做好了食物！

wrongshadowform.en: Oooh, now this is a puzzle...

sleeping.en: Oooooh can't you sleep any faster?

notamonkey.en: Odd, I could have sworn I could speak monkey at some point.
notamonkey.trans: 怪了，我有段时间是会说猴语的。

mushroomfarm_needslog.en: I'll have to get one of those horrible logs...
mushroomfarm_needslog.trans: 我得去弄根糟糕的木头……

ghostheart.en: Oh. My mistake, I thought you were a friend of mine.
ghostheart.trans: 哦。我弄错了，我以为你是我的一个朋友。

busy.en: Please stop what you're doing, this is important!
busy.trans: 请停止你正在做的事情，这很重要！

wronggem.en: I could've sworn this was the right gem.
wronggem.trans: 我可以发誓这就是正确的宝石。

pigkinggame_danger.en: I'm not putting my life in danger for a game!
pigkinggame_danger.trans: 我才不要为了一个游戏冒生命危险！

notgem.en: Please. That would be like trying to put a pendulum on a watch.
notgem.trans: 求别闹。那不跟在手表上装钟摆一样么。

carnivalgame_already_playing.en: I'll just come back later. Or earlier.
carnivalgame_already_playing.trans: 我以后再来就好。或者回到从前。

terrarium_refuse.en: I wonder how the magic from this world might affect it?
terrarium_refuse.trans: 不知道这个世界的魔法会对它产生什么影响？

terrarium_cooldown.en: It isn't ready yet? Botheration, even tiny trees take ages to grow!
terrarium_cooldown.trans: 还没好？麻烦呐，即使是小树也要花很长时间才能长成！

pigkinggame_toolate.en: It's getting dark. Maybe another time.

queenbusy.en: I don't care what her title is, it's no excuse to keep me waiting!
queenbusy.trans: 我不在乎她的头衔是什么，那不是让我一直等的借口！

cantshadowrevive.en: It's not coming back. Maybe this time that's a good thing?
cantshadowrevive.trans: 不会回来了。也许是件好事？

mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.en: It won't grow here. I'm not wasting any more time on it.
mushroomfarm_nomoonallowed.trans: 它不会在这里生长的。我不会再在这上面浪费时间了。

duplicate.en: I'm having deja vu... didn't we already make this? Or will we...
duplicate.trans: 这似曾相识的感觉……我们是以前做过这个？还是将来要做……

pigkinggame_messy.en: It kind of reminds me of my old workshop... a pigsty.
pigkinggame_messy.trans: 有点让我想起我的旧作坊……那个猪圈。

generic.en: Hm, nope. That's not going to work.
generic.trans: 呃，不行。不管用。

spidernohat.en: As whimsical as that would be, there isn't enough space in my pocket.
spidernohat.trans: 虽然听起来有点怪，可是我口袋里确实放不下了。

notatriumkey.en: I need something that fits perfectly, or the mechanism won't work.
notatriumkey.trans: 要大小刚好才行，否则就不会起作用。

abigailheart.en: I was hoping this timeline might be different.
abigailheart.trans: 我本希望这条时间线会不一样。

notsculptable.en: I'm not wasting one more second trying to work with this material.
notsculptable.trans: 我不会再在这种材料上浪费多一秒了。

notstaff.en: I need something that fits perfectly for the mechanism to work.
notstaff.trans: 要大小刚好才能起作用。

wrongkey.en: Oh botheration, this isn't going to work.

hashat.en: I can't. Someone left a hat there.
hashat.trans: 做不到。有人把帽子遗落在这里了。

too_super.en: Ooph. That is far too strong.

nospace.en: I can't occupy the same space as another.
nospace.trans: 我占据不了别人已经占据的空间。

targetincombat.en: I will not meet my end trampled beneath the hooves of an angry beefalo!
targetincombat.trans: 我的结局不是被愤怒的皮弗娄牛用蹄子踩死。

inuse.en: Oh botheration. I was going to use that, you know!
inuse.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我本来想用那个的，知道吧！

sleeping.en: Wake up! There are places to go, things to be done!
sleeping.trans: 醒醒吧！还有地方要去，有事情要做！

alreadyknown.en: I'm sure I've seen this before.
alreadyknown.trans: 我确信我以前见过这个。

generic.en: only_used_by_walter
generic.trans: only_used_by_walter

nohealth.en: I feel the darkness coming for me... I need more time!
nohealth.trans: 我感到黑暗正向我袭来……我需要更多的时间!

burning.en: I'm not meeting a fiery demise for a change of clothes, thank you!
burning.trans: 我不会为了换件衣服被烧死，谢谢你！

nooccupant.en: I thought I'd hitched up a... must've been in a different timeline.
nooccupant.trans: 我以为我已经……可能是在另一条时间线里吧。

inuse.en: Would you hurry it up a bit in there?

notenoughhair.en: Oh botheration, it hasn't grown enough hair yet.
notenoughhair.trans: 哎呀麻烦了，它头发还没长足。

generic.en: Now's not the time.
generic.trans: 现在不是时候。

too_late.en: Oh come on, you want these worms don't you?
too_late.trans: 来呀，你们不是最爱吃虫子吗？

nocarnival.en: Gone already? Time sure flies when you're having fun.
nocarnival.trans: 就没了吗？欢乐的时光总是那么短暂。

pillowfight_no_handpillow.en: I can't just run in empty-handed!
pillowfight_no_handpillow.trans: 我不能赤手空拳的冲进去！

notmybernie.en: I've no time for bears who don't listen.
notmybernie.trans: 我可没时间应付不听话的熊。

empty_catcoonden.en: Oh botheration! Looks like this was a waste of time.
empty_catcoonden.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！白白浪费了时间。

notmerm.en: I don't have time to fuss with the merms.

locked_gate.en: Could I pick the lock? Locks and clocks are only a letter apart, after all.
locked_gate.trans: 我会撬锁吗？反正锁跟钟都是一个偏旁。

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiding_sp.en: There's nowhere to hide around here.

kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.en: It would be quite a short game, not that I'd mind...
kitcoon_hideandseek_not_enough_hiders.trans: 这样游戏会很快结束，虽然我也不介意……

carnival_host_here.en: Didn't I see Goodfeather around here? I could have sworn I did...
carnival_host_here.trans: 我刚刚在这不是看到良羽了吗？我发誓我看到了……

hostbusy.en: Ugh, I should come back sooner... or maybe later.
hostbusy.trans: 呃，也许我该早点来……或者晚点再来。

kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.en: I think I've spent quite enough time wrangling these tiny terrors today.
kitcoon_hideandseek_one_game_per_day.trans: 我今天已经花了足够的时间来处理这些小麻烦了。

alreadyactive.en: It doesn't look like anyone's here.

doesntwork.en: Well, if he's not going to start the contest I'm not waiting around.
doesntwork.trans: 好吧，如果他不打算开始比赛，我就不在这里等了。

professionalchef.en: It takes too long to cook a fancy meal.
professionalchef.trans: 做顿好饭简直太费时间了。

toodeep.en: Ha! That would be like trying to use a pinion for a wheel!
toodeep.trans: 哈！这好比用小齿轮来做车轮一样！

wrongpiece.en: Oh botheration. I need something else.
wrongpiece.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我还需要点别的东西。

wronggear.en: Ha! That would be like trying to use a wheel for a pinion!
wronggear.trans: 哈！这好比用车轮来做小齿轮一样！

quagmire_wrongkey.en: Wait a tick... this isn't even the right key!
quagmire_wrongkey.trans: 等等……这把钥匙根本就不对！

wrongkey.en: I could have sworn that was the right key...
wrongkey.trans: 我可以发誓之前这把就是对的钥匙……

klaus.en: I'll come back to that when I'm not fighting for my life!
klaus.trans: 等我不为自己的生命而战时，我再回来管那个！

empty.en: I'm getting this out of order, I need something to wrap first.
empty.trans: 我顺序搞错了，需要先找到能捆的东西。

generic.en: This isn't the first time I've seen it.
generic.trans: 这不是我第一次看到它。

fertilizer.en: Honestly, I'm debating going back and unlearning what I know about it.
fertilizer.trans: 说实话，我在犹豫要不要回到过去，把我这方面的知识通通抹掉。

duplicate.en: I'm pretty sure I've seen this before. Or maybe I will see it soon?
duplicate.trans: 我很确定以前见过。或者是很快就会见到它？

not_merm.en: This should buy those merms a little more time.
not_merm.trans: 这应该能为鱼人们多争取一点时间。

busy.en: I don't have time to wait around!

dead.en: No, no, I'm doing this out of order!

sleeping.en: You couldn't sleep a little faster, could you?

full.en: If you want this, you'd better drop something fast.
full.trans: 你想要的话，最好先丢点东西。

glassed.trans: 也许换条时间线是可以的。

already_bombed.en: It's so much fun, maybe I should go back and do it again!
already_bombed.trans: 太好玩了，也许我该回去再重来一次！

someoneelsesbeefalo.en: I don't have time to waste on shaving other people's beefalo!
someoneelsesbeefalo.trans: 我可没时间浪费在为别人的牛剃毛上。

awakebeefalo.en: I'm not meeting my end under the hooves of an angry beefalo, thank you.
awakebeefalo.trans: 我的结局不是被愤怒的皮弗娄牛用蹄子踩死，谢谢你。

nobits.en: Their hair takes such a long time to grow back.
nobits.trans: 它们的毛发重新生长需要好长的时间。

generic.en: That's not going to work.
generic.trans: 这东西没用

out_of_water.en: Didn't I just fill this up? Gardening is so tedious...
out_of_water.trans: 我不是刚把这个装满了吗？园艺是如此乏味……

webberonly.en: They have no interest in listening to me, and I have no interest in them.
webberonly.trans: 它们没有兴趣听我说话，而我对它们也没有兴趣。

doer_isnt_module_owner.en: Fine then, keep your secrets to yourself!
doer_isnt_module_owner.trans: 那好吧，你就接着保守自己的秘密吧！

generic.en: This is no time for cooking.
generic.trans: 现在没有时间做饭。

messagebottlemanager_not_found.en: It's too dark in here... I can't make anything out.
messagebottlemanager_not_found.trans: 这里太黑了……伸手不见五指。

known.en: Yes yes, I know that one already.

wrongworld.en: I'm in the right time, but the wrong place.
wrongworld.trans: 我在正确的时间来到了错误的地点。

stash_map_not_found.en: What is this gibberish? None of the islands around here are this shape.
stash_map_not_found.trans: 这瞎画些什么啊？附近的岛屿没有这个形状的。

cantlearn.en: I just can't puzzle that one out...
cantlearn.trans: 我就是无法理解这个问题……

1.en: Ohhh botheration!!
1.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！！

2.en: Why can't this sail just lower properly when I tell it to?
2.trans: 为什么帆不听我话乖乖下降？

3.en: Ack! I think I pulled something in my back!

1.en: Wait a minute... I don't remember my carrat looking like this.
1.trans: 等一下……我记得我的胡萝卜鼠不是长这样的。

2.en: Oh botheration, I think I grabbed the wrong carrat.
2.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐，我大概是拿错了胡萝卜鼠。

full_of_curses.en: It won't fool me this time.

restriction.en: That's a little outside my area of expertise.
restriction.trans: 这有点超出我的专业领域。

inuse.en: Please hurry up, I need that!

no_heavy_lifting.en: I might be able to manage it... if I was just a bit younger.
no_heavy_lifting.trans: 我要是稍微再小几岁……应该就行了。

notallowed.en: I don't have time to fuss with this!
notallowed.trans: 我可没时间浪费在这种事情上！

restricted.en: I'll not waste time with that.
restricted.trans: 我不会在那上面浪费时间。

inuse.en: Please hurry, I have so much to do!

notsouljarhandler.en: The imp can do whatever he wants with these.
notsouljarhandler.trans: 让小恶魔去处理这些吧。

notmasterchef.en: It takes too long to cook a fancy meal.
notmasterchef.trans: 做顿好饭简直太费时间了。

generic.en: There's only so much space.
generic.trans: 空间有限啊。

noimage.en: Hm. I can't quite remember what it looks like...
noimage.trans: 嗯。我不太记得它什么样了……

itemmimic.en: Next time I'll choose the right one.

notempty.en: Oh! I forgot to check if there was anything still inside.
notempty.trans: 哦！我忘记检查里面有没有东西。

inuse.en: Could you hurry it up a little?

cooking.en: I'll have to be patient... just be patient... I can be patient!
cooking.trans: 我得有耐心才行……耐心点……我可以做到耐心点！

oncooldown.en: It needs a bit of time to unwind.
oncooldown.trans: 它需要一点时间来松发条。

notnow.en: I need you to look at this, time is of the essence!
notnow.trans: 我需要你看一下这个，时间很紧迫！

haspet.en: I can't divide my time between any more pets!
haspet.trans: 我已经分不出时间给更多的宠物了！

ticoon.en: Wait a tick, wasn't I already following one?
ticoon.trans: 等等，我不是已经跟了一个了吗？

mounted.en: I'm going to pull a muscle if I try grabbing that from up here.
mounted.trans: 我要是硬够的话，肯定会肌肉拉伤。

bad_timing2.en: I thought I'd be better at timing...
bad_timing2.trans: 我以为我能更好地把握时机……

beef_bell_has_beef_already.en: I don't have time to take care of all these beefalo!
beef_bell_has_beef_already.trans: 我没有时间照顾所有的皮弗娄牛！

beef_bell_invalid_target.en: Oh, that's not... well this is embarrassing.
beef_bell_invalid_target.trans: 啊，那个不是……这下尴尬了。

beef_bell_already_used.en: I guess we weren't meant to be partners this time around.
beef_bell_already_used.trans: 看来这回我们注定不能成为伙伴。

already_marked.en: Did I already pick this one? Yes, I'm pretty sure I did.
already_marked.trans: 我已经选了这个吗？嗯，我肯定选过。

not_participant.en: I can join in later. Or maybe earlier.
not_participant.trans: 我要不一会儿再参加，要不去之前参加。

samedish.en: I don't need two of the same plate.
samedish.trans: 我不需要两个相同的盘子。

announce_nohungersleep.en: I need to find something to eat first, quickly.
announce_nohungersleep.trans: 我需要先找点吃的，快点。

announce_nonightsiesta_cave.en: I'll take a break when I'm on the surface where it's safe...er.
announce_nonightsiesta_cave.trans: 等我到了地面上安全的地方，再休息也不迟……

announce_snowball_too_big.en: Let's not waste time. It's as big as it'll get.
announce_snowball_too_big.trans: 别浪费时间了。已经是它能达到的最大了。

describe_plantstressorkilljoys.en: Something around here is stopping it from reaching its full potential.
describe_plantstressorkilljoys.trans: 这里的一些东西正在阻止它发挥全部潜力。

announce_nonightsiesta.en: Now is not the time for a siesta.

announce_dusk.en: I need to hurry, I'm losing daylight.
announce_dusk.trans: 我要快点了，太阳就要下山了。

announce_snared_ivy.en: Ow! Oooh, I never liked gardening...
announce_snared_ivy.trans: 嗷！哦，我从来不喜欢园艺……

announce_fertilizer_researched.en: I think I know enough about fertilizer to last me a lifetime.
announce_fertilizer_researched.trans: 这些肥料的知识我这辈子都够用了。

1.en: The fish aren't biting, why am I wasting time here?
1.trans: 鱼不上钩，我为什么在这里浪费时间？

2.en: Couldn't the fish have the decency to let themselves be caught faster?
2.trans: 难道鱼就不能有礼貌地让自己快点被抓住吗？

3.en: Do I really have time to waste on this?
3.trans: 我真的有时间浪费在这上面吗？

4.en: Maybe I should try fishing later. Or earlier.
4.trans: 也许我应该晚点再去钓鱼。或者早点。

announce_hunt_successful_fork.en: It's not getting away from me this time!

announce_detach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: No! I can't slow down now!

announce_cozy_sleep.en: Ah, I feel fit as a fiddle!

announce_mega_flare_seen.en: What are they doing?! That flare will draw everything right to them!
announce_mega_flare_seen.trans: 这是在做什么？！那个信号弹会把所有的东西都吸引过去！

announce_hounds.en: Wait a tick... did you hear something?
announce_hounds.trans: 等下……你听到什么东西没有？

announce_rabbitking_aggressive.trans: 我能听到地下的爪子声。

announce_weak_rat.en: Poor thing, I think it's gotten stale.
announce_weak_rat.trans: 可怜的家伙，我想它已经变质了。

announce_nosleeponfire.en: It might be hard to sleep while I'm being roasted alive.
announce_nosleeponfire.trans: 当我要被活活烤死的时候可能很难入睡。

describe_plantstressorovercrowding.en: Oh botheration, I think I tried to fit too many plants in one spot.
describe_plantstressorovercrowding.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我可能在一个地方种了太多植物。

announce_lowresearch.en: Well I learned a bit, but not much.

yotb_post.en: A good place to secure a beefalo.

deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.en: I think I already built this later.
deerclopseyeball_sentryward_kit.trans: 我想我过会儿就造完它了。

gnarwail_horn.en: Who ever heard of a whale with a horn?
gnarwail_horn.trans: 谁曾听说过还有长角的鲸鱼？

quagmire_casseroledish.trans: 一道加了各种调料的菜。

generic.en: I knew that beak would come in handy.
generic.trans: 我知道那只喙会派上用场。

empty.en: Right, I'm supposed to get the water first.
empty.trans: 对了，我应该先去拿水。

held.en: What am I supposed to do with it now?

generic.en: A rabbit... or is it?
generic.trans: 是兔子吗？

unimplemented.en: A remnant from a collapsed timeline.
unimplemented.trans: 一条崩溃的时间线的残余物。

cozy_bunnyman.en: Don't you have anything more important to do than lay about?
cozy_bunnyman.trans: 除了躺平你就无事可干吗？

beetletaur.en: I can smell him from here!
beetletaur.trans: 我在这里都能闻到他的气味！

twinofterror2.en: That doesn't look like any clockwork I've ever seen.
twinofterror2.trans: 我还从来没见过这样的发条结构。

twinofterror1.en: That doesn't look like any clockwork I've ever seen.
twinofterror1.trans: 我还从来没见过这样的发条结构。

chesspiece_anchor.en: It's not going anywhere. I can look at it later.
chesspiece_anchor.trans: 它哪里也不会去。我可以以后再看。

chessjunk1.en: I don't see much in the way of proper clockwork in there.
chessjunk1.trans: 我没看到做工好的发条。

slurtle.en: How do they stand being so slow?
slurtle.trans: 它们怎么能受得了自己这么慢呢？

oceanfishinglure_spoon_green.en: If it will help me catch a fish faster, I'm all for it.
oceanfishinglure_spoon_green.trans: 如果能帮我更快抓到鱼，那我愿意试。

chessjunk3.en: Not so much as a pinion or pendulum in sight. Disgraceful!
chessjunk3.trans: 连一个小齿轮或钟摆都看不到。真荒唐！

chessjunk2.en: I have a suspicion these were held together with more magic than craftsmanship.
chessjunk2.trans: 我怀疑固定这些东西是魔法而不是工艺。

moose.en: I could never forget a face like that.
moose.trans: 我永远无法忘记那张脸。

dragon_scales.en: Fireproof material has served me well in the past. And future, come to think of it.
dragon_scales.trans: 防火材料在过去一直对我很有帮助。还有未来，想起来了。

reviver.en: A bit of insurance, in the unlikely event my own powers aren't enough.
reviver.trans: 就当是预防我哪天能力不够时的保险吧。

boat_magnet_kit.en: That young man certainly has some odd ideas.
boat_magnet_kit.trans: 那个年轻人想法真是怪。

trinket_9.trans: 每一个都很独特，很迷人。

trinket_8.en: You never know what might come in handy later.
trinket_8.trans: 你永远不知道什么会在以后派上用场。

trinket_7.en: I have no time for distractions.
trinket_7.trans: 我可没时间分心在别的事情上。

lavaarena_tiaraflowerpetalshat.en: Looks like it amplifies healing expertise.

ghost.en: Your time isn't over yet %s, not if I have anything to say about it!
ghost.trans: 你的时间还没结束，%s，我说没就是没！

firestarter.en: Some things stay consistent between timelines...
firestarter.trans: 有些事情不管什么时间线都会发生……

murderer.en: Is this the timeline where you go on a killing spree, %s?
murderer.trans: 这是一条你大开杀戒的时间线吗，%s？

attacker.en: Now's not the time to turn on each other, %s!
attacker.trans: 现在不是互相攻击的时候，%s！

reviver.en: Thank goodness our timelines converged, %s!
reviver.trans: 谢天谢地我们的时间线出现了交集，%s！

generic.en: There you are %s! Whatever you do, don't... oh botheration, I forgot.
generic.trans: 你在这啊，%s！记住了，你做什么都可以，就是别……嗷，麻烦呐！我忘记了。

trinket_6.en: One of those electrical doo-hickeys. I'll stick to my gears and pendulums.
trinket_6.trans: 又是电子组件，我还是用我的齿轮和钟摆好了。

honeycomb.en: It's much better once you pick out the bees.
honeycomb.trans: 挑出去蜜蜂以后就会好很多。

trinket_4.en: Oooh, I do love a good knickknack.
trinket_4.trans: 我确实喜欢精美的小饰品。

teleportato_box.en: This may control the polarity of the whole universe.
teleportato_box.trans: 这可能控制着整个宇宙的极性。

eating_corpse.en: I see it hasn't lost its appetite.

generic.en: This is not good.
generic.trans: 这下糟了。

trinket_3.en: I'm not going to bother trying to untangle it.
trinket_3.trans: 我不打算费力地去解开它。

trinket_2.en: I can't get a single note out of it.
trinket_2.trans: 一个音符也演奏不出来。

trinket_1.en: They look like candy that was left in someone's pocket for too long.
trinket_1.trans: 看上去像在口袋里放了太久的糖果。

warn.en: Oh no no no, don't you dare!

calm.en: Things seem quiet for the time being.

waning.en: I just need to hold out a little longer--!
waning.trans: 我只是需要再坚持一下——！

nomagic.en: Looks like I'm free of any magical flapdoodle.
nomagic.trans: 看来我已经不受魔法控制了。

dawn.en: It's almost over... I can do this!

waxing.en: They're everywhere! I-I need to get out of here!!
waxing.trans: 他们无处不在！我需要离开这里！！！

asparagus.en: One must stay healthy if they want to live to a ripe old age.
asparagus.trans: 要想活到成熟，活到老，就必须保持健康。

generic.en: Looks like I'm stuck down here for the time being.
generic.trans: 看来我暂时被困在这下面了。

full.en: Would someone please move? You're blocking the exit!
full.trans: 谁能让一下？你挡住出口了！

tree_rock_seed.trans: 我可以在任何地方种下它。

livinglog.en: This log is a lot livelier than it should be.
livinglog.trans: 这根木头有点过于活泼了。

halloweenpotion_moon.trans: 闻起来有不断变化的各种可能。

beargervest.en: It reminds me of that time I was almost eaten by a Bearger, but it's cozy.
beargervest.trans: 这让我想起了那次我差点儿被熊獾吃掉的经历，但这很温馨。

wereitem_moose.en: I love a good magical knickknack.
wereitem_moose.trans: 我喜欢有魔法的小玩意。

bigfoot.trans: 那真是一只巨大无比的脚。

rabbitkinghorn_chest.en: I hope I don't forget what I put in there.
rabbitkinghorn_chest.trans: 我希望我不会忘记我放在那里的东西。

mandrake_active.en: You can stop chiming in any time!

ipecacsyrup.en: I'm not going to be fooled into tasting that, thank you very much!
ipecacsyrup.trans: 我不会被愚骗去品尝它，我谢谢你！

generic.en: I wonder how long they've been at war.
generic.trans: 我想知道他们打了多久的仗。

burnt.en: Oh, that is vile.

rat.en: It seems to be enjoying itself.

burnt.en: Sigh... now I'll have to build a new one from scratch.
burnt.trans: 哎……现在我不得不从头开始建立一个新的。

generic.en: I'm starting to question if I'm spending my time wisely...
generic.trans: 我开始怀疑这时间花得值不值……

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.en: I'll find a place for it sooner or later.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint_item.trans: 我迟早会为它找到一个地方的。

quagmire_spotspice_sprig.en: I could grind it up to make a spice.
quagmire_spotspice_sprig.trans: 我可以把它磨碎了做香料。

leif.en: Even the trees are out to get me!

pigtorch.en: Maybe those pigs are brighter than I give them credit for.
pigtorch.trans: 也许那些猪比我想的聪明。

boatrace_primemate.en: Looks like it won't just be a race against time.
boatrace_primemate.trans: 看来，这不仅仅是一场与时间的比赛。

book_research_station.en: I'll admit it's quite efficient to have everything in one book.
book_research_station.trans: 我承认把所有东西都放在一本书里是相当有效的。

beef_bell.en: It makes taming beefalo so much faster!
beef_bell.trans: 它使驯服皮弗娄牛的速度大大加快!

mask_ancient_handmaidhat.en: It reminds me of someone with authority.
mask_ancient_handmaidhat.trans: 这让我想起某位权威人士。

corn_cooked.en: It could really use some butter.

haunted_ground.en: I'd die to find out what it does.
haunted_ground.trans: 我会查明它到底做了些什么。

generic.en: There's something about that flower...
generic.trans: 那朵花不一般……

haunted_pocket.en: I don't think I should hang on to this.

long.en: It hurts my soul to look at that thing.
long.trans: 看到那东西时，我的灵魂受伤了。

soon.en: Something is up with that flower!

foliage.en: Am I going to stop and examine every bit of greenery I find?
foliage.trans: 我是否要停下脚步，检查我发现的每一点绿色植物？

kitcoon_desert.trans: 烦死了，他们的可爱真让人分心！

firestarter.en: All children want to do these days is set fire to everything.
firestarter.trans: 现在的小孩就知道瞎放火。

ghost.en: Don't fret %s, I'll have you right as rain in no time at all!
ghost.trans: 别怕，%s，我马上就把你救回来！

murderer.en: You monster! I'll erase you from this timeline!
murderer.trans: 恶魔！我要把你从这条时间线抹除！

attacker.en: Someone needs to give that child a time out.
attacker.trans: 是该好好管管那小子了。

reviver.en: Children today are quite dependable.
reviver.trans: 现在的孩子真是可靠。

generic.en: Oh, %s! I think I have some candy in my pocket, though it might be a tad stale...
generic.trans: 是你啊，%s！我口袋里还有颗糖，不过可能有点旧了……

charcoal.en: It burned once and it can burn again.
charcoal.trans: 它既然烧过一次，就还能再烧。

pitchfork.en: I'm used to working with much smaller tools.
pitchfork.trans: 我习惯用小一些的工具工作。

chesspiece_catcoon.en: I guess I did have time to play with you after all.

yotd_steeringwheel_item.en: I hope I don't forget to add that to the boat.
yotd_steeringwheel_item.trans: 千万别忘了把它安到船上。

klaussackkey.en: This looks like just the piece I need.
klaussackkey.trans: 这看起来正是我需要的。

wintersfeastfuel.en: I'm not sure I trust that stuff.

slingshotammo_gold.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_gold.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

active.en: I might as well use it.

generic.en: It positively reeks of spacial wib-wobblery.
generic.trans: 它散发着时空动荡的甜美气息。

ratatouille.en: That's a fun name for a bunch of chopped vegetables.
ratatouille.trans: 这对一堆切碎的蔬菜来说是个有趣的名字。

has_item.en: Yes, there is something on it.

generic.en: A table. Will wonders never cease.
generic.trans: 一张桌子。奇迹永不停止。

standing.en: You'll never catch me! I've outsmarted you and your ilk at every turn!
standing.trans: 你永远也抓不住我！我每次都比你和你的爪牙更聪明！

sitting.en: I know you're hiding in there.

skeleton.en: This one's beyond my power to save...
skeleton.trans: 以我的能力救不回这家伙……

carnivalcannon_kit.en: I... guess I could spare a moment or two to set it up.
carnivalcannon_kit.trans: 我想我可以抽出一两分钟时间来设置它。

hermitcrab.en: Ha! She's just as crabby as ever.
hermitcrab.trans: 哈! 她还是和以前一样暴躁。

chesspiece_hornucopia.en: I feel like we're being mocked.

chesspiece_clayhound.en: Well, it hasn't sprung to life yet. So far so good.
chesspiece_clayhound.trans: 好吧，它还没有变成活的。所以现在还算安全。

shroomcake.en: If it's a cake it can't be too terrible... right?
shroomcake.trans: 无论如何，是蛋糕就不会太差……对吧？

potato_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
potato_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

hermitcrab_relocation_kit.en: Where did I move her to again?

battlesong_instant_taunt.en: Insults are so much more scathing when they rhyme.
battlesong_instant_taunt.trans: 侮辱在押韵的情况下会更加尖锐。

carnivaldecor_lamp.en: Ah... I feel a bit better already.

halloweencandy_12.en: If nobody else wants them I'll happily take them.
halloweencandy_12.trans: 如果没有人要，我很乐意收下。

halloweencandy_13.en: That seems like a self-fulfilling prophecy.
halloweencandy_13.trans: 那似乎是一个自我实现的预言。

halloweencandy_14.trans: 甜味与辣味混合在了一起！

goldenshovel.en: If I have to spend time digging holes, I can at least be fancy.
goldenshovel.trans: 如果我必须花时间挖洞，那就必须挖出风格。

plantmeat_cooked.en: If you close your eyes it tastes much better.
plantmeat_cooked.trans: 只要闭上眼，味道就会好很多。

palmcone_scale.en: I might as well put it in my pocket, it might be useful.
palmcone_scale.trans: 不如把它放进口袋，可能会派上用场。

tracking_not_mine.en: They seem preoccupied with helping someone else.
tracking_not_mine.trans: 他似乎只顾着帮助别人。

lost_track.en: Did he lose the trail? Ugh, what a waste of time!
lost_track.trans: 他这就跟丢了？呃，真是浪费时间！

nothing_to_track.en: Hmm, I suppose there's nothing around to track.
nothing_to_track.trans: 嗯，我想周围没有什么可以追踪的。

abandoned.en: Oh don't look at me like that, it's nothing personal!
abandoned.trans: 哦，不要这样看我，我不是针对你个人！

nearby.en: He seems particularly interested in that area.
nearby.trans: 他似乎对这个领域特别感兴趣。

tracking.en: Having an expert around should speed things up.
tracking.trans: 有专家在应该可以加快进程。

generic.en: Aha! I knew I remembered seeing orange ones!
generic.trans: 啊哈！我就记得看到过橙色的！

burnt.en: Oh well, nothing to be done now.

generic.en: I suppose there's time to make one little trinket, or two.
generic.trans: 好，我就抽出点时间做两件装饰品吧。

empty.en: It's that time of the duodecennial orbital cycle again.
empty.trans: 又到了十二年一次的轨道循环了。

halloweencandy_10.en: Something sweet that never goes bad, what's not to love?
halloweencandy_10.trans: 甜美的东西，而且永远不会变坏，谁会不爱它呢？

halloweencandy_11.en: Oh alright, I'll take a nibble.

quagmire_pot_syrup.en: I need to sweeten this pot.
quagmire_pot_syrup.trans: 我需要给这锅东西增加甜味。

mask_dollrepairedhat.en: Something about it makes my skin crawl...
mask_dollrepairedhat.trans: 它的某些东西让我皮肤发痒……

redmooneye.en: I suppose it never hurts to keep an eye out.
redmooneye.trans: 睁一只眼闭一只眼也不是坏事。

lordfruitfly.en: I have no patience for all your pestering!
lordfruitfly.trans: 我对你的纠缠没有耐心！

wereitem_beaver.en: Ooooh, what a fun little trinket!
wereitem_beaver.trans: 哦，多么有趣的小饰品啊！

wrong_tile.en: Oh botheration, it doesn't seem to like this type of soil.
wrong_tile.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。它似乎不喜欢这种土壤。

wrong_season.en: I suppose I'll just have to... ugh... wait.
wrong_season.trans: 我猜现在我只能……呃……干等了。

generic.en: Only marginally more exciting than watching grass grow.
generic.trans: 只比看小草生长稍微刺激一点。

spear_wathgrithr_lightning.en: I do hope I'm still on her good side...

ripe.en: It's a shame they're so delicious.
ripe.trans: 真可惜，它们是如此美味。

sleeping.en: I guess it doesn't have anything better to do.
sleeping.trans: 我想它没有什么更好的事情可做。

generic.en: What a funny little creature.
generic.trans: 多么有趣的小生物。

rope.en: I'm sure I'll find some use for it sooner or later.
rope.trans: 我相信我迟早会找到它的用途。

wx78module_movespeed2.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_movespeed2.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

wx78module_light.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_light.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

hedgehound.en: Fool me once, shame on you. Fool me twice, shame on you again!
hedgehound.trans: 骗我一次，是你的问题；骗我两次，还是你的问题！

out.en: Oh botheration, the fire went out!
Oh botheration, the fire went out!

petals_evil.en: Picking them seemed like a good idea at the time...
petals_evil.trans: 当时觉得摘下来还挺好的……

mulleddrink.en: It warms you from the inside out.
mulleddrink.trans: 它能由内而外地温暖你。

fishmeat_dried.en: A dry, tough piece of fish meat.
fishmeat_dried.trans: 一块干巴巴、硬邦邦的鱼肉。

statueharp.en: It's curious how they all seem to be broken in the same spot...
statueharp.trans: 奇怪啊，它们似乎都坏在了同一个地方……

pumpkincarver.en: No time for fun... Well, maybe this once.
pumpkincarver.trans: 没时间玩乐……好吧，那就这一次吧。

burning.en: Oh botheration, I needed that!
burning.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我本来需要那个的！

picked.en: I'll come back later when there's fruit to pick.
picked.trans: 等有水果能摘了我再回来。

withered.en: I can't expect it to make fruit in this heat.
withered.trans: 这么热的天气肯定结不出果。

generic.en: I've seen a lot of strange things in my time. This is one of them.
generic.trans: 我这辈子见过很多奇怪的事情。这就是其中之一。

barren.en: I think it's well past its prime.
barren.trans: 它早已经过了全盛时期。

meatysalad.en: I found a stick in it... or at least I hope it's a stick.
meatysalad.trans: 我找到一根签子……我希望那是签子。

escaped.en: Oh botheration, I didn't make it back in time.
escaped.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我没及时收回来。

lowered.en: It will catch fish while I see to more pressing matters.
lowered.trans: 它可以在我处理更紧急的事务的同时进行捕鱼。

fixed.en: What a nuisance. At least it's repaired now.

generic.en: Thank goodness, now I don't have to waste my time fishing!
generic.trans: 谢天谢地，这下不用浪费时间钓鱼了！

lavaarena_armorheavy.en: That's as good as it gets.

generic.en: It's warm, I think this egg has already been cooked.
generic.trans: 它是热的，我想这只蛋已经熟了。

picked.en: No sense waiting around for it to grow back.
picked.trans: 没必要干等它重新长回来。

inground.en: Something or other tucked in the ground.

generic.en: A blue mushroom. Moving on.
generic.trans: 一个蓝色的蘑菇。继续前进。

antlionhat.en: Oh my, what a splendidly strange hat!
antlionhat.trans: 天哪，真是一顶奇特的帽子！

blue_cap.en: It's... probably edible. If I'm desperate.
blue_cap.trans: 这……要是走投无路了，也算能吃吧。

wetgoop.en: I never claimed to be good at cooking!
wetgoop.trans: 我从来没吹嘘自己会做饭！

monkeyisland_portal.en: This... is how it started, wasn't it?
monkeyisland_portal.trans: 这……就是故事的起源，不是吗？

wx78module_maxhunger1.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_maxhunger1.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

drying.en: I'll be old and grey before it's done...
drying.trans: 等它做好了，我头发都要白了……

done_notmeat.en: I think it's been aged enough.
done_notmeat.trans: 我觉得它陈化的时间已经够长了。

done.trans: 完成了！ 终于完成了！！

generic.en: Drying is slow. This helps.
generic.trans: 风干的过程太缓慢。这个有用。

burnt.en: Oh botheration!

adventure_portal.en: What's the worst that could happen?
adventure_portal.trans: 可能发生的最坏情况是什么？

rook.en: I'm not convinced that's proper clockwork.
rook.trans: 我不相信那是正经发条。

mastupgrade_lamp_item_yotd.en: I feel a little better now.

treeclump.en: It's almost like someone is trying to prevent me from going somewhere.
treeclump.trans: 是不是有人想把我困在这里。

noeyeball.en: The part that makes it work is missing. Typical.
noeyeball.trans: 缺少运转的关键部分。太典型了。

generic.en: Feels like we're back in the ice age.
generic.trans: 感觉我们回到了冰河时代。

trap_teeth_maxwell.en: I'll want to avoid stepping on that!

quagmire_casseroledish_small.trans: 可以做各种杂七杂八的小菜。

slurper.en: I can't decide how I feel about them...

ocean_trawler_kit.en: I suppose I must invest some time now to save time later.
ocean_trawler_kit.trans: 只好现在多花点时间才能为将来省出时间。

saltrock.en: A bit of salt on my meals might be nice.
saltrock.trans: 在我的饭菜上加点盐可能会很好。

hungry.en: What is it? Do you need to be fed again already?

starving.en: Oh no, I forgot to feed you again didn't I?

sleeping.en: Thank goodness. I can finally do things uninterrupted.
sleeping.trans: 谢天谢地。我终于可以不受干扰地做事情了。

generic.en: That's no spring chicken.
generic.trans: 那个不是童子鸡。

mask_blacksmithhat.en: Something about it makes my skin crawl...
mask_blacksmithhat.trans: 它的某些东西让我皮肤发痒……

wx78module_movespeed.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_movespeed.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

salty_dog.en: I always did have a soft spot for crusty little dogs.
salty_dog.trans: 我对这些硬脾气的小狗毫无抵抗力。

spear_gungnir.en: I could do a quick charge with that.

forgetmelots.trans: 我以前见过这些东西吗？

sandspike.en: I won't have my time cut short by the likes of you!
sandspike.trans: 我不会让我的时间被你们缩短！

wetpaper.en: This is going to take forever to dry...
wetpaper.trans: 这要花很长时间才能干……

burnt.en: Oh botheration, now that it's gone I actually want to read something.
burnt.trans: 哦，烦恼，现在它没了，我反而想读书了。

generic.en: As if I have time to sit and read!
generic.trans: 好像我有时间坐下来阅读一样！

boat_bumper_yotd_kit.en: It'll make me feel slightly safer at sea. Slightly.
boat_bumper_yotd_kit.trans: 这将使我在海上多一点安全感。只是一点。

slingshot_frame_gems.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

kitcoon_moon.trans: 烦死了，他们的可爱真让人分心！

pudgy.en: He's gotten a little soft around the edges.

ornery.en: I don't like the look on his face...
ornery.trans: 我不喜欢他脸上的表情……

follower.en: It took long enough, but we're finally getting along.
follower.trans: 花了足够长的时间，但我们终于相处融洽了。

dead_mypartner.en: I wish I could give you more time.
dead_mypartner.trans: 我希望能给你更多的时间。

dead.en: His time is up. Or is it?
dead.trans: 他的时间到了，或者说，是吗？

naked.trans: 对不起，我需要那件毛皮。

rider.en: With his help, I'll shave precious minutes off my traveling time!
rider.trans: 有了他的帮助，我能从旅行中省下宝贵的时间。

sleeping.en: Look at him, snoring away precious hours!
sleeping.trans: 看看他，鼾声如雷的浪费宝贵的时间!

generic.en: Not exactly majestic, are they?
generic.trans: 一点也不宏伟，对不对？

quagmire_oven.en: It needs ingredients to make the science work.
quagmire_oven.trans: 需要加些材料才会有化学反应。

coolant.en: I know that bubbling gunk has a use.
coolant.trans: 我就知道那团冒泡的黏糊大小有点用处。

playing.en: Buttons are so much more efficient than levers.

generic.en: The mechanism won't work without a token.
generic.trans: 这套机械没有代币是不会工作的。

bird_mutant_spitter.en: Why don't you run along and spit somewhere else?
bird_mutant_spitter.trans: 你为什么不跑到别的地方去吐口水呢？

powder_monkey.en: Here to make a nuisance of yourself, are you?

dustmoth.en: I could have used one of you in my workshop back home.
dustmoth.trans: 我老家的作坊里可以用上你们。

blueprint.en: I remember seeing something up there.
blueprint.trans: 我记得看到过上面有东西。

generic.en: I'm not eager to be crushed by a teetering pile of scrap metal.
generic.trans: 我可不急着被一堆摇摇欲坠的废铁压死。

greenstaff.en: It's cruder than my pocket watch, but it follows the same basic principles.
greenstaff.trans: 虽然它比我的怀表简陋一些，但基本原理是一样的。

pumpkin_cooked.en: I don't know why I bothered cooking it.
pumpkin_cooked.trans: 我不知道我为什么要费心去做熟它。

bandage.en: I just need a little time and I'll be right as rain.
bandage.trans: 给我一点时间，我就能像雨一样好起来。

generic.en: It looks like something's been living in there for a while.
generic.trans: 看起来好像有什么东西在里面住了一段时间。

empty.en: It's deserted.
empty.trans: 它被遗弃了。

costume_fool_body.en: It looks like it could belong to a fool.

battlesong_sanitygain.en: Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you?
battlesong_sanitygain.trans: 哦，你不会是想听我唱歌吧？

tallbird.en: I wonder how they keep their balance.
tallbird.trans: 我想知道他们是如何保持平衡的。

wathgrithr_improvedhat.en: A few wings is nothing, I once saw a hat with an entire pheasant on top.
wathgrithr_improvedhat.trans: 插几只翅膀不算什么，我见过上面有一整只野鸡的帽子。

greengem.en: If only I could've gotten my hands on one of these before... well never mind.
greengem.trans: 如果我以前能得到这个就好了……好吧，算了。

trunk_winter.en: In the interest of time, I didn't bother removing the fur.
trunk_winter.trans: 为了节省时间，我就没费力气去拔毛。

kelp_dried.en: I don't know if it was worth the wait.
kelp_dried.trans: 我不知道这是否值得等待。

oceantree_pillar.en: It provides a nice bit of shade.
oceantree_pillar.trans: 它提供了一个很好的阴凉之处。

battlesong_healthgain.en: Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you?
battlesong_healthgain.trans: 哦，你不会是想听我唱歌吧？

firestarter.en: Honestly, nothing really surprises me anymore.
firestarter.trans: 老实说，现在见到什么我都不稀奇了。

ghost.en: I'll have you back on your feet before you can say temporal squiggle!
ghost.trans: 我马上就会让你重新站起来！

murderer.en: I know what you did %s, you can't talk your way out of this one!
murderer.trans: 我知道你的所作所为，%s，你说什么都没用了！

attacker.en: You were much more polite in the last timeline.
attacker.trans: 你在上一条时间线里要有礼貌得多。

reviver.en: That was some quick thinking, %s!
reviver.trans: 你还真是当机立断啊，%s！

generic.en: %s, why do you keep looking at my hands...?
generic.trans: %s，你为什么一直盯着我的手看……？

burnt.en: What a horrible waste of time and energy!
burnt.trans: 简直是浪费时间，浪费精力！

generic.en: This might take a while to piece together...
generic.trans: 这可能需要一段时间才能组装好……

moonglass_wobster_den.en: Maybe I should take the glass spikes as a sign to stay away.
moonglass_wobster_den.trans: 玻璃尖刺也许就是在警告我远离。

record_creepyforest.en: Do I look like I have time to sit around listening to records?
record_creepyforest.trans: 我看起来有时间坐下来听唱片吗？

armor_lunarplant.en: Some extra protection is always welcome.
armor_lunarplant.trans: 我对额外的防护来者不拒。

unagi.en: It makes the eel slightly better.
unagi.trans: 烹调适当能使鳗鱼的味道稍好一些。

waterplant_baby.en: In time, it will grow as big as the others.
waterplant_baby.trans: 假以时日，它也一样能长大。

yotc_carrat_race_finish_item.en: Where the race will come to an end.

tentacle_pillar.en: I don't think I should touch that.

slingshot_frame_bone.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

carrot_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
carrot_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

boat_bumper_shell_kit.en: It'll make me feel slightly safer at sea. Slightly.
boat_bumper_shell_kit.trans: 这将使我在海上多一点安全感。只是一点。

carnivalgame_memory_kit.en: At least they're quick to assemble.
carnivalgame_memory_kit.trans: 至少它们组装起来很快。

slingshotammo_rock.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_rock.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

watermelonhat.en: Believe it or not, it's actually quite practical.
watermelonhat.trans: 不管你信不信，它还是十分实用的。

succulent_plant.en: I'm afraid I can't stop to admire every bit of scenery.
succulent_plant.trans: 恐怕我不能停下来欣赏每一道风景。

slingshot_handle_sticky.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

generic.en: It hasn't had enough time to grow back yet.
generic.trans: 它还没有足够的时间重新长出来。

monkeytail.en: There had better not be any monkeys hiding in there.
monkeytail.trans: 希望没有猴子藏在里面。

strawhat.en: I could dress up like a farmer, how fun!
strawhat.trans: 我可以把自己打扮成一个农民了，真好玩！

burnt.en: No more playing, for the time being.

generic.en: I can't keep getting distracted by those adorable antics!
generic.trans: 我不能老是被那些可爱的玩物干扰！

generic.en: I don't have time to watch these kits play all day.
generic.trans: 我没有时间整天看小猫玩。

burnt.en: Playtime is over.

boatrace_checkpoint_throwable_deploykit.en: Must find the most logical spot for this.
boatrace_checkpoint_throwable_deploykit.trans: 必须找到最合理的位置。

undrawn.en: Maybe I'll just draw something quick.
undrawn.trans: 不如我来画个标志上去吧。

generic.en: Someone obviously thought it was important enough to put on a sign.
generic.trans: 很明显，有人认为这很重要，所以挂上了一个标志。

lavaarena_armorextraheavy.en: This armor has been petrified for maximum protection.
lavaarena_armorextraheavy.trans: 这副盔甲已经石化，提供最大程度的保护。

cutless.en: I suppose getting hit with a block of wood will still hurt.
cutless.trans: 我想被木头砸到还是会很疼的。

pocketwatch_parts.en: It's no small feat to recreate small, precise mechanisms out in the wilderness.
pocketwatch_parts.trans: 在荒野中重建小型精确的机械结构可不是一件小事。

blowdart_pipe.en: I like a weapon you can shoot from far away. Preferably while running.
blowdart_pipe.trans: 我喜欢可以从远处射击的武器。最好能在逃跑时使用。

generic.en: I do love to tinker with new things...
generic.trans: 我确实喜欢修补新事物……

burnt.en: It sure burnt away quickly.

empty.en: Now what did this need? My memory's a bit fuzzy...
empty.trans: 它需要什么来着？我的记忆有点模糊了……

record_drstyle.trans: 我更喜欢他们早期的作品。

skeletonhat.en: I don't want to put a dead thing on my head!
skeletonhat.trans: 我不想把一个死掉的东西放在头上！

hermitcrab_shell.en: How long has it been since I last paid Pearl a visit?
hermitcrab_shell.trans: 我有多久没去拜访过珍珠了？

undrawn.en: A blank canvas, containing infinite possibilities.
undrawn.trans: 空白的画布，蕴藏着无限的可能。

generic.en: Looks like it was done in no time at all.
generic.trans: 看起来它完成得很快。

firestarter.en: I can see your gears turning, %s. Just what are you up to?
firestarter.trans: 我看见你的齿轮在转了，%s。你打的什么算盘？

ghost.en: Don't you fret, I'll get you fixed up in no time at all!
ghost.trans: 你不要着急，我很快就会把你修好的！

murderer.en: Why you're nothing but a murderous pile of cogs and gears!
murderer.trans: 为什么你要一堆杀人不眨眼的齿轮！

attacker.en: %s is looking a bit wound up...
attacker.trans: %s的发条看起来上的很紧……

reviver.en: I think deep down you value life as much as I do, %s.
reviver.trans: 我知道你内心深处和我一样重视生命，%s。

generic.en: Oh, it's the funny little automaton! Hello %s!
generic.trans: 哎呀，是你这个有趣的小机器人啊！你好，%s！

moon_altar_cosmic.en: If I could have discovered this power first... ah well, I suppose it's in the past.
moon_altar_cosmic.trans: 如果我能够先发现这种力量……好吧，过去的已经过去了。

watermelon_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
watermelon_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

held.en: I hope it doesn't start growing in there.
held.trans: 我希望它不会在里面开始生长。

generic.en: At least they brighten things up a bit.
generic.trans: 起码它们能让环境亮一点。

formal_blueprint.en: My beefalo will look like the perfect gentleman.
formal_blueprint.trans: 我的皮弗娄牛看起来会像一个完美的绅士。

beefalohat.en: I kind of imagined a fur hat would feel fancier.
beefalohat.trans: 我还以为毛皮帽子会有多高级。

glass.en: A giant splash, frozen in time.
glass.trans: 一个巨大的水花，冻结在了时光中。

bombed.en: There's no sense in questioning these things.
bombed.trans: 质疑这些事情是没有意义的。

generic.en: It looks so warm and inviting.
generic.trans: 它看起来如此温暖和诱人。

empty.en: No sense standing around an empty hole.
empty.trans: 站在一个空洞旁边没有任何意义。

dragonboat_pack.en: An instant boat. You've got to admire the efficiency of it.
dragonboat_pack.trans: 飞速成船。如此高效，令人惊叹。

sewing_tape.en: Now this is the way to mend clothes, no fussing with needles and thread!
sewing_tape.trans: 现才是补衣服的正解，根本不用针和线那么麻烦！

hermit_bundle.en: Ooooh I wonder what fun knickknacks are inside!
hermit_bundle.trans: 哦，我想知道里面有什么有趣的小玩意！

marblebean.trans: 那颗豆子看起来是石化了。

oceanvine_cocoon_burnt.en: Thankfully the fire didn't spread to the tree.
oceanvine_cocoon_burnt.trans: 幸好火势没有蔓延到树上。

ice_blueprint.en: The poor beefalo's going to catch a chill wearing that!
ice_blueprint.trans: 可怜的皮弗娄牛带着那个会感冒的！

spider_healer.trans: 它们的床边礼仪很糟糕。

friendlyfruitfly.en: Thank goodness, I don't have to entertain the garden anymore.
friendlyfruitfly.trans: 谢天谢地，我不用再去取悦花园了。

statue.en: Was that a temporal blip, or did that statue just move?
statue.trans: 那是一个时空错乱，还是那座雕像刚刚动了？

generic.en: I really hoped it would be a bit more breakable!
generic.trans: 我真的希望它能更易碎一些！

dead.en: I chose my survival over his.

sleeping.en: At least it's not causing any trouble.
sleeping.trans: 至少它没有造成任何麻烦。

generic.en: Oh botheration, I hate the stripy ones.
generic.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！我讨厌有条纹的那些。

potato_cooked.en: Potatoes are much better cooked, I'll admit.
potato_cooked.trans: 我承认，土豆做熟会好吃很多。

generic.en: Oooooh, what a delightful assortment of knickknacks!
generic.trans: 噢，多么令人愉快的各种小玩意啊！

boat_item.en: Ohhh I hate the ocean, the time stream gets so wobbly around it.
boat_item.trans: 哦，我讨厌大海，时间流在它周围变得摇摆不定。

garlic.en: Just pop it in your mouth, it's good for you!
garlic.trans: 把它塞进嘴里吧，它对你有好处！

moon_altar_rock_idol.en: There's definitely something stuck in there. I wonder...
moon_altar_rock_idol.trans: 肯定有东西卡在里面。我想知道……

generic.en: The air around it tingles with potential.
generic.trans: 它周围的空气充满了潜力。

nolight.en: I'd better watch my step around here.
nolight.trans: 我在这里最好注意我的脚步。

picked.en: I can't get anymore out of that shrub.
picked.trans: 从那丛灌木中采集不到更多果实了。

generic.en: It reminds me of those tentacle monsters.
generic.trans: 它让我想起来那些带触手的怪物。

fishsticks.en: If only I had something to dip them in.
fishsticks.trans: 如果我有东西可以蘸着吃就好了。

normal.en: Maybe I'll just take a moment to warm up these old bones of mine.
normal.trans: 那我就花点时间来暖一暖这把老骨头。

high.en: Maybe I'll just take a moment to warm up these old bones of mine.
high.trans: 那我就花点时间来暖一暖这把老骨头。

hammered.en: If only I could go back in time and undo that decision. If only.
hammered.trans: 如果我能够回到过去，撤销这个决定就好了。如果啊。

generic.en: Maybe I'll just take a moment to warm up these old bones of mine.
generic.trans: 那我就花点时间来暖一暖这把老骨头。

healingsalve.en: That won't help, what I need is time!
healingsalve.trans: 那个没用，我需要的是时间！

marbletree.trans: 多么令人愉快的奇特之树啊。

quagmire_park_fountain.en: Been a long time since it was hooked up to water.
quagmire_park_fountain.trans: 它和水连在一起很长时间了。

waterplant_planter.en: If I come across a nice rock, I'll leave it there.
waterplant_planter.trans: 我要是碰到好的石头就会放进里面的。

sketch.en: An art project? Do I really have time for that?
sketch.trans: 一个艺术项目？我真的有时间做这个吗？

watermelon_cooked.trans: 做熟似乎完全没有必要。

carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 多么令人愉快的小机械啊！

mutator_healer.en: I don't think the poor child has a future in baking.
mutator_healer.trans: 这可怜的孩子在烘焙方面应该不会有大发展。

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: At least they're quick to assemble.
carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.trans: 至少它们组装起来很快。

acorn.en: In time, it'll be a new tree.
acorn.trans: 假以时日，它将长成一棵新树。

healingsalve_acid.en: This wretched concoction might buy us a little time.
healingsalve_acid.trans: 这瓶糟糕的混合物也许能为我们赢得些时间。

shadow_beef_bell.en: A way to reset the clock for my beefalo!
shadow_beef_bell.trans: 为我的皮弗娄牛重置时钟！

record_danger.trans: 我更喜欢他们早期的作品。

smallmeat.en: A little meat is better than none.

drying.en: I'll be old and grey before it's done...
drying.trans: 等它做好了，我头发都要白了……

done_notmeat.en: I think it's been aged enough.
done_notmeat.trans: 我觉得它陈化的时间已经够长了。

done.trans: 完成了！ 终于完成了！！

burnt.en: Oh botheration!

generic.en: Maybe I could help the poor old thing, if I have a spare minute or two...
generic.trans: 如果我有一两分钟的空闲的话，也许我可以帮助这个可怜的老家伙……

beehat.en: I like having a layer of netting between the bees and my face.
beehat.trans: 我喜欢有一层网罩在蜜蜂和我的脸之间。

gunpowder.en: There's an infinite number of ways this could go very badly.
gunpowder.trans: 这东西有无限种可能带来坏的结局。

spiderhole.en: I can hear them skittering inside...
spiderhole.trans: 我可以听到它们在里面溜达……

yoth_knighthat.en: There's a time to be brave.

yotp_food1.en: I wish it would stop glaring at me like that.
yotp_food1.trans: 我希望它不要再这样盯着我。

nonslipgrit.en: I'm not losing my grip just yet!
nonslipgrit.trans: 我还没到抓不住东西的年纪！

yotp_food3.en: This will fill me up for a while.
yotp_food3.trans: 这能让我吃上一段时间了。

slingshot_handle_silk.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

spiderhole_rock.en: I can hear them skittering inside...
spiderhole_rock.trans: 我可以听到它们在里面溜达……

armorsnurtleshell.en: It's not pleasant, but I do feel a bit safer.
armorsnurtleshell.trans: 虽然并不令人愉快，但我确实感到有点安全。

chesspiece_crabking.en: Oh yes, I remember. I was nearly drowned.
chesspiece_crabking.trans: 哦，是的，我记起来了。我差点被淹死。

kitcoon_yot.trans: 烦死了，他们的可爱真让人分心！

boat_rotator_kit.en: I can't believe I didn't think of it sooner.
boat_rotator_kit.trans: 真不敢相信我竟然没早点想到。

sculpture_bishophead.en: What is this doing way out here?

warg.en: I guess I was bound to run into you sooner or later.

quagmire_coin1.en: I'd like more than a penny for my thoughts.
quagmire_coin1.trans: 我的想法可值不止这点钱。

monkeyqueen.en: And what do you have to say for all this skullduggery, hm?
monkeyqueen.trans: 你对那一系列的偷盗活动作何解释？

quagmire_coin4.en: We can use these to reopen the Gateway.
quagmire_coin4.trans: 可以用它们重新打开大门。

carnivaldecor_figure_kit.en: I couldn't help it, I looked ahead and took a peek...
carnivaldecor_figure_kit.trans: 我忍不住了，往前看了一眼，偷看了一下……

follower.en: Alright you can come along, just don't slow me down.
follower.trans: 好吧，你可以一起去，不过不要拖累我啊。

brokenhorn_follower.en: I'm starting to feel a bit bad about taking its horn.
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 我开始觉得取走它的角有点不好了。

brokenhorn.en: I'll bet you feel pretty foolish now, don't you?
brokenhorn.trans: 我敢打赌，你现在觉得自己很傻吧？

generic.en: Another obviously made-up creature.
generic.trans: 又一个胡编乱造的生物。

unwritten.en: There's nothing written here. What an unhelpful sign!
unwritten.trans: 什么都没写。毫无帮助的指示牌！

burnt.en: That's a bad sign.

generic.en: That must be some kind of sign.
generic.trans: 那是一种征兆。

flowersalad.en: What a lovely bowl of yard clippings.
flowersalad.trans: 多么可爱的一碗庭院切花啊。

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: I hope training my carrat won't take too long.
yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.trans: 我希望训练胡萝卜鼠不会花太长时间。

construction_plans.en: What's a little more tampering going to hurt?
construction_plans.trans: 再做一点手脚又有什么坏处呢？

steeringwheel.en: My poor hands are going to get callouses from all this sea-faring.
steeringwheel.trans: 我可怜的双手会因为航海而长出茧子。

knight.en: Clockwork and I usually get along just fine...
knight.trans: 发条和我通常相处得很好……

book_birds.en: Time and birds sure do fly.

mast_item.en: That'll be the... sail holder bit.
mast_item.trans: 那个将会是……固定风帆的组件。

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: I'd better start setting it up.

acorn_sapling.en: Trees are so painfully slow to grow.
acorn_sapling.trans: 树木的生长速度是如此之慢，令人痛苦。

record_main.trans: 我更喜欢他们早期的作品。

barnacle.en: I had quite the time prying them free.
barnacle.trans: 我费了很大劲才把它们撬开。

staffcoldlight.en: If it keeps me from dying of heat exposure, I'm happy.
staffcoldlight.trans: 只要它能使我不因高温暴毙，我就满足了。

lureplant.en: I'm not falling for that old trick!

polishcookie.en: I'll just put a few extras in my pocket... don't mind me.
polishcookie.trans: 我多放几个在口袋里……别介意。

megaflare.en: I'm not too keen on drawing unwanted attention.
megaflare.trans: 我可不想引来不必要的关注。

drumstick.en: I'm in a hurry, it's fine enough as it is.
drumstick.trans: 我忙着呢，它现在已经很好了。

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: I knew I'd find a use for that feather eventually!
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 我知道我终会为那根羽毛找到用途!

pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 又一次无懈可击的短途时空之旅。

mask_mirrorhat.en: Something about it makes my skin crawl...
mask_mirrorhat.trans: 它的某些东西让我皮肤发痒……

merm_tool.en: I doubt it'll stand the test of time.
merm_tool.trans: 我怀疑它经不起时间的考验。

turf_mosaic_blue.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_mosaic_blue.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

footballhat.en: I don't want my brain scrambled, I'm forgetful enough as it is.
footballhat.trans: 我不希望我的大脑被打乱，我已经够健忘的了。

support_pillar_scaffold.en: Oh! I thought that was done already.

burning.en: Oh! Where did that fire come from?

has_item_light.en: It won't even tell me the weight? Well that's just rude.
has_item_light.trans: 它甚至不告诉我重量？这真是太无礼了。

generic.en: You would think weight would be easier to manipulate than time...
generic.trans: 我总以为重量会比时间更容易操纵……

burnt.en: What a waste.

teleportato_crank.en: Tough enough to handle the most intense experiments.
teleportato_crank.trans: 结实到足以应付最危险的实验。

quagmire_trader_merm2.en: Maybe they'd be willing to trade.

tillweedsalve.en: This plant gunk isn't going to do me much good.
tillweedsalve.trans: 这些植物垃圾对我没有什么好处。

hermitcrabtea_petals.en: A charming cup of tea to keep the insanity away.
hermitcrabtea_petals.trans: 一杯颇有魅力、能抵御疯狂的茶。

generic.en: Kelp is only slightly more interesting than grass.
generic.trans: 海带只比草稍微有趣一些。

shovel.en: My clocksmith hands weren't made for this kind of work...
shovel.trans: 我钟表匠的双手不适合干这种工作……

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.en: I feel like I'm being watched...

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: I suppose it wasn't the most unpleasant diversion.
chesspiece_manrabbit.trans: 虽然让我分了神，但看着确实挺逗。

trailmix.en: I prefer the version that has little bits of candy in it...
trailmix.trans: 我更喜欢里面有小块糖果的那种……

pomegranate_oversized.en: I hope the seeds inside grew bigger too.

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: I can't resist a chance to tinker with tiny mechanisms.
carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.trans: 我无法拒绝一个修补小机械的机会。

brush.en: Caring for animals is so time consuming!

houndstooth_blowpipe.en: A toothy take on a timeless design.
houndstooth_blowpipe.trans: 对经典款的一次有齿改造。

sentryward.en: Good, this will help me get the lay of the land quicker.
sentryward.trans: 很好，这将帮助我更快地了解大陆的情况。

short.en: According to my egg timer, it could hatch any moment now!
short.trans: 我的鸟蛋计时器货它随时可能孵化！

cold.en: I shouldn't leave it out in the cold.
cold.trans: 我不应该把它丢在寒冷的地方。

hot.en: It's going to be a fried egg soon if I don't cool it down.
hot.trans: 如果我不把它冷却下来，它很快就会变成一颗煎蛋。

generic.en: Did that crack come from the outside or the inside?
generic.trans: 那条裂缝是来自外部还是内部？

burning.en: This should put an end to it.

generic.en: I know what comes next.
generic.trans: 我知道接着会来什么。

critter_puppy.en: I think he wants belly rubs.
critter_puppy.trans: 它大概想让人揉揉肚子。

burning.en: That doesn't bode well for us.
burning.trans: 这对我们来说不是好兆头。

sleep.en: She's put a modern spin on a medieval concept.
sleep.trans: 她对中世纪的发明进行了现代化改造。

burnt.en: I wonder how quickly she can build a new one...
burnt.trans: 我想知道她能以多快的速度建造一个新的……

generic.en: She's put a modern spin on a medieval concept.
generic.trans: 她对中世纪的发明进行了现代化改造。

moonrocknugget.en: I never would have predicted I'd see a piece of the moon up close.
moonrocknugget.trans: 我从来没有预料到有一天我会近距离看到月亮。

skeleton_notplayer.en: These old bones should remind us not to tarry.
skeleton_notplayer.trans: 看到这破旧的骨堆，我们要学会惜时。

boat_bumper_shell.en: Anything to prolong the life of my boat.
boat_bumper_shell.trans: 只要能延长小船的寿命我都愿意用。

drumstick_cooked.en: Why do I always forget how much better cooked meat tastes...
drumstick_cooked.trans: 为什么我总是忘记熟肉的味道有多好……

chesspiece_moon.en: Just look up if you want to see the moon. Actually, better not.
chesspiece_moon.trans: 如果你想看月亮，就抬头看看。哎，要不还是算了。

wendy_resurrectiongrave.en: How many times have I done this?

pepper.en: A little spice might put a spring in my step.
pepper.trans: 一点点的香料可能会让我的脚步更轻盈。

farm_plow.en: It's so much faster than digging everything up by hand!
farm_plow.trans: 这比用手挖出所有东西要快得多！

birchnutdrake.en: I'll stomp you back into the ground, you overgrown seedling!
birchnutdrake.trans: 我要把你踩回地里，你这个超大号的苗子！

slingshotammo_moonglass.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_moonglass.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

tillweed.en: That doesn't look like it belongs...
tillweed.trans: 它看起来并不属于这里……

walking_stick.en: Nothing like a walking stick to add some pep to one's step.
walking_stick.trans: 没有什么比手杖更能给人的步伐增添活力了。

furtuft.en: Hold on a tick, is my hair falling out?!
furtuft.trans: 等一下，我的头发是不是掉了？！

polly_rogers.en: A pocket-sized helper, what could be better?
polly_rogers.trans: 口袋大小的帮手，还有什么比这更好的呢？

construction1.en: I've got the uneasy feeling I've done this before...
construction1.trans: 我有一种不安的感觉，我好像以前也这么干过……

generic.en: It's finished...
generic.trans: 已经完成了……

chesspiece_beequeen.en: This will remind me not to go poking around beehives.
chesspiece_beequeen.trans: 这将提醒我不要去捣鼓蜂窝。

idle.trans: 它终于发现了一些东西！

generic.en: Finally, something to point me in the right direction!
generic.trans: 终于给我指出正确方向了！

batnosehat.trans: 多么美妙、省时的设计啊！

saddle_race.en: This should help my beefalo pick up the pace.
saddle_race.trans: 这个应该能帮我的皮弗娄牛加快一下步伐。

pumpkincookie.en: I can never turn down a cookie.

moonrockcrater.en: Now, have I seen any gems lying about?
moonrockcrater.trans: 我有没有看到地上有宝石？

malbatross.en: Of course this couldn't be just a quiet, pleasant boat trip...
malbatross.trans: 这当然不会是一次安静、愉快的乘船旅行……

book_gardening.en: Do I even want to know how long the unabridged version was?
book_gardening.trans: 我会想知道未删节的版本有多长吗？

burning.en: One less potential reanimated corpse to worry about.
burning.trans: 少一具可能会复活的尸骸就少一份担心。

generic.en: I'd better burn that thing before it's too late.
generic.trans: 我还是趁早烧掉那东西吧。

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: I'm starting to feel bad for the fish...

turf_beard_rug.en: Why am I wasting time staring at... I'm sorry, is that rug made of whiskers?!
turf_beard_rug.trans: 为什么我在浪费时间盯着……等等，那块地毯是用胡须做的吗？

merm_toolshed.en: I doubt there's anything in there worth my time.
merm_toolshed.trans: 我怀疑里面没有值得我花时间的东西。

spice_garlic.en: Oh, that smell takes me back.
spice_garlic.trans: 哦，这气味把我带回了过去。

shadow_forge_kit.en: I'll have it up and running in just a tick.
shadow_forge_kit.trans: 用不了几秒我就能把它装好。

generic.en: Nothing wrong with dabbling in strange mystical magics from time to time.
generic.trans: 偶尔涉足奇怪的神秘魔法也并无不妥。

moon_altar_wip.en: I just can't stand leaving anything unfinished.
moon_altar_wip.trans: 我不能忍受留下任何未完成的东西。

unhappy.en: There's no need to get yourself so worked up!
unhappy.trans: 没必要把自己弄这么激动！

veryhappy.en: Oh now you're in a good mood?

generic.en: Oh botheration, I hope I remembered to bring a gift.
generic.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我希望我记得带礼物了。

monkeypillar.en: As pillars go, it's hardly noteworthy.
monkeypillar.trans: 这种柱子搁在其他柱子里基本不会引起任何注意。

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: With a few more pieces, I could fashion a new pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 如果再有几块，我就可以做成一个新的款式。

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: With a few more pieces, I could fashion a new pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 如果再有几块，我就可以做成一个新的款式。

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: It looks like it packs a wallop.

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: With a few more pieces, I could fashion a new pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 如果再有几块，我就可以做成一个新的款式。

wx78_moduleremover.en: Did the automaton make off with one of my tools?
wx78_moduleremover.trans: 那个机器人是不是偷了我的工具？

weed_ivy.en: I don't like the look of it one bit.
weed_ivy.trans: 我一点都不喜欢它的样子。

goldenpickaxe.en: Just don't think about it and it'll make sense.

vault_rune.en: I'll not figure this out anytime soon.
vault_rune.trans: 我一时半会儿是搞不明白了。

inactive.trans: 这看起来非常令人怀疑。

active.en: This stinks of shadow magic shenanigans.
active.trans: 这周围弥漫着暗影魔法的恶臭。

handpillow_kelp.en: Who thought this was a good idea?

trap.en: The trap is fine, it's the part afterwards that makes me sad...
trap.trans: 陷阱是好的，让我伤心的是之后的部分……

ruinshat.trans: 我永远也不会把它脱下来！

ghostlyelixir_shield.en: A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.
ghostlyelixir_shield.trans: 一点点玄学上的干预不会伤害任何人。

mosquitobomb.en: I hope it's as effective as it is disgusting.
mosquitobomb.trans: 真希望它的效果能像它的恶心程度一样高。

bloom.en: Don't you dare get any of those spores on me!
bloom.trans: 你可别把那些孢子弄到我身上来！

generic.en: I wonder how it got so big? Rather, I wonder what it's been feeding on...
generic.trans: 它是怎么变这么大的？还有，它吃什么呢……

acidcovered.en: I will not soon forget this odor.
acidcovered.trans: 我不会马上忘记这种气味。

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: This shouldn't take too long to piece together.
yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.trans: 拼起来应该要不了多久。

generic.en: Is there an order to this.
generic.trans: 是不是有一定的顺序。

halloweenpotion_fire_fx.en: This might have been a frivolous use of my time...
halloweenpotion_fire_fx.trans: 这样使用我的时间可能有些轻率……

twigs.en: Twigs always come in handy sooner or later.
twigs.trans: 树枝总是迟早会派上用场的。

corn_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
corn_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

yotb.en: Where's that peculiar judge? He might have an appreciation for this.
yotb.trans: 那个古怪的裁判在哪里？他应该会喜欢这个。

generic.en: I love a nice memento, they help me keep track of when I am.
generic.trans: 我喜欢漂亮的纪念品，能帮助我找到身处何时。

cactus_meat.en: Now to pick out all the spines. What a tedious vegetable.
cactus_meat.trans: 现在还要把所有的刺挑出来。多么单调的一种蔬菜。

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_gelblob.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

deck_of_cards.en: Certainly a way to kill time.
deck_of_cards.trans: 确实是个消磨时间的好方法。

atrium_key.en: Am I sure I want to take this?

pocketwatch_dismantler.en: Everything I need for building and dismantling my lovely clocks.
pocketwatch_dismantler.trans: 有这个我就可以建造和拆解我可爱的钟表了。

balloonvest.en: If it keeps me from drowning, I'll wear it.
balloonvest.trans: 如果能让我不溺水，那我愿意穿。

line_1.en: A mural of an ancient civilization, but something is wrong...
line_1.trans: 这是一幅古代文明的壁画，但有些地方不对劲……

line_2.en: Whatever was here has been lost to time.
line_2.trans: 无论这里有过什么，都在时间长河中消失了。

line_5.en: They had the right idea for a while, but they must have made a mistake.
line_5.trans: 他们有一段时间的想法是正确的，但他们肯定犯了一个错误。

line_3.en: It shows shadows descending on the city.
line_3.trans: 它描绘了降临在城市之上的暗影。

line_4.en: The people weren't quick enough to escape. They paid a price...
line_4.trans: 人们逃得不够快。他们付出了代价……

cooldown.en: For the time being, I think it should be left alone.

charging.en: Does anyone else feel a crackle of magic in the air?
charging.trans: 还有人觉得空气中弥漫着魔法的噼啪声吗？

off.en: With a bit of tinkering, I could get it working again.
off.trans: 经过一番修补，我可以让它重新工作。

on.en: It's radiating a strange energy, almost like...
on.trans: 它散发出一种奇怪的能量，几乎像……

generic.en: What a cheery sight.
generic.trans: 多么温馨的光景。

burning.en: That seems like a good use for a log.

generic.en: It came from a tree, as you'd expect.
generic.trans: 如你所料，它是树上下来的。

trails.en: He's got a strong arm on him.

held.en: Don't peck on my pocket watches while you're in there!
held.trans: 你在里面的时候不要啄我的怀表！

generic.en: Some kind of blueish white bird.
generic.trans: 某种蓝白色的鸟。

spider_repellent.en: I wish he used it more often.
spider_repellent.trans: 要是他用的更频繁些就好了。

pigtent.en: I don't want to spend too much time in it.

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: Oh, wonderful. It's even worse than I remembered.
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 哦，太好了。比我记忆中的还要糟糕。

carnival_vest_b.en: How odd! A cloak to keep cool!
carnival_vest_b.trans: 多么奇怪！用斗篷来保持凉爽！

waxpaper.en: With this, I can make time slow down for my food too!
waxpaper.trans: 有了这个，我就可以让食物的时间也放慢了！

merm_lunar.en: Did they always look like that?

emberlight.en: Saves me the trouble of finding firewood.
emberlight.trans: 省去了我找柴火的麻烦。

growing.trans: 哦，太好了，它又长出来了。

mined_out.en: I feel a bit better now.

generic.en: It's just salt! N-nothing to be bothered over.
generic.trans: 这只是盐！没有什么好纠结的。

burning.en: Maybe that was supposed to happen.

chopped.en: Its time in this world was cut short.
chopped.trans: 它在这个世界上的时间被缩短了。

burnt.en: Well, what's done is done. For now anyway.
burnt.trans: 哎，也只能接受发生的事情了。现在只好如此。

generic.en: It looks sickly.
generic.trans: 它看上去生病了。

book_bees.en: I don't care for bees and I don't care to read about them.
book_bees.trans: 我不关心蜜蜂，别让我看这方面的东西。

generic.en: He looks familiar.
generic.trans: 他看起来很眼熟。

gazpacho.en: It might help me stave off this terrible heat.
gazpacho.trans: 它也许会帮助我抵御这可怕的高温。

turf_mud.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_mud.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

turf_monkey_ground.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_monkey_ground.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

archive_lockbox.en: It's quite a puzzling piece, isn't it?

carnival_vest_a.en: Wearing a scarf to fend off the heat? How delightfully paradoxical!
carnival_vest_a.trans: 戴着围巾来抵御高温？多么令人愉快的矛盾啊！

hound.en: Stay away! I refuse to be eaten by the likes of you!
hound.trans: 别过来！我拒绝被你们吃掉！

firestarter.en: I know you must be frustrated, but that won't solve anything!
firestarter.trans: 我知道你很沮丧，但这并不能解决任何问题！

ghost.en: Even death can't lift the curse?
ghost.trans: 即使死亡也不能解除诅咒？

murderer.en: Whoever they were is gone, the beast has taken hold!
murderer.trans: 此人已经失去理智，完全由那野兽主宰了。

attacker.en: You stop that, right this minute!
attacker.trans: 你给我马上停手！

reviver.en: At least their heart's still in the right place.
reviver.trans: 还好有一颗好心在。

generic.en: Oh my, what happened to you?
generic.trans: 哦，天哪，你怎么了？

wx78module_maxhealth.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

generic.en: I guess you're in charge around here?
generic.trans: 我猜你是这里的老大？

sleeping.en: It's sleeping, for now.

turf_ruinstiles.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_ruinstiles.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

wagstaff_mutations_note.en: Someone must have a lot of time on their hands.

mask_queenhat.en: Something about it makes my skin crawl...
mask_queenhat.trans: 它的某些东西让我皮肤发痒……

ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.en: That's a bit better. I think.
ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.trans: 我觉得现在这样确实会好一点。

quagmire_rubble_chimney.en: Something put a damper on that chimney.

yotb_post_item.trans: 真倒霉，并没有提前组装好。

book_brimstone.en: Hmph. Not if I can help it.

slurtle_shellpieces.en: A handful of shattered shell bits.

klaus.en: Is it that time of year again already?
klaus.trans: 又到了每年的这个时候了吗？

glassed.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐，怎么又到这条时间线了……

cave.en: I won't waste my time trying to see the moon down here.
cave.trans: 我不会浪费我的时间去看这下面的月亮。

night_new.en: It's a new moon. I'd best keep my wits about me...

generic.en: Why worry about the moon? I've got enough to contend with down here.
generic.trans: 操心月亮？我已经有足够多的问题要解决了。

done.en: I'll admit, it does look more appetizing than it did before.
done.trans: 我承认，看起来更好吃了。

generic.en: Some flavor might be nice, but is it worth taking the extra time?
generic.trans: 值得为了多点风味花这么多时间吗？

tomato_oversized.en: I don't know if I can lift a tomato that size!
tomato_oversized.trans: 我应该举不起那么大的西红柿！

thulecite.en: If I could just break it down into more manageable pieces...
thulecite.trans: 如果我可以把它分解成更容易处理的小块就好了……

driftwood_log.en: Who knows how long it's been floating out in the ocean?
driftwood_log.trans: 谁知道它在海洋中漂浮了多久？

burning.en: That fire certainly isn't wasting any time!

picked.en: That wasn't one of my smarter moments.

burnt.en: There's always something to be learned from mistakes.
burnt.trans: 我们总能从错误中学习到教训。

generic.en: Calling it a bush is quite charitable.
generic.trans: 称其为灌木太善良了。

infused.trans: 它充满了未开发的潜力！

generic.en: Oh wonderful, something sharp to trip on.
generic.trans: 看看，这么尖的东西，万一绊倒了可就完蛋了。

succulent_potted.en: I can never seem to keep them alive for long.
succulent_potted.trans: 我一直无法让它们活得长久。

dug_sapling.en: I can put it somewhere later. Or maybe even earlier.
dug_sapling.trans: 我以后给它找个地方。或者去以前也行。

burnt.en: It looks like nap time is over, permanently.
burnt.trans: 看来小憩时间已经结束了，永远结束了。

generic.en: I guess it wouldn't hurt to take a quick little nap...
generic.trans: 我看小憩一下也无妨嘛……

boat_grass_item.en: That certainly won't stand the test of time.
boat_grass_item.trans: 那东西经不起时间的考验。

moonglassaxe.en: A sharp tool makes for faster chopping!
moonglassaxe.trans: 锋利的工具能提高劈砍效率！

boards.en: I'm already bored of looking at them.

giftwrap.en: Wouldn't it be quicker to just put it in a nice bag?
giftwrap.trans: 直接把它放在一个漂亮的袋子里不是更快吗？

pocket_scale.en: In my opinion, everything should have a pocket-sized version.
pocket_scale.trans: 在我看来，所有东西都应该有一个口袋版。

moon_cap_cooked.en: Why does it have to smell like old cheese?
moon_cap_cooked.trans: 为什么是陈年奶酪的味道？

pond_algae.en: I can't spend my time looking at every old pond plant.
pond_algae.trans: 我不能把时间花在欣赏古老的池塘植物上。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

barnacle_cooked.en: Only marginally better than raw barnacles.

dreadstone_stack.en: It's coming from deep below the surface.

quagmire_sapling.en: I can't get anything else out of that.
quagmire_sapling.trans: 我从中弄不到其他东西。

klaus_sack.en: At least he left some goodies!
klaus_sack.trans: 至少他留下了一些好东西！

milkywhites.en: The collagen in this is great for fighting aging. Magic watch is better, though.
milkywhites.trans: 它富含胶原蛋白，抗衰老。不过，还是魔法表更好。

generic.en: I spot an egg! Although it looks like it was spotted already.
generic.trans: 我发现了一颗蛋！上面有很多斑点。

eyemaskhat.en: How bizarre... I simply must try it on!
eyemaskhat.trans: 多么诡异……我一定要试戴一下！

wx78module_bee.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_bee.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

wall_wood_item.en: The sooner I can get it built, the better I'll feel.
wall_wood_item.trans: 赶紧弄好吧，我没那么多时间。

turf_fungus.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_fungus.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

meat.en: Well, a little raw meat never hurt anybody.
meat.trans: 好吧，一点生肉不会伤害任何人。

locked.en: It won't open without the key.

generic.en: It's a safe. For keeping things safe.
generic.trans: 这是保险箱，用来保护物品安全的。

lightbulb.en: It will give me a few precious minutes of light.
lightbulb.trans: 它将给我带来几分钟的宝贵光明。

burning.en: That's an unfortunate turn of events.

chopped.en: I should check for roots while I'm here.
chopped.trans: 我应该检查一下有没有树根。

generic.en: That tree is long dead.
generic.trans: 那棵树早已经死了。

burnt.en: It won't do me much good now.

mask_dollbrokenhat.en: Something about it makes my skin crawl...
mask_dollbrokenhat.trans: 它的某些东西让我皮肤发痒……

yots_worm.en: I don't remember seeing you up here.
yots_worm.trans: 我不记得在这儿上头见过你。

desiccantboosted.en: I won't have to worry about getting soggy!
desiccantboosted.trans: 我不必担心变得湿漉漉了！

honeynuggets.en: The dipping sauce is my favorite part.
honeynuggets.trans: 蘸酱是我最喜欢的部分。

staff_lunarplant.en: I prefer keeping everything at a distance.

armormarble.en: Well it's definitely sturdy, but why does it have to be so heavy?!
armormarble.trans: 结实是结实，但为什么一定要这么重呢？！

firestarter.en: Huh. You weren't such a firebug in the last timeline.
firestarter.trans: 哈？在上一条时间线中，你并不是这样一个火爆的人。

ghost.en: It's about time I showed you what my own little gadgets can do!
ghost.trans: 是时候让你看看我的装置能做什么了！

murderer.en: I don't know what this is all about %s, but leave me out of it!
murderer.trans: 我不知道你是几个意思，%s，不过你别惹我啊！

attacker.en: Come on now %s, you're better than that!
attacker.trans: 哎呀，%s，你怎么能那样呢！

reviver.en: I'm glad I can count on you in times of need, %s.
reviver.trans: 我很高兴在危难之际能指望上你，%s。

generic.en: Sorry %s, things to do, places to be. You know how it is!
generic.trans: 抱歉，%s，我有事情要做，有地方要去。你肯定能谅解！

charlie_npc.en: She looks happy... that doesn't bode well.
charlie_npc.trans: 她看起来很高兴……准没好事。

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.en: The preparations are done, now to find a place for it.
yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.trans: 准备工作已经完成，现在要给它找一个地方。

record.en: Is this that newfangled ragtime music the youth are raving about?
record.trans: 这是年轻一辈赞不绝口的最新潮的拉格泰姆音乐吗？

pomegranate.en: Who wants to spend time picking out every individual seed?
pomegranate.trans: 谁愿意花时间去剔出每一颗籽？

fossil_piece.en: These bones are too old for my magic to work. However...
fossil_piece.trans: 这些骨头太老了，我的魔法无法发挥作用。然而……

sharkboi.en: A brute if I've ever seen one!
sharkboi.trans: 就没见过这么粗暴的家伙！

follower.en: Well, he's friendly enough for now.
follower.trans: 好吧，他现在已经很友好了。

guard.en: It might be best to avoid him.

werepig.en: I hate it when they get like this!

generic.en: Carry on, pig.
generic.trans: 去吧，猪。

burnt.en: I guess it's time to find a new light.
burnt.trans: 是时候找一展新的灯了。

off.en: Adding some colored spores might brighten this place up.
off.trans: 添加一些彩色的孢子应该能让这个地方变得更加明亮。

on.en: Alright, glowing mushrooms I can appreciate.
on.trans: 好吧，发光的蘑菇我倒是可以欣赏。

ready.en: It looks like it needs a large key.
ready.trans: 看起来它需要一把大钥匙。

generic.en: I wonder what it does.
generic.trans: 我想知道它有什么用。

firenettles.en: I have a feeling I shouldn't touch that.
firenettles.trans: 我有感觉我不应该碰这个。

shroombait.en: Who or what would want to eat that?
shroombait.trans: 什么人或者牲口会吃那东西？

scrap_monoclehat.en: It never hurts to view things from a wider angle.
scrap_monoclehat.trans: 以更广阔的视角看问题，永远不会错。

wilted.en: Its age is starting to show.
wilted.trans: 它的年龄已经开始显现。

oldlight.en: Oh no, did I forget to replace the bulb again?
oldlight.trans: 哦，不，我是不是又忘记换灯泡了？

burnt.en: That could have gone better.

generic.en: I make it a rule not to trust fancy tables I find in the wilderness.
generic.trans: 我的原则是不要相信在野外发现的花哨桌子。

empty.en: Someone forgot to put flowers in the vase. Maybe it was me...
empty.trans: 有人忘记在花瓶里放花了。也许是我……

supertacklecontainer.en: I could fit an entire bait shop in there.
supertacklecontainer.trans: 我可以在里面装下一个鱼饵店。

beequeenhivegrown.en: This is giving me a bad feeling...
beequeenhivegrown.trans: 这让我有一种不好的感觉……

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: It'll make me feel slightly safer at sea. Slightly.
boat_bumper_kelp_kit.trans: 这将使我在海上多一点安全感。只是一点。

beargerfur_sack.en: It can keep my perishables cold anywhere, anytime.
beargerfur_sack.trans: 它能随时随地冷藏我的易腐品。

papyrus.en: I should really write things down before I forget them...
papyrus.trans: 我真的应该在忘记之前把事情写下来……

shadowthrall_parasite.en: Wondered when you'd be showing up.
shadowthrall_parasite.trans: 我还在想你什么时候会出现呢。

chesspiece_dragonfly.en: A monument to a very trying day.
chesspiece_dragonfly.trans: 一个艰难的日子的纪念碑。

lavae_tooth.trans: 这让人感觉到隐隐约约的威胁。

moon_altar_idol.en: I think I know where it wants to go.
moon_altar_idol.trans: 我大概知道它想去哪里。

gestalt_guard_evolved.trans: 它们知道我们做了什么。

spicepack.en: I wonder if it makes time slow down, or if it's just well insulated.
spicepack.trans: 我想知道它是否会使时间变慢，还是说只是密封的比较好。

mask_kinghat.en: Something about it makes my skin crawl...
mask_kinghat.trans: 它的某些东西让我皮肤发痒……

comfy.en: I can almost imagine it smiling.
comfy.trans: 我几乎可以想象它在微笑。

cold.en: It's cooling off, I don't think that's good.
cold.trans: 它正在冷却，我不认为这是好事。

quagmire_tomato_cooked.en: Cooking's easy if you understand chemistry.
quagmire_tomato_cooked.trans: 懂化学的话做饭就非常简单了。

batwing_cooked.en: I don't know what flavor I expected, but it wasn't that.
batwing_cooked.trans: 我不知道我期待的是什么味道，但总之味不对。

generic.en: Just the extra bit of speed I've been looking for!
generic.trans: 这正是我一直在寻找的额外速度！

some_kelp.en: How much kelp do they need?

generic.en: Are they incapable of gathering their own kelp?
generic.trans: 没有能力自己采集海带吗？

dug_berrybush_juicy.en: It'll save me precious time if I bring this closer to camp.
dug_berrybush_juicy.trans: 如果我把这个带到营地附近，会节省我宝贵的时间。

burning.en: That's not good...

picked.en: And now it'll begin the painfully slow process of growing back.
picked.trans: 而现在它将开始痛苦而缓慢的生长过程。

withered.en: Nothing will grow in this heat.
withered.trans: 这么热的天气什么也生长不了。

generic.en: Grass. You do tend to find a lot of it outside.
generic.trans: 草。野外就是草多。

barren.en: I could probably find something to help speed up its growth.
barren.trans: 我也许可以找到一些东西来加速它的成长。

carnival_plaza_kit.en: I hope it doesn't take too long to grow.
carnival_plaza_kit.trans: 我希望它不需要太长的时间来生长。

barnaclinguine.en: That should keep me fed for a good while.
barnaclinguine.trans: 这应该能让我吃上好一阵子。

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: Ah, the "enlightened" merm kingdom timeline. We're doomed.
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 啊，“受启迪的”鱼人国度时间线。我们都要完了。

dead.en: Maybe this time it's for the best.
dead.trans: 也许这就是最好的结果了。

sleeping.en: Is it asleep, or...?

generic.en: Is that creature actually alive?!
generic.trans: 那个生物真的是活的吗？！

generic.en: Gardens need so much attention.
generic.trans: 种地太费精力了。

empty.en: What? How is it empty already?
empty.trans: 啥？怎么就干了？

boatrace_seastack.en: Botheration, these buoys are slowing me down!
boatrace_seastack.trans: 麻烦呐，这些浮标拖慢了我的速度！

valid.en: This thing sure takes up a lot of space.
valid.trans: 这东西确实占用了很大的空间。

gems.en: It needs THREE gems to work?!
gems.trans: 它需要三颗宝石才能工作？

charged.en: Yep, the lightning rod was a good idea.

generic.en: Just in case the sky starts getting any funny ideas.
generic.trans: 以防天空打起鬼主意。

head.en: Is it moving forwards or backwards?

body.en: I almost forgot how huge they are.
body.trans: 我差点忘掉它的个头有多巨大了。

boat_leak.en: I need to stop that leak, quickly!

monkey_smallhat.en: Oh, wearing it does make one feel rather mischievous...
monkey_smallhat.trans: 嗷，戴上以后好像确实有些恶作剧的冲动了……

wormhole_limited.en: I think I'd rather travel by my own means.
wormhole_limited.trans: 我还是用自己的方式旅行吧。

mutator_dropper.en: I don't think the poor child has a future in baking.
mutator_dropper.trans: 这可怜的孩子在烘焙方面应该不会有大发展。

eggplant_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
eggplant_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

winterhat.en: What a funny little fuzzy hat. Mind if I try it on?
winterhat.trans: 多么有趣的小毛线帽。介意我试戴一下吗？

vegstinger.en: A little something to sip on.

security_pulse_cage_full.en: Well, it's caught something. Now what?
security_pulse_cage_full.trans: 好吧，它抓住了一些东西。现在怎么办？

burning.en: We won't be meeting again.

reviving.en: No, no, no! Back down, you!
reviving.trans: 不 不 不！你退后一点！

generic.en: Took long enough!
generic.trans: 居然花了这么久！

smallmeat_dried.en: A bite of tough, dry meat.
