talleggs.en: Eggs and breakfast sausage efficiently rolled into one.
talleggs.trans: 鸡蛋和早餐香肠有效地卷为一体。

lichen.en: I'm not stopping to gawk at every plant I see!
lichen.trans: 我才不要走几步就停下来盯着植物看！

marsh_plant.en: I can't stop for every bit of greenery I see.
marsh_plant.trans: 我不能见到株绿色植物就掉下来看。

kitcoon_forest.en: Oh how adorable, and conveniently pocket-sized!
kitcoon_forest.trans: 哦，多么可爱，而且还是便携的口袋款！

boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.en: This could be troublesome, if deployed at exactly the right moment...
boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.trans: 部署时间得当的话，它可能会带来麻烦……

fishingrod.en: I don't know if I'm patient enough to be a fisherwoman...
fishingrod.trans: 我不知道我是否有足够的耐心成为一名渔妇……

book_tentacles.en: It's enough having to deal with them in person, why read about them too?
book_tentacles.trans: 亲自和它们打交道已经够麻烦了，为什么还要在书里读它们？

generic.en: I can't imagine being stuck in one place! Wait...
generic.trans: 我无法想象被困在一个地方！这……

burnt.en: Time waits for no mannequin.

lowpower.en: It's already losing steam? Clockwork is so much more reliable.
lowpower.trans: 这就没电了？还是发条可靠。

burning.en: I probably should have warned her that was going to happen.
burning.trans: 我也许应该警告她会这样。

generic.en: So this is one of those modern electrical thingies?
generic.trans: 那么这就是现代化电气设备？

burnt.en: I wonder how quickly she can build a new one...
burnt.trans: 我想知道她能以多快的速度建造一个新的……

off.en: Did the electricity run out? Where do you get more?
off.trans: 电用完了吗？去哪找电呢？

diseased.trans: 它看上去真的很不舒服。

generic.en: Jumpy little things, aren't they? That's probably wise.
generic.trans: 瞧瞧这些跳跃的小东西。这么跳着就挺好的。

sleeping.en: I can't bear to look at that creature!
sleeping.trans: 我简直无法直视再看那个生物！

generic.en: What a terrible sight!
generic.trans: 多么可怕的景象啊!

turf_fungus_moon.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_fungus_moon.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

shieldofterror.en: Oh, how alarming... but I'm not one to look a gift shield in the mouth.
shieldofterror.trans: 大家提高警惕……这口牙有些年头了。

beefalowool.en: The beefalo will grow it back.

turf_checkerfloor.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_checkerfloor.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

wx78module_cold.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_cold.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

sandblock.en: The sands of time are so fickle!
sandblock.trans: 时间之沙是如此的无常！

yellowstaff.en: Does no one else think summoning a small STAR might be dangerous?
yellowstaff.trans: 难道没有人认为召唤小星星可能会有危险吗？

stash_map.en: It looks like I'm not the only one who forgets where I put things.
stash_map.trans: 看来我不是唯一一个丢三落四的人。

line_1.en: I won't waste my time trying to decipher this gibberish.
line_1.trans: 我不会浪费我的时间去破译这些胡言乱语。

line_2.en: I'd go back and ask what it means, but this time period is a bit beyond my reach.
line_2.trans: 我想回去问问它是什么意思，但这个时间段有点超出我的能力范围。

line_5.en: I won't waste my time trying to decipher this gibberish.
line_5.trans: 我不会浪费我的时间去破译这些胡言乱语。

line_3.en: I won't waste my time trying to decipher this gibberish.
line_3.trans: 我不会浪费我的时间去破译这些胡言乱语。

line_4.en: I'd go back and ask what it means, but this time period is a bit beyond my reach.
line_4.trans: 我想回去问问它是什么意思，但这个时间段有点超出我的能力范围。

meat_dried.en: An old, tough piece of meat.

pig_coin.en: Oooh, I've never hired an assistant before.
pig_coin.trans: 哦，我以前从未请过助理。

generic.en: I suppose there's time to fashion a trinket or two.
generic.trans: 我可以抽时间可以制作一两件饰品。

burnt.en: Gone too soon.

empty.en: Well this helps me narrow down my temporal location.
empty.trans: 好吧，这帮助我缩小了我的时空位置。

eyebrellahat.en: I don't like having eyes on me...
eyebrellahat.trans: 我不喜欢有眼睛盯着我……

playing_hideandseek.en: Did I find them all? I think there are some still hiding.
playing_hideandseek.trans: 我把它们都找到了吗？应该有一些还藏着呢。

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: Ugh, where are they? I'm running out of time!
playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 呃，他们在哪里？我快没时间了！

burnt.en: Well, that's that.

generic.en: What a charming little house.
generic.trans: 多么有魅力的小房子啊。

oceanfishableflotsam.en: There might be something interesting hiding in all that mud.
oceanfishableflotsam.trans: 那些泥巴里可能藏着有趣的东西。

knight_nightmare.en: I... I don't want to look at it.

carnival_crowkid.en: Look at them, so full of youthful vitality!
carnival_crowkid.trans: 看看他们，充满了青春的活力!

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: Surely someone with more time on their hands could set it up.

berries.en: These will keep me going a while longer.
berries.trans: 这些够我吃一段时间了。

turf_ruinstrim.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_ruinstrim.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

moonbutterflywings.en: It's not like moths live very long anyway.
moonbutterflywings.trans: 反正飞蛾的寿命也不长。

gelblob_bottle.en: What should we do with this?
gelblob_bottle.trans: 我们可以拿这个东西做什么？

burnt.en: There's no reversing that.

generic.en: I wonder what assortment of knickknacks I can craft here.
generic.trans: 我在这能做出点什么小玩意呢？

empty.en: It looks to be in dire need of charcoal.
empty.trans: 它看起来急需木炭。

dead.en: It's down... for the time being.

generic.en: Oh botheration, not you...
generic.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。你可别……

quagmire_key.en: Safe bet this'll come in handy.
quagmire_key.trans: 我敢肯定，它会派上用场的。

dead.en: Just give me a moment to catch my breath...

generic.en: I'm already at the dizzy age, all that spinning is just making it worse!
generic.trans: 我已经到了会头晕目眩的年纪，旋转让它变得更糟了！

home.trans: 我无意中进入了某人的家。

lightsout.en: You horrible pigs! You could at least leave your lights on!
lightsout.trans: 你们这些可怕的猪！你至少可以把灯开着吧！

burnt.en: Gone in an instant.

generic.en: All this time and not once have I been invited in.
generic.trans: 这么久以来，一次都没有邀请我。

full.en: They're awfully snobbish for a bunch of pigs.
full.trans: 一群猪居然都这么势利。

drying.en: I'll be old and grey before it's done...
drying.trans: 等它做好了，我头发都要白了……

done_notmeat.en: I think it's been aged enough.
done_notmeat.trans: 我觉得它陈化的时间已经够长了。

done.trans: 完成了！ 终于完成了！！

generic.en: A horribly time consuming way to make meat last longer.
generic.trans: 一个可怕的耗费时间的方法，只是为了让肉能放更久。

burnt.en: I spent so much time on that!!
burnt.trans: 我花了这么多时间在那上面！

tomato_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
tomato_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

alterguardian_phase3.trans: 第三次就会是你的幸运咒！

kitcoon_grass.trans: 烦死了，他们的可爱真让人分心！

moon_altar_link.en: Can you feel that crackle of possibility in the air?
moon_altar_link.trans: 你能感觉到空气中噼啪作响的无限可能吗？

yoth_knightstick.en: If galloping saves me time, then call me Nellie.
yoth_knightstick.trans: 要是飞奔能省时间，那我干脆改个名马的名字叫奈利吧。

marblebean_sapling.en: Are you supposed to water marble to make it grow?
marblebean_sapling.trans: 给大理石浇水它会长大么？

catcoon.en: I don't have time to play with you.

ghostlyelixir_fastregen.en: A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.
ghostlyelixir_fastregen.trans: 一点点玄学上的干预不会伤害任何人。

relic.en: People back then weren't all that different from us.
relic.trans: 那时的人与我们没有什么不同。

yellowmooneye.en: Knowing where everyone is saves me a lot of time.
yellowmooneye.trans: 知道每个人的位置可以为我节省很多时间。

held.en: I should use it at nightfall.

generic.en: There's something calming about it.
generic.trans: 它有种让人冷静下来的感觉。

statuemaxwell.en: "Someone" had far too much time on his hands...

armorwagpunk.en: You can always rely on clockwork.

rope_bridge_kit.en: Looks rather shoddy but it beats taking the long way around.
rope_bridge_kit.trans: 看起来很简陋，但总比绕很远的路要好。

dragonfruit.en: Not even close to the weirdest thing I've eaten around here.
dragonfruit.trans: 与我在这里吃过的最奇怪的东西相比，还差得远着呢。

lavaarena_boarlord.en: That's the guy in charge here.

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.en: Wait a tick... did they always look like that?
bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.trans: 等等……他们一直都长这样吗？

polly_rogershat.en: What an eccentric design... I must have it.
polly_rogershat.trans: 多么古怪的设计……我必须拥有它。

stinger.en: A bee sting that almost was.

wagpunkhat.en: I'd love to take it apart and see how it ticks.
wagpunkhat.trans: 我很想把它拆开，看看它是怎么运转的。

hermithouse_laundry.en: When's the last time I did laundry?
hermithouse_laundry.trans: 我上次洗衣服是什么时候？

generic.en: It seems to be locked onto a very particular temporal wavelength.
generic.trans: 它似乎被锁定在一个非常特殊的时间波长上。

poweroff.en: It looks like it needs a good winding.
poweroff.trans: 看起来它需要好好上一下发条。

generic.en: How delightfully odd!
generic.trans: 古怪而令人愉快！

lunarrift_crystal.en: Some kind of temporal residue, perhaps?
lunarrift_crystal.trans: 也许是某种时空残留物？

steelwool.en: Some things are taken very literally around here.
steelwool.trans: 在这里，有些事情真的是按字面理解的。

waiting.en: I think his time might've run out...
waiting.trans: 我想他的时间可能已经用完了……

generic.en: Who would leave a fishbowl in a cave? I hope it wasn't me...
generic.trans: 谁会把鱼缸留在洞穴里？希望不是我……

oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.en: I knew I'd find a use for that feather eventually!
oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.trans: 我知道我终会为那根羽毛找到用途!

red_cap_cooked.en: This seems like a bad idea.

ancienttree_seed.en: Maybe I could skip ahead and take a peek at what it grows into...
ancienttree_seed.trans: 也许我可以跳过它去看将来会长成什么样子……

maxwellhead.en: I can see into his pores.

dreadstonehat.en: That stone turned out to be rather useful.
dreadstonehat.trans: 那块石头看来还是挺有用的。

accomplishment_shrine.en: I want to use it, and I want the world to know that I did.
accomplishment_shrine.trans: 我想用一下它，我想让全世界都知道我的所作所为。

bell.en: What's the worst that could happen?
bell.trans: 可能发生的最坏情况是什么？

californiaroll.en: Would this be the official dish of California, then?
californiaroll.trans: 那么，这就是加州的地方菜吗？

armorslurper.en: I guess I'll swallow my pride and wear it...

quagmire_rotten_crop.en: I don't think the altar will want that.
quagmire_rotten_crop.trans: 我认为这个不适合出现在祭坛上。

yotb.en: Where's that peculiar judge? He might have an appreciation for this.
yotb.trans: 那个古怪的裁判在哪里？他应该会喜欢这个。

generic.en: I love a nice memento, they help me keep track of when I am.
generic.trans: 我喜欢漂亮的纪念品，能帮助我找到身处何时。

houndmound.en: Ugh, a dwelling made of old bones!
houndmound.trans: 呃，一堆枯骨搭成的住所！

seeds_cooked.en: I don't know why I bothered cooking them.
seeds_cooked.trans: 我不知道我为什么要费心去烹饪它们。

boneshard.en: Whatever these bones belonged to is lost to time.
boneshard.trans: 这些骨头的主人已经在时光中消失。

candybag.en: It holds more than I expected, as if it's bigger on the inside...
candybag.trans: 它的容量比我想象的要大，莫非里面别有乾坤……

mutatedbearger.en: It's even worse the second time around.

hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.en: Hm. For a quick cool down.

book_fish.en: Fishing is already time-consuming enough, I'm not reading a book too!
book_fish.trans: 钓鱼已经足够耗时了，我不想再看钓鱼的书了！

dragonchilisalad.en: Warly always finds such unique combinations.
dragonchilisalad.trans: 沃利总是能找到如此独特的组合。

monstermeat.en: If I ever want to poison myself with rancid meat, I'll be sure to try it.
monstermeat.trans: 如果有一天我想用馊肉毒死自己，那我一定会试吃它。

turnip_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
turnip_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

low.trans: 那块熔岩正在裹上石皮。

generic.en: A crusted over lava pit.
generic.trans: 裹了石皮的熔岩坑。

scandata.en: It's of no use to me, I won't waste time reading it.
scandata.trans: 对我一点用都没用，我才不要浪费时间读它。

batnose.en: That should teach it not to stick its nose where it doesn't belong!
batnose.trans: 这应该教会它不要把它的鼻子伸到不属于它的地方！

wagstaff_tool_2.en: Is it a temporal projection? Planar? I wish he'd answer my questions!
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 它是一个时空投影吗？位面的？我希望他能回答我的问题！

wagstaff_tool_3.en: Maybe I could take a peek at his notes... oh botheration, it won't open!
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 也许我可以偷看一下他的笔记……嗷，麻烦呐，打不开啊！

armor_sanity.en: Shadow magic is just a tool after all, I can use it to my advantage.
armor_sanity.trans: 说到底暗影魔法也只是一种工具，我可以利用它来创造优势。

wagstaff_tool_4.en: That must be one of the tools he's looking for.
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 这一定是他正在寻找的工具之一。

wagstaff_tool_5.en: Maybe if I return his tools he'll be more inclined to speak with me.
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 要是我把他的工具还给他，没准他就会跟我开口了。

dead.en: Why must life be so fleeting for some?
dead.trans: 为什么生命对某些人来说必须如此短暂？

generic.en: I like anything that can make its own light.
generic.trans: 我喜欢任何可以自己发光的东西。

wx78module_maxhealth2.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

slingshotammo_stinger.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_stinger.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

steeringwheel_item.en: I hope I don't forget to add that to the boat.
steeringwheel_item.trans: 千万别忘了把它安到船上。

book_fire.en: No time to read, we're burning daylight!
book_fire.trans: 没时间看书，我们在烧掉大好时光！

wall_stone.en: It's not going anywhere anytime soon.

cactus_flower.en: I'm not stopping to smell it.
cactus_flower.trans: 我不会停下脚步去闻它。

torch.en: It'll keep the darkness at bay. For a time, at least.
torch.trans: 起码能帮我驱离一段时间的黑暗。

fishmeat_small_cooked.en: I don't know why I took the time to cook something so small.
fishmeat_small_cooked.trans: 我不知道我为什么要花时间去做这么小的东西。

goose_feather.en: I'm sure I'll find a use for it sooner or later.
goose_feather.trans: 我相信我迟早会找到它的用途。

generic.en: I believe in my time, we called that a chair.
generic.trans:
我们那会儿管那东西
叫椅子。

glassblock.en: Nothing is permanent, eventually it might be sand again.
glassblock.trans: 没有什么是永恒的，它最终可能又变回沙子。

generic.en: Hm.
generic.trans: 嗯。

chesspiece_sharkboi.en: How could I forget this ruffian?
chesspiece_sharkboi.trans: 我怎么会忘记这个无赖呢？

armor_lunarplant_husk.en: It kills while it protects. Rather efficient.
armor_lunarplant_husk.trans: 它在保护的同时也杀戮。着实有效。

moonrockseed.trans: 这就像一个口袋版的月亮。

cutlichen.en: Its time is running out quickly.
cutlichen.trans: 它的时间正在迅速流逝。

snowball.en: Must admit I have a few ideas for this one.
snowball.trans: 不得不承认，我对这个有一些想法。

generic.en: Child's play. Not bad, though.
generic.trans: 小孩子的把戏。不过还不错。

generic.en: Pfft. I could just check the weather myself if I felt like it.
generic.trans: 噗。如果我想的话，我可以自己去未来看天气。

burnt.en: Maybe that was meant to happen.
burnt.trans: 也许那是注定要发生的。

frozenbananadaiquiri.en: I'll be done with it in no time.
frozenbananadaiquiri.trans: 我用不了多久就给它消灭了。

lavaarena_armormedium.en: It offers a decent amount of protection.

beefalofeed.en: Did I remember to feed my beefalo today?
beefalofeed.trans: 我今天喂过我的皮弗娄牛了吗？

spiderhat.en: A lovely reminder of that time I was almost eaten by a giant spider.
spiderhat.trans: 让我想起了我差点被一只大蜘蛛吃掉的意外。

lunarthrall_plant_vine_end.trans: 把你的藤蔓留给你自己！

chum.en: It's only fair to feed the fish before they feed me.
chum.trans: 在鱼喂我之前，我先喂鱼才是公平的。

nightcaphat.en: This is no time for a nap!
nightcaphat.trans: 现在不是睡午觉的时候！

burning.en: That's not good...

picked.en: Now begins the painfully slow process of growing back.
picked.trans: 痛苦而缓慢的恢复生长过程开始了。

withered.en: It won't survive long in this heat.
withered.trans: 它在这种高温下不会存活太久。

generic.en: For some reason, these ones don't seem to grow any bigger.
generic.trans: 出于某种原因，这些似乎没有再长大了。

punchingbag.en: I could spare a moment to test my weapons... and let off some steam.
punchingbag.trans: 我可以腾出时间来测试我的武器……顺带也发泄一下。

hermitcrabtea_firenettles.en: It'll keep the chill out of my bones.
hermitcrabtea_firenettles.trans: 它能驱散我骨子里的寒意。

carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.en: I couldn't help it, I looked ahead and took a peek...
carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.trans: 我忍不住了，往前看了一眼，偷看了一下……

turf_fungus_red.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_fungus_red.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

lavaarena_eyecirclethat.en: It has a gaze full of science.

voidcloth_umbrella.en: At least it will keep me dry.

seafoodgumbo.en: Again... is leaving the bones in really necessary?
seafoodgumbo.trans: 再说一遍……真得有必要在里面留下骨头么？

costume_mirror_body.en: Something about that costume doesn't sit right with me.
costume_mirror_body.trans: 那套服装有些地方让我觉得不对劲。

sweatervest.en: It looks like something a pretentious old professor might wear.
sweatervest.trans: 它看起来像一个自命不凡的老教授会穿的东西。

almost_done_cooking.en: It has to be almost done by now!

cooking.en: Why must cooking take so much time?
cooking.trans: 为什么做饭这么费时间？

generic.en: Oh, don't tell me I'm the one who has to cook...
generic.trans: 哎呀，别跟我说让我做饭……

generic.en: Well that's not alarming at all.
generic.trans: 呵，那个还真让人放松警惕啊。

burnt.en: It somehow managed to become even more dead.
burnt.trans: 没想到它还能死的更透一些。

firecrackers.en: Just in case things around here weren't already exciting enough.
firecrackers.trans: 以防这里的事情不够刺激。

halloweenpotion_drinks_potent.en: I can feel the potential radiating out of it.
halloweenpotion_drinks_potent.trans: 我能感受到它所散发出来的潜力。

generic.en: I wonder what trinkets it has to offer?
generic.trans: 不知道它能给点什么小饰品？

burnt.en: That's an unfortunate turn of events.

empty.en: That rabbit looks rather peckish.
empty.trans: 那只兔子看起来很饿。

moonstorm_static_roamer.trans: 要不要驾驭一下那股能量？

horn.en: It belonged to a beefalo in the past.
horn.trans: 它从前属于一头皮弗娄牛。

s.en: South. That's "down" on the map, right?
s.trans: 南方。就是地图的 “下”，对吗？

sw.en: Southwest. Or not, who really knows?
sw.trans: 西南，也许又不是，谁知道呢？

n.en: North. That's "up" on the map, right?
n.trans: 北方。就是地图的 “上”，对吗？

generic.en: If only it could tell me which way is past and which way is future.
generic.trans: 如果它能告诉我哪里是过去，哪里是未来就好了。

oceanfishingbobber_none.en: Oh, I've lost my bobber! Or maybe I didn't attach it yet...
oceanfishingbobber_none.trans: 我弄丢浮漂了！也可能是我还没连上……

tophat_magician.en: A bit drab for my tastes.
tophat_magician.trans: 就我的口味而言，有些单调了。

lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.en: I'd have energy for a few more stunts wearing that.
lavaarena_armormediumrecharger.trans: 穿上它，我就有能量多耍几招。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.en: If it will help me catch a fish faster, I'm all for it.
oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.trans: 如果能帮我更快抓到鱼，那我愿意试。

farm_plow_item.en: Might as well get this started.

livingtree_sapling.trans: 它开始看起来有点愉快了。

battlesong_lunaraligned.en: Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you?
battlesong_lunaraligned.trans: 哦，你不会是想听我唱歌吧？

corn_oversized.en: I never thought corn could be so colorful.
corn_oversized.trans: 我从未想过玉米可以如此丰富多彩。

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: A sure way to gather my wits.

oceanvine.trans: 一根藤蔓。不太值得一提。

charging.trans: 薇诺娜现在已经过上未来的生活了。

charged.trans: 薇诺娜现在已经过上未来的生活了。

generic.en: Winona's living in the future.
generic.trans: 薇诺娜现在已经过上未来的生活了。

wall_scrap.trans: 希望它能维持我们的安全。

pumpkin_lantern.en: It's honestly one of the least spooky things around here.
pumpkin_lantern.trans: 说实话，在这，这个一点都不吓人。

lavaarena_healingflowerhat.en: The blossom interacts well with healing magic.
lavaarena_healingflowerhat.trans: 这花朵和治愈魔法很合拍。

dumbbell_golden.en: What a dreadfully repetitive way to spend one's time.
dumbbell_golden.trans: 反复做同一件事来打发时间简直可怕。

shellweaver.en: So much to make, and so little time!
shellweaver.trans: 想做的东西太多，时间却太少！

inactive.en: Hmm. I remembered it being taller...
inactive.trans: 嗯。我记得它是比较高的……

active.en: What? I could have sworn it was shorter...
active.trans: 什么？我发誓它刚刚很矮……

merm.en: You run along now, pay me no mind.

slingshotammo_horrorfuel.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_horrorfuel.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

batwing.trans: 这将使那些蝙蝠得到教训。

oceanfishingrod.en: I really don't care for fishing.

balloonhat.en: Ha, I'd look ridiculous in that! Let me try it on.
balloonhat.trans: 哈，我穿上它会显得很滑稽！让我试试。

generic.en: There's something about it...
generic.trans: 它有点……

activated.trans: 是的，它们遵循某种规律……

rock_avocado_fruit_sprout.en: There's a new little life forming.
rock_avocado_fruit_sprout.trans: 有一个新的小生命正在形成。

carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 看着看着就被它催眠了。

portablefirepit_item.en: That Walter is a clever little fellow.
portablefirepit_item.trans: 那沃尔特真是个聪明的小家伙。

backpack.en: I could always use the extra pocket space.
backpack.trans: 能多装点东西总是好的。

bird_egg_cooked.en: Whenever I make eggs they end up either undercooked or burnt.
bird_egg_cooked.trans: 每当我做蛋时，它们最终不是没熟就是烧焦了。

generic.en: Not a statue!!
generic.trans: 不是雕像！！

fence.trans: 一道异常普通的木栅栏。

pumpkin.en: A pumpkin that size should keep me fed for a while.
pumpkin.trans: 这么大的南瓜应该能让我吃上一段时间了。

chesspiece_formal.en: Looks like he lost his head too.

wx78module_maxsanity1.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_maxsanity1.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

durian.en: I could never forget a smell like that.
durian.trans: 我永远无法忘记这样的气味。

hambat.en: Well, the pig had it coming.

pumpkin_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
pumpkin_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

slingshot_band_mimic.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

festive_blueprint.en: This outfit's louder than a chiming grandfather clock.
festive_blueprint.trans: 这套衣服的声音比老爷钟的报时声还大。

reskin_tool.en: It reveals the various possibilities across timelines.
reskin_tool.trans: 它揭示了跨时间线的各种可能性。

burning.en: Maybe that was supposed to happen.

diseased.en: It looks sick. More so than usual.
diseased.trans: 它看起来很糟糕。比平常还严重。

chopped.en: Its time in this world was cut short.
chopped.trans: 它在这个世界上的时间被缩短了。

generic.en: It's barely a tree, more like a sad collection of sticks.
generic.trans: 几乎不能算树，更像是一捆可悲的棍子。

burnt.en: Well, what's done is done. For now anyway.
burnt.trans: 哎，也只能接受发生的事情了。现在只好如此。

book_silviculture.en: Say Wickerbottom, do you dabble in temporal magic as well?
book_silviculture.trans: 薇克巴顿，你也会玩时空魔法吗？

berries_juicy_cooked.en: That turned out better than I expected.

mashedpotatoes.en: "Potato purée" is so much more fun to say than "mashed potatoes".
mashedpotatoes.trans: “土豆泥”听起来比“土豆糊”有趣多了。

cool.en: I think it's safe to touch. But why would I want to?
cool.trans: 摸起来应该是安全的。可我为什么要摸呢？

turf_archive.en: Slightly more interesting to look at, but still just ground.
turf_archive.trans: 虽然看着有意思一点，但终究就是土地。

hotchili.en: Hoooo... I always forget just how spicy it is.
hotchili.trans: 呼呼呼……我总是忘记它有多辣。

exposed.en: Oh botheration. I think I just remembered something...
exposed.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我好像突然想起来了……

generic.en: They seem breakable... but I don't think that'd be wise.
generic.trans: 似乎能被破坏……但我认为那么做不明智。

webberskull.en: Poor little guy. He deserves a proper funeral.
webberskull.trans: 可怜的小家伙。应该为他举办一个体面的葬礼。

lavaarena_feathercrownhat.en: Those fluffy feathers make me want to run!
lavaarena_feathercrownhat.trans: 我一看见那些蓬松的羽毛就想跑！

turf_forest.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_forest.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

krampus.en: He really puts a damper on this time of year.
krampus.trans: 他为这个季节带来了不悦。

nature_blueprint.en: A pretty garden-variety outfit, wouldn't you say?
nature_blueprint.trans: 很稀松平常的外衣，对不对？

stalagmite_tall.en: Wow, amazing. Let's keep moving shall we?
stalagmite_tall.trans: 哇，太神奇了。我们继续前进，好吗？

chesspiece_antlion.en: Right. That time I was almost impaled by spikes.
chesspiece_antlion.trans: 对。那次我差点被钉子刺伤。

shadowdancer.en: That's a sight I won't soon forget.
shadowdancer.trans: 我不会很快忘记那一幕。

lunar_seed.en: I forget if this is the end or the beginning.
lunar_seed.trans: 我记不清这是终点还是起点。

beeguard.en: If only I had a little army that would protect me this fiercely!
beeguard.trans: 如果我有一支能如此勇猛地保护我的小军队就好了。

burnt.en: Well, that's decidedly unfunctional.
burnt.trans: 好吧，这一准发挥不了功能了。

generic.en: I like my furniture simple and functional.
generic.trans: 我喜欢简单和有功能性的家具。

wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.en: I feel a bit reassured knowing it's nearby.
wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.trans: 知道它在附近，我就放心了。

blowdart_lava2.en: It uses a strong blast of air to propel a projectile.
blowdart_lava2.trans: 它利用一股强气流来推动抛射物。

plantregistryhat.en: What a funny little hat. Let me try!
plantregistryhat.trans: 多么有趣的小帽子。让我试试！

generic.en: Only one ticket?
generic.trans: 只有一张奖票？

held.en: It's a bit cluttered in my pockets, please try not to get squished!
held.trans: 我的口袋里有点杂乱，请尽量不要被压坏！

generic.en: It's simply not fair that they live such brief lives.
generic.trans: 它们的生命如此短暂，太不公平了。

generic.en: Time has taken its toll on this house.
generic.trans: 时间对这所房子造成了损毁。

burnt.en: One moment it's there, the next it's gone.
burnt.trans: 前一刻还在，后一刻就不见了。

costume_doll_body.en: What's this? An oversized doll's dress?
costume_doll_body.trans: 这是什么？大号玩偶的连衣裙吗？

ready.en: Did you hear that? It's like there's something scratching inside...
ready.trans: 你听到了吗？好像有什么东西在里面抓挠……

covered.en: I'm not sure what to make of it.

finished.en: It took me ages to put you together, at least look pleased about it!
finished.trans: 我花了好长时间才把你拼好，你起码该给我个好脸看吧！

oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.en: I don't fancy catching my death of cold for a fish.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.trans: 我可不想为了一条鱼活活冻死。

nightstick.en: A light up weapon? What will they think of next!
nightstick.trans: 一个点燃的武器？他们接下来会想到什么！

boatrace_spectator_dragonling.en: You could always stop staring and help me paddle.
boatrace_spectator_dragonling.trans: 盯着我看累了的话，可以过来帮忙划划桨。

generic.en: Whatever was written here has been lost to time.
generic.trans: 无论这里曾写过什么，都在时间长河中消失了。

turf_rocky.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_rocky.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

horrorfuel.en: It gives me a terrible feeling...
horrorfuel.trans: 它给我一种恐怖的感觉。

generic.en: Don't go causing any tornadoes!
generic.trans: 别去引起龙卷风！

generic.en: It will only accept pine cones, apparently.
generic.trans: 显然，它只接受松果。

burnt.en: That puts a damper on the festivities.

turf_shellbeach.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_shellbeach.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

turf_underrock.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_underrock.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

quagmire_rubble_chimney2.en: Something put a damper on that chimney.

oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.en: If it will help me catch a fish faster, I'm all for it.
oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.trans: 如果能帮我更快抓到鱼，那我愿意试。

quagmire_sap_spoiled.en: Might as well toss it on the fire.

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: What an unpleasant subject for a statue.
chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.trans: 多么令人不快的雕塑主题。

slingshotammo_container.en: Stockpiling for the future. Good boy!

vault_chandelier_broken.en: I'm surprised it stayed up that long in the first place.
vault_chandelier_broken.trans: 真没想到它居然能撑那么久。

chesspiece_depthworm.en: And I just managed to forget you.

moon_altar_ward.en: It feels like wheels have been set in motion...

slingshotammo_dreadstone.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_dreadstone.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

ancienttree_sapling_item.en: Now, if I could only remember what type of soil it likes...
ancienttree_sapling_item.trans: 要是我能记起它喜欢哪种土壤就好了……

uncovered.en: Either the sculptor forgot something, or a piece has been removed.
uncovered.trans: 要么是雕塑家忘记了，要么是有一块雕塑被移走了。

ready.en: Did you hear that? It's like there's something scratching inside...
ready.trans: 你听到了吗？好像有什么东西在里面抓挠……

covered.en: Strange... I don't think it's as old as it looks.
covered.trans: 奇怪……我认为并没有看起来那么老。

finished.en: I can't believe I spent so much time on reuniting a couple pieces of marble.
finished.trans: 我真不敢相信我花了这么多时间在重新组合几块大理石上。

rock_avocado_fruit.en: That looks like a quick way to chip a tooth.
rock_avocado_fruit.trans: 那个一下就会把牙崩下来。

dragonfruit_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
dragonfruit_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

locked.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！你快自己打开吧！

generic.en: A shell this enormous must have something interesting inside.
generic.trans: 这么大的一个贝壳，里面一定有很有趣的东西。

rottenegg.en: It must've been the last one out.
rottenegg.trans: 它一定是最后一个出来的。

critter_lamb.en: Ohhhh look at that wrinkly little face!
critter_lamb.trans: 看看那张皱巴巴的小脸！

snurtle.en: It's just as slow as the other kind.

oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.en: Is it poisoned? Should I really be poisoning my dinner?
oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.trans: 它是有毒的吗？我真要为自己的晚餐下毒吗？

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: The air around it is still crackling with potential.
alterguardian_phase3deadorb.trans: 它周围的空气仍在噼啪作响，充满潜力。

wormlight_plant.en: Something's nagging at my memory... ah, it's probably nothing.
wormlight_plant.trans: 有什么东西在我脑海里絮叨……啊，应该没事。

burning.en: The stone will fall any time now.

generic.en: Looks like a quick job.
generic.trans: 看起来很快就能搞定。

oceanwhirlportal.en: If it's the quickest way out of here, I suppose I can't be picky.
oceanwhirlportal.trans: 如果它能让我迅速离开，那我也没什么好挑的了。

stalker_atrium.en: This was a VERY bad idea.
stalker_atrium.trans: 这是个非常糟糕的主意。

bishop.en: What an irresponsible use of clockwork!
bishop.trans: 这是对发条不负责任的使用！

oldlight.en: I swear I just replaced this.

generic.en: Beautiful.
generic.trans: 漂亮。

empty.en: I thought I just replaced these. Or was that later?
empty.trans: 我明明刚刚换过这些的。还是说我过会儿才会换？

ice.en: A frozen chunk of future water.

generic.en: Oh botheration, I think I just remembered something...
generic.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我刚刚想起个事……

figkabab.en: No plates, no cutlery, no fuss!
figkabab.trans: 没有盘子，没有餐具，没有那些繁文缛节！

shadow_battleaxe.en: That will fell a tree in no time.
shadow_battleaxe.trans: 瞬间就可以砍下一棵树。

generic.en: I love a good knickknack, and a musical one at that!
generic.trans: 我喜欢好的小饰品，特别是音乐性的小饰品！

onion_cooked.en: I love the smell of cooked onion.

generic.en: I think that would fit nicely in my pocket.
generic.trans: 那个应该很适合放在我的口袋里。

generic.en: What a nice little shell! I wish I had somewhere to display it.
generic.trans: 多么漂亮的小贝壳啊！我希望我有地方可以展示它。

yotd_steeringwheel.en: I certainly hope all this gold doesn't weigh down the boat.
yotd_steeringwheel.trans: 这些黄金可别把船给压沉喽。

wobster_sheller.en: I'm sensing a pot of boiling water in your future.
wobster_sheller.trans: 我预感到你的未来有一锅沸腾的水。

turf_woodfloor.en: I missed the comforting creak of floorboards beneath my feet.
turf_woodfloor.trans: 我想念脚下木地板发出的舒适的吱吱声。

burning.en: I guess that's just the way of things sometimes.

chopped.en: No sense waiting around for it to grow back.
chopped.trans: 没必要干等它重新长回来。

generic.en: It looks like it's already gone grey.
generic.trans: 已经灰掉了。

burnt.en: That's the end for this tree.

slurtlehat.en: As long as it protects me, I don't care what it looks like.
slurtlehat.trans: 只要能保护我，我才不管它是什么样子。

seeds.en: Future plants, or a present snack.
seeds.trans: 未来的植物，现在的零食。

pig_token.en: Quite a fancy gold buckled belt for a pig!

carnivaldecor_banner_kit.en: Oh, I suppose I have a moment or two to spare.
carnivaldecor_banner_kit.trans: 我倒是可以空出一点时间来。

broken.en: It's plain to see it's broken.

generic.en: A shame it's not portable.
generic.trans: 可惜没做成便携的。

picked.en: I don't think it's growing back.

generic.en: Are those mushrooms? I'm stumped.
generic.trans: 那些是蘑菇吗？这真是一桩难题。

imprisoned.en: I shouldn't involve myself in these things.
imprisoned.trans: 我可不能参与到那些事情里去。

generic.en: I knew I shouldn't have involved myself!
generic.trans: 我早就知道不该参与进来的！

generic.en: I still haven't figured out who made this...
generic.trans: 我仍然没有弄清楚这是谁做的……

empty.en: It seemed like a good idea at the time.
empty.trans: 这在当时似乎是个好主意。

deserthat.en: It's no good against the sands of time, unfortunately.
deserthat.trans: 不幸的是，它对时间的流沙并没有作用。

valid.en: Oh good, we got the lights working.
valid.trans: 哦，太好了，我们把灯弄好了。

mastupgrade_lamp_item.en: I feel a little better now.

armorgrass.en: Isn't there anything a bit more sturdy?
armorgrass.trans: 难道就没有更结实的东西吗？

gestalt_guard.en: They're not too interested in talking.
gestalt_guard.trans: 他们对谈话没有太大兴趣。

off.en: I don't know if I want those lights to turn on...
off.trans: 我不知道要不要打开这些灯……

dragonboat_kit.en: Time is wasting. We'd better get to it.
dragonboat_kit.trans: 时间在消逝。快行动起来。

yoth_chair_rocking_item.en: Riding a horse that goes nowhere? And yet...
yoth_chair_rocking_item.trans: 骑一匹哪儿也去不了的马？不过……

ghost.en: Give me a moment, you'll be yodeling... or whatever it is, again in no time!
ghost.trans: 给我一点时间，你很快就能再唱约德尔山歌了！

firestarter.en: Why does this always seem to happen...
firestarter.trans: 为什么总会发生这种事……

murderer.en: You're not taking MY soul to Val-whatever-you-call-it!
murderer.trans: 我是不会把我的灵魂让你交到英什么殿的！

attacker.en: It was only a matter of time until she turned her spear against us.
attacker.trans: 她把矛头转向我们只是时间问题。

reviver.en: I think I'm quite glad to have you around after all, %s.
reviver.trans: 我很高兴有你在身边，%s。

generic.en: Nice to see you again %s, but I'm afraid I can't stay long.
generic.trans: 很高兴再见到你，%s，不过恐怕我不能跟你待太久。

pickaxe.en: The quickest way to break stone.

mast.en: That's the part that holds the sail.
mast.trans: 那个部分的作用是固定风帆。

antliontrinket.en: This might make a good gift for someone.
antliontrinket.trans: 这可能是送给某人的一份好礼物。

match_but_snack.en: It's more of a light snack, really.

match.en: Science says this will appease the sky God.
match.trans: 科学说这样会安抚天空之神。

generic.en: I should offer it on the Altar of Gnaw.
generic.trans: 我应该把它献祭在饕餮祭坛上。

generic.en: It's... not exactly the nicest rug I've ever seen.
generic.trans: 我见过比它……好看的地毯。

burnt.en: It looks like the monarchy came to an abrupt end.
burnt.trans: 看起来君主制戛然而止了。

flower_cave.en: I don't have time to stop and smell the flowers.
flower_cave.trans: 我没有时间停下来闻花香。

cooking_short.en: It has to be almost done by now, right?
cooking_short.trans: 现在应该差不多完成了，对吗？

cooking_long.en: This is why I hate cooking. Cooking takes forever!
cooking_long.trans: 这就是为什么我讨厌烹饪。烹饪要花很长时间！

burnt.en: Well that's a setback.

empty.en: I guess I'll just... find some seeds to eat or something.
empty.trans: 我想我就……找些种子或其他东西吃吧。

costume_queen_body.en: It looks like it could belong to a Queen.

mermguard_lunar.en: Did they always look like that?

armordreadstone.en: It should keep me well protected, at least.
armordreadstone.trans: 起码应该能保护我一下。

chesspiece_malbatross.en: Why are there so many unpleasant statues?
chesspiece_malbatross.trans: 为什么会有这么多令人不快的雕像？

yotb_sewingmachine_item.trans: 真倒霉，并没有提前组装好。

onion_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
onion_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

burning.en: All that time and energy... wasted...
burning.trans: 所有的时间和精力……都浪费了……

full_weed.en: Wait a tick, I don't think I meant to plant that!
full_weed.trans: 等一下，我好像不是要种那个！

full_oversized.en: I guess patience does pay off sometimes.
full_oversized.trans: 看来耐心有时确实会得到回报。

rotten_oversized.en: Botheration! Time has gotten its claws into it!
rotten_oversized.trans: 麻烦呐！时间已经把爪子伸进去了！

rotten.en: Ack! I misjudged its position on the timeline!
rotten.trans: 咳！我误判了它在时间线上的位置！

generic.en: A plant.
generic.trans: 一株植物。

ancientfruit_gem.en: I'd rather not break my teeth on that, thank you.
ancientfruit_gem.trans: 我可不想咬掉牙，谢谢你。

berries_juicy.en: Their time is fleeting, and they taste all the sweeter for it.
berries_juicy.trans: 它们的时间转瞬即逝，味道也因此更加甜美。

held.en: Alright, I'm holding a bird... carefully holding a bird...
held.trans: 我手里有只鸟……我在小心翼翼捧着这只鸟……

generic.en: Some kind of yellow bird.
generic.trans: 某种黄色的鸟。

armorruins.en: I'm all for anything that'll keep me safe.
armorruins.trans: 只要能保我平安，我都会支持。

generic.en: It's trying to drain the life right out of me!
generic.trans: 它想把我的生命榨干！

somehoney.en: Why does honey take so long to make?

burnt.en: It looks like its honey making days are behind it.
burnt.trans: 看起来它制造蜂蜜的日子已经过去。

generic.en: I thought I heard some buzzing coming from over here.
generic.trans: 我听到一些嗡嗡声从这里传来。

nohoney.en: Not even a drop of honey inside.
nohoney.trans: 里面连一滴蜂蜜都没有。

spiderden_bedazzler.en: He's certainly got a creative streak, doesn't he?
spiderden_bedazzler.trans: 他确实很有创造力，对吧？

wall_scrap_item.trans: 希望它能维持我们的安全。

wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.en: Am I the only one who thinks this is a bad idea?
wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.trans: 只有我一个觉得这是个馊主意吗？

oceanfish_medium_9.en: I wish it was a little less eel-shaped.
oceanfish_medium_9.trans: 我希望它的形状不要那么像鳗鱼。

balloons_empty.en: Everyone has their forte. Some bend time, others bend balloons.
balloons_empty.trans: 每个人都有自己的特长。有人能扭曲时间，有人会扭气球。

oceanfish_medium_8.en: Oh botheration, this might take a while to thaw out.
oceanfish_medium_8.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！解冻可能需要很久。

oceanfish_medium_7.en: It has a lovely shimmer to it, almost metallic.
oceanfish_medium_7.trans: 它有一种可爱的接近金属的光泽。

glassspike.en: It looks nice now that it's not trying to impale me.
glassspike.trans: 它现在看起来不错，因为它没有试图刺伤我。

oceanfish_medium_6.en: It has a lovely shimmer to it, almost metallic.
oceanfish_medium_6.trans: 它有一种可爱的接近金属的光泽。

oceanfish_medium_5.en: It's not so strange if you don't think about it.
oceanfish_medium_5.trans: 你只要别想，就不会觉得它古怪。

oceanfish_medium_4.en: Maybe I should throw it back, just in case...
oceanfish_medium_4.trans: 要不我把它扔回去得了……

oceanfish_medium_3.en: I hope it's worth all the fuss!

wathgrithr_shield.en: Some added protection is more than welcome.

oceanfish_medium_1.en: I think I just fished up a clump of mud.
oceanfish_medium_1.trans: 我好像钓起了一坨泥巴。

seedpouch.en: Extra pocket space is always welcome.
seedpouch.trans: 额外的口袋空间总是受欢迎的。

lightflier.en: I feel a bit reassured knowing it's nearby.
lightflier.trans: 知道它在附近，我就放心了。

lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.en: This garland will restore a bit of my vitality.

depleted.en: I need to get my hands on more of that dark fuel...
depleted.trans: 我需要得到更多的黑暗燃料……

generic.en: If anything threatens me, why I'll clock them without a second thought!
generic.trans: 如果有什么东西威胁到我，我就会毫不犹豫地把它们打成碎片！

broken.en: Someone didn't want us to use this.
broken.trans: 有人不希望我们使用这个。

moonstaff.trans: 当然了！现在我想起来了！

wrongstaff.en: I've got a nagging feeling it's not supposed to look like that.
wrongstaff.trans: 有一种感觉在对我唠叨，它不应该是这样的。

staffed.en: Was something else supposed to happen? I can't remember...
staffed.trans: 是不是应该发生别的事情？我不记得了……

generic.en: I'm pretty sure that's important for something.
generic.trans: 我很确定这对某些事情很重要。

yotr_decor_1_item.en: I suppose I can spare a moment to set it up.
yotr_decor_1_item.trans: 我还是可以抽出一会儿把它装好的。

bedroll_furry.en: If I have to spend time sleeping, at least I can do it comfortably.
bedroll_furry.trans: 如果我必须花时间睡觉，那至少要睡舒服。

rhinodrill.en: He's got a nose for this kind of work.
rhinodrill.trans: 他的鼻子很适合干这个活。

spiderden.en: I'm not in any hurry to tangle with spiders.
spiderden.trans: 我并不急于和蜘蛛纠缠。

generic.en: This seems rather excessive.
generic.trans: 这个好像有点过了。

activated.en: Well, I'm pleasantly surprised to see it works!
activated.trans: 它居然能用，真是个惊喜！

dragonheadhat.en: What's that old saying? Two heads are better than one?
dragonheadhat.trans: 那句老话是什么？两个脑袋比一个好？

phlegm.en: Ugh, even time doesn't want to touch it.
phlegm.trans: 唉，连时间都不想去碰它。

eggplant.en: It kind of looks like a giant jellybean if you squint.
eggplant.trans: 如果你眯起眼睛，它看起来有点像一个巨大的软糖。

chesspiece_twinsofterror.en: I'd be quite happy to never lay eyes on them again.
chesspiece_twinsofterror.trans: 终于不用再看到这些了，眼睛也干净了。

book_temperature.en: I won't spend my time and energy reading all that.
book_temperature.trans: 我才不想花时间和精力读那些东西。

plant.en: Something's nagging at my memory... ah, it's probably nothing.
plant.trans: 我记得有什么...啊，应该没事。

dirt.en: About as boring as you'd expect a pile of dirt to be.

mooseegg.en: A brand new lifetime getting ready to start.
mooseegg.trans: 一个全新的生命即将开始。

batbat.en: The bat won't be needing it anymore, I might as well put it to good use.
batbat.trans: 蝙蝠已经不需要它了，我不妨好好利用它。

carnivaldecor_plant.en: I guess some trees can be interesting to look at after all.
carnivaldecor_plant.trans: 有些树看着还是很有趣的。

skeleton.en: Oh botheration, I forgot all about him!
skeleton.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我把他都忘光了！

starving.en: Oh botheration, I forgot to feed you again, didn't I?
starving.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我是不是又忘记喂你了？

dead.en: It was... probably just his time.

occupied.en: Not a cuckoo, but close enough.
occupied.trans: 不是布谷鸟，但也足够接近了。

generic.en: All it needs now is a little cuckoo bird.
generic.trans: 现在就差一只小布谷鸟。

sleeping.en: You could be spending this time laying eggs!
sleeping.trans: 你可以用这些时间来生蛋！

fish_box.en: I suppose the best way to keep fish fresh is to keep them alive.
fish_box.trans: 我想保持鱼的新鲜的最好办法是让它们活着。

held.en: I'm not quite sure what my plan is here.
held.trans: 我不太清楚我在这里的计划是什么。

generic.en: I won't be killed by the likes of you, bee!
generic.trans: 我不会被你们杀死的，蜜蜂！

chesspiece_daywalker2.en: A familiar face I couldn't forget soon enough.
chesspiece_daywalker2.trans: 让我恨不得快点忘掉的熟悉面孔。

bloom.en: Ugh, it's trying to grow more mushrooms.
bloom.trans: 呃，它正试图长出更多的蘑菇。

generic.en: I never did like mushrooms.
generic.trans: 我从来没有喜欢过蘑菇。

acidcovered.en: I will not soon forget this odor.
acidcovered.trans: 我不会马上忘记这种气味。

featherpencil.en: Good for jotting down notes in a hurry.

moonrockidol.en: It looks a bit like a key, doesn't it?
moonrockidol.trans: 看着有点像钥匙，对不对？

yotb.en: Where's that peculiar judge? He might have an appreciation for this.
yotb.trans: 那个古怪的裁判在哪里？他应该会喜欢这个。

generic.en: I love a nice memento, they help me keep track of when I am.
generic.trans: 我喜欢漂亮的纪念品，能帮助我找到身处何时。

beast_blueprint.en: If it's so lucky, maybe I'll keep it for myself.
beast_blueprint.trans: 如果这么幸运，那自己留着好了。

burnt.en: What a shame. Anyway...
burnt.trans: 真是太可惜了。无论如何……

generic.en: I prefer living solidly on the ground, thank you.
generic.trans: 我还是喜欢脚踏实地地生活在地上，谢谢你。

lowpower.en: A fresh gem should keep it going a while longer.
lowpower.trans: 一块新鲜的宝石应该能让它再持续一段时间。

burning.en: I probably should have warned her that was going to happen.
burning.trans: 我也许应该警告她会这样。

overloaded.en: Can't push these gems too hard.
overloaded.trans: 不能把这些宝石压榨得太极限。

burnt.en: I wonder how quickly she can build a new one...
burnt.trans: 我想知道她能以多快的速度建造一个新的……

generic.en: I see she's also been incorporating gems into her designs.
generic.trans: 看来她也在将宝石融入她的设计中。

off.en: It ran out of magical energy.

lavaarena_armor_hp.trans: 它应该能保护我的安全。

book_sleep.en: Not to critique the writing, but that nearly put me to sleep.
book_sleep.trans: 我不是要批评写作技巧，但那个差点让我睡着。

critter_bulbin.en: Aren't you a little far from home?

saddle_basic.en: I've got a saddle, now I just need an animal to ride...
saddle_basic.trans: 我有鞍了，就差个坐骑了……

generic.en: I was hoping not to see or smell you again.
generic.trans: 我既不想再看到你的样子，也不想再闻到你的气味。

sleeping.en: That's one way to pass the time.
sleeping.trans: 倒也是一个消磨时间的法子。

generic.en: I just need more time!
generic.trans: 我只需要更多的时间!

lunarplant_kit.en: Fixing it is faster than making a new one.
lunarplant_kit.trans: 修复它比造一个新的更快。

playing.en: Well... I guess I've got enough time for some nanty narking!
playing.trans: 好……那我就抽时间来好好玩玩！

generic.en: The mechanism won't work without a token.
generic.trans: 这套机械没有代币是不会工作的。

monstertartare.en: Just smelling it shaved a few years off my life.
monstertartare.trans: 仅仅是闻到它的味道，就使我的生命缩短了几年。

rubble.trans: 时间的洗礼让它破旧不堪。

messagebottleempty.en: You never know when you might need an empty bottle.
messagebottleempty.trans: 你永远不知道你什么时候需要一个空瓶子。

generic.en: That's the liveliest carrot I've ever seen.
generic.trans: 这是我见过的最有活力的胡萝卜。

sleeping.en: It's taking a quick little nap.

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: Goodness, it's even thicker than the last one.
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 老天，这本比上一本还要厚。

malbatross_feather.en: At least I got a nice feather out of that whole debacle.
malbatross_feather.trans: 至少我在那场灾难中得到了一根漂亮的羽毛。

kitcoon_rocky.trans: 烦死了，他们的可爱真让人分心！

boatrace_start.en: We should start this race on time.

blowdart_lava.en: That's a weapon I could use from range.
blowdart_lava.trans: 我可以在范围内用这个武器。

moose_nesting_ground.en: Something's telling me I should tread carefully around here.
moose_nesting_ground.trans: 有个声音告诉我，我在这里要小心行事。

turf_fungus_green.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_fungus_green.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

wobster_moonglass.en: They make normal wobsters seem friendly in comparison.
wobster_moonglass.trans: 相比之下，普通龙虾友好多了。

twiggy_nut_sapling.trans: 祝你好运，乱糟糟的小树。

farm_soil_debris.en: Didn't I pluck that out already?
farm_soil_debris.trans: 我不是已经把那个摘出去了吗？

bullkelp_root.en: I could plant this somewhere more convenient.
bullkelp_root.trans: 我可以把它种在更方便的地方。

earmuffshat.en: If the rest of me freezes, at least my ears will be cozy.
earmuffshat.trans: 即使其他补位冻僵了，至少我的耳朵会很舒服。

spider_dropper.en: You think you can get the drop on me?

moonspiderden.en: They're not the best decorators, are they?
moonspiderden.trans: 它们不是很擅长装潢，对吧？

alterguardian_phase3dead.en: There isn't so much as a spark of possibility left in it.
alterguardian_phase3dead.trans: 这里面没剩下多少可能性的火花。

1.en: Poor thing. Her time came too soon.
1.trans: 可怜啊。她的时间到的有点太早。

2.en: Poor thing. Her time came too soon.
2.trans: 可怜啊。她的时间到的有点太早。

1.en: Poor thing. Her time came too soon.
1.trans: 可怜啊。她的时间到的有点太早。

2.en: Poor thing. Her time came too soon.
2.trans: 可怜啊。她的时间到的有点太早。

1.en: Poor thing. Her time came too soon.
1.trans: 可怜啊。她的时间到的有点太早。

2.en: Poor thing. Her time came too soon.
2.trans: 可怜啊。她的时间到的有点太早。

bananabush.en: They're much easier to pick this way.
bananabush.trans: 它们这样长容易采摘一些。

sleep.en: Aren't you a good little helper?
sleep.trans: 你真是个优秀的小帮手！

charging.en: It sure takes a lot of breaks.

charged.en: It sure takes a lot of breaks.

generic.en: Aren't you a good little helper?
generic.trans: 你真是个优秀的小帮手！

off.en: It sure takes a lot of breaks.

dead.trans: 他已经跳出了他的最后一步。

generic.en: Don't even try it frogs, I'm one step ahead of you.
generic.trans: 别想了，青蛙们，我永远比你们早一步。

sleeping.en: Look at him sleeping away.

fireballstaff.en: It calls a meteor from above.

cookedmandrake.en: It was a matter of survival.

generic.en: Nobody ever invites me in. I'm starting to take it personally!
generic.trans: 从来没人邀请我进去过。我感觉他们就是不喜欢我！

empty.en: They'll be back.
empty.trans: 它们会再长出来的。

ruins_rubble.en: Whatever it was has been lost to time.
ruins_rubble.trans: 无论它曾是什么，都在时间长河中消失了。

dug_bananabush.en: They're much easier to pick this way.
dug_bananabush.trans: 它们这样长容易采摘一些。

treegrowthsolution.en: I can finally speed up those dreadfully slow trees!
treegrowthsolution.trans: 我终于可以为那些慢得可怕的树提速了！

eyeturret_item.en: Where to put it, where to put it...

fence_rotator.en: I appreciate specialized tools. Especially when I can still hit things with them.
fence_rotator.trans: 我信赖专用工具。尤其是能用来戳戳打打的那种。

slingshotammo_gunpowder.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_gunpowder.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

wx78module_heat.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_heat.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

grassgator.en: It seems to want nothing to do with us, which is fine by me.
grassgator.trans: 它似乎不想与我们有任何关系，这对我来说是好事。

moqueca.en: I'm glad someone around here knows how to cook.
moqueca.trans: 我很高兴这里有人知道如何做饭。

multitool_axe_pickaxe.en: This will save me precious time!
multitool_axe_pickaxe.trans: 这个能帮我节省不少宝贵时间！

cave_entrance_ruins.en: Someone probably plugged it for a reason. I wonder what it was?
cave_entrance_ruins.trans: 有人可能出于某种原因堵住了它。我想知道是为什么？

telestaff.en: It's a bit clunky, but it'll do for now.
telestaff.trans: 虽然有点笨拙，但凑活着用算了。

red_cap.en: I'm pretty sure red is the bad color.
red_cap.trans: 我很确定红色的不能吃。

kabobs.en: No need for a plate or utensils, just grab it and go!
kabobs.trans: 不需要盘子或餐具，只要拿着就可以走了！

molehat.en: What a funny looking hat. Let me try it on!
molehat.trans: 这顶帽子看起来真有趣。让我试戴一下！

marblepillar.en: Whatever building it used to be a part of has been lost to time.
marblepillar.trans: 无论它曾经是什么建筑的一部分，都已经在时间长河中消失了。

squid.en: Could you light the way without being a nuisance, please?!
squid.trans: 你能不能在不妨碍他人的情况下照亮道路？！

bluegem.en: Why do people say things are as blue as the sea? The sea isn't very blue at all!
bluegem.trans: 为什么人们说“像海一样蓝”？大海也不是很蓝啊！

teleportato_potato.en: This metal potato contains great and fearful power...
teleportato_potato.trans: 这个金属土豆包含强大而又可怕的力量...

flower_cave_withered.en: This flower's time is running out.
flower_cave_withered.trans: 留给这朵花的时间不多了。

saltlick.en: Imagine getting so distracted by a chunk of salt.
saltlick.trans: 居然被一大块盐弄得神魂颠倒。

pond.en: Has that pond always been there?
pond.trans: 那个池塘一直在那里吗？

bombed.en: There's a time to slow down and enjoy the little things.
bombed.trans: 有时就得坐下来享受一下生活的点滴。

generic.en: It looks so warm and inviting.
generic.trans: 它看起来如此温暖和诱人。

empty.en: No sense standing around an empty hole.
empty.trans: 站在一个空洞旁边没有任何意义。

dreadstone.en: As off-putting as it is, it could be useful.
dreadstone.trans: 虽然看着碍眼，但可能会有用。

chesspiece_wagboss_lunar.en: Can't we just leave this monstrosity in the past?
chesspiece_wagboss_lunar.trans: 为什么不让这怪物留在过去？

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: I doubt there's anything in there worth my time.
merm_toolshed_upgraded.trans: 我怀疑里面没有值得我花时间的东西。

generic.en: I could stand to spend a moment or two out of the heat.
generic.trans: 我愿意花一两分钟时间来避开热浪。

burnt.en: It won't do me much good now.

malbatross_feathered_weave.en: Fabric from feathers, what will they think of next?
malbatross_feathered_weave.trans: 羽毛制成的织物，他们还会想到什么？

dumbbell_redgem.en: Not the most conventional weapon, but to each their own.
dumbbell_redgem.trans: 不是最常规的武器，但是各有千秋。

bearger_fur.en: It was either him or me.
bearger_fur.trans: 当时不是他死就是我亡。

eel.en: I think I just saw it wriggle...
eel.trans: 我想我刚刚看到它在蠕动……

trunk_cooked.en: You get used to the flavor after a while.
trunk_cooked.trans: 一段时间后你就会习惯这种味道。

diviningrodstart.trans: 那根手杖看起来很有用！

pondeel.en: I have half a mind to throw it back...

spider_water.en: Shoo! Why can't you just stay in your tree?
spider_water.trans: 嘘！为什么你就不能待在你的树上？

doll_blueprint.en: I don't remember the dolls from my childhood being quite so big and hairy.
doll_blueprint.trans: 我记得我小时候的娃娃没有这么大，也没这么多毛。

boat_bumper_crabking.en: It looks like it will outlive the boat.
boat_bumper_crabking.trans: 看来它的寿命会比船更长。

acorn_cooked.en: Maybe in another timeline it grew to be a tree.
acorn_cooked.trans: 也许在另一条时间线里，它长成了一棵树。

spider_healer_item.en: I'm afraid that won't do me any good.
spider_healer_item.trans: 我担心这对我没有任何好处。

ghost.en: A little bit of time re-shapery and you'll be good as new!
ghost.trans: 等我稍微重塑一下时间，你就会完好如初了！

firestarter.en: %s is a hard imp to predict...
firestarter.trans: %s是个深不可测的小恶魔……

murderer.en: You've taken things too far %s, this isn't a game!
murderer.trans: 你玩过火了%s，这不是一场游戏！

attacker.en: Was that really necessary, %s?
attacker.trans: 真有必要那样吗，%s？

reviver.en: You didn't take a nibble while I wasn't looking, did you?
reviver.trans: 你没趁我不注意的时候咬一口吧？

generic.en: I get the sense you're even more well-traveled than I am, %s.
generic.trans: 我感觉你比我去过的地方还多，%s。

dock_woodposts_item.en: Are you supposed to place the support posts before or after? Oh well.
dock_woodposts_item.trans: 支撑的柱子是要先放还是后放？哎呀。

firestarter.en: Honestly! Throwing a tantrum won't solve anything.
firestarter.trans: 说实话！发脾气并不能解决任何问题。

ghost.en: Don't fret %s, I can fix this! Just give me a moment.
ghost.trans: 别担心，%s，我有办法！给我点时间。

murderer.en: The shadows poisoned your mind, %s! Now you need to be dealt with!
murderer.trans: 暗影腐化了你的思想，%s！我要替天行道了！

attacker.en: I knew there was something dark about you, %s!
attacker.trans: 我就知道你有这阴暗的一面，%s！

reviver.en: There is goodness in you yet, %s. Oh, don't look so embarrassed!
reviver.trans: 你内心还是很善良的，%s。哎呀，你尴尬什么！

generic.en: Goodness %s, have you aged since the last time I saw you?
generic.trans: 老天啊，%s，你怎么比上次见面时老了那么多？

purebrilliance.en: If only I could use it to power one of my watches... oh well.
purebrilliance.trans: 它要是能给我的怀表充能就好了……哎。

mask_treehat.en: Something about it makes my skin crawl...
mask_treehat.trans: 它的某些东西让我皮肤发痒……

fishmeat_small_dried.en: A dry, tough piece of fish meat.
fishmeat_small_dried.trans: 一块干巴巴、硬邦邦的鱼肉。

nonslipgritboosted.trans: 多一点抓地力总没坏处。

carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.en: You can never have too many nightlights.

quagmire_parkspike.en: The scientific term is: "Sharp pointy thing".
quagmire_parkspike.trans: 它的学名应该是“锋利、尖锐的东西”。

picked.en: Maybe it's best if it doesn't grow back.
picked.trans: 也许不长回来反而是好事。

generic.en: Just another mushroom.
generic.trans: 就是一颗蘑菇。

gravy.en: I don't need any turkey to pour it over, just hand me a spoon.
gravy.trans: 我不需要把它浇在火鸡肉上，给我递个勺子来。

burning.en: It doesn't hurt to take precautions.
burning.trans: 采取预防措施并没有什么坏处。

generic.en: And stay down!
generic.trans: 老实躺着！

junk_pile.en: There might be something worth my time in there.
junk_pile.trans: 也许里面有值得我花时间的东西。

maxwellphonograph.en: So that's where the music was coming from.

decor_lamp.en: How fast does light travel in this place?
decor_lamp.trans: 这地方光线跑得有多快？

carrot.en: From the ground, straight to my mouth.
carrot.trans: 从地里直接进到了我的嘴里。

retrieving_item.en: Hurry up now, I want to see what it is!
retrieving_item.trans: 快一点，我想看看是什么东西！

generic.en: Thankfully, it saves me from having to dive down myself.
generic.trans: 太好了，这下我不用亲自潜下去了。

upgraded_stacksize.en: Big enough to keep all my trinkets safely stashed away.
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 够大，能安全储藏我所有的小饰品。

generic.en: Now that I'm not worried about my things burning up, I can worry about everything else.
generic.trans: 既然不用担心我的东西被烧毁，我可以担心其他的事情了。

i_won.en: I didn't even need to bend time or space to win!
i_won.trans: 我没掰弯时空就能赢得了比赛！

someone_else_won.en: Good job {winner}, but I'll win last time! I mean, next time!
someone_else_won.trans: 好样的，{winner}，不过我上次会赢的！我的意思是，下次！

generic.en: I guess the race has to end sometime.
generic.trans: 比赛总有结束时。

burnt.en: That's certainly one way to end a race.
burnt.trans: 这当然是结束比赛的一种方式。

unwritten.en: There's nothing written here. What an unhelpful sign!
unwritten.trans: 什么都没写。毫无帮助的指示牌！

burnt.en: That's a bad sign.

generic.en: That must be some kind of sign.
generic.trans: 是个指示牌。

nitre_formation.trans: 真是让人兴奋，更多的石头！

poop.trans: 这是健康肠道运动的产物。

lightninggoathorn.trans: 曲曲折折的，如同时间一样。

wortox_souljar.en: At least they're not lost souls.
wortox_souljar.trans: 起码这些灵魂不会迷路。

yotr_decor_2_item.en: I suppose I can spare a moment to set it up.
yotr_decor_2_item.trans: 我还是可以抽出一会儿把它装好的。

book_fossil.en: This'll keep those monsters held for a little while.
book_fossil.trans: 这样能把那些怪物拖住一阵子。

beeswax_spray.en: If only I could make use of its unique preservation effects...
beeswax_spray.trans: 要是我能利用它独特的封存效果就好了……

uncovered.en: It's a little better, but there's something missing...
uncovered.trans: 稍微好点了，但还是少了点什么……

ready.en: Did you hear that? It's like there's something scratching inside...
ready.trans: 你听到了吗？好像有什么东西在里面抓挠……

covered.en: I can't quite tell what it's supposed to be.

finished.en: Why did I spend so much time on this?
finished.trans: 我为什么要花这么多时间在这上面？

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: More space is always welcome, but more time would be preferred.
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 多一些空间固然好，但多一点时间就更好了。

chesspiece_pawn.en: Even a common pawn can become powerful if it's clever enough.
chesspiece_pawn.trans: 如果足够聪明，即使是一个普通的小卒也能变得强大。

turf_sinkhole.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_sinkhole.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.en: A handful of colored paper? Oh! To represent worms, how clever!
carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.trans: 一把彩色的纸？哦！用来代表虫子，多聪明啊！

wall_stone_item.en: Stone is a very tried and true building material.
wall_stone_item.trans: 石头是一种经过时间检验的建筑材料。

yotb_stage.en: What a strange fellow. A shame he doesn't pop by more often.
yotb_stage.trans: 真是个奇怪的家伙。可惜他不经常出现在这里。

complete.en: I did it! Why did I do that again?
complete.trans: 我做到了！我为什么要这么做来着？

funny.en: Oh botheration, that doesn't look right at all.
funny.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。这看起来一点都不对。

generic.en: It's missing something.
generic.trans: 好像少了点什么。

hawaiianshirt.en: It might be nice to kick back and unwind... for a minute or two.
hawaiianshirt.trans: 有时偶尔放松一两分钟……也是挺惬意的。

moonglass.en: It would make a perfect watch crystal, if only it played nice with shadow magic.
moonglass.trans: 如果它契合暗影魔法，那将会是完美的表镜。

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: A mask like this is earned through years of hard labor.
mask_ancient_masonhat.trans: 这样的面具，是多年的辛勤劳动换来的。

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: At least they're quick to assemble.
carnivalgame_herding_kit.trans: 至少它们组装起来很快。

warglet.en: I could have sworn they were bigger...
warglet.trans: 我发誓，它们以前比现在大……

record_end.en: Do I look like I have time to sit around listening to records?
record_end.trans: 我看起来有时间坐下来听唱片吗？

burnt.en: I guess it's time to find a new light.
burnt.trans: 是时候找一展新的灯了。

on.en: Light made without oil or matches never ceases to amaze me.
on.trans: 不用油或者火柴的灯总能带给我惊喜。

hermit_cracked_pearl.en: I was holding out hope things would go differently this time.
hermit_cracked_pearl.trans: 我一直希望这次会不一样。

koalefant_summer.en: It's in the spring of its life.

asparagus_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
asparagus_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

goldenpitchfork.en: I wouldn't want that gold to go to waste.
goldenpitchfork.trans: 总不能白白浪费这些黄金吧。

critter_perdling.en: I'm teaching her to chirp the hour.

kelp_cooked.en: I don't know why I wasted time cooking it.
kelp_cooked.trans: 我不知道为什么要浪费时间来烹饪它。

kitcoonden_kit.en: Did I not set that up already?
kitcoonden_kit.trans: 我不是已经设置好了吗？

oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.en: If it will help me catch a fish faster, I'm all for it.
oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.trans: 如果能帮我更快抓到鱼，那我愿意试。

generic.en: I'm all for taking precautions, but does it have to look like that?
generic.trans: 我支持未雨绸缪，但它一定要做成那样吗？

burnt.en: I'm trying not to take that as a bad omen.
burnt.trans: 我尽量不把这当作一个坏兆头。

recharging.en: It needs a bit of time to unwind.
recharging.trans: 它需要一点时间来松发条。

generic.en: It's perfect for short trips, no muss or fuss.
generic.trans: 这个十分适合短途旅行，轻松加愉快。

alterguardianhatshard.en: I wonder what else I could fashion with this.
alterguardianhatshard.trans: 我想知道我还可以用这个来做什么。

smallghost.en: The poor little thing. It's too late for me to help them.
smallghost.trans: 可怜的小东西。我想帮忙，但已经太晚了。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.en: I might as well keep it for a rainy day.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.trans: 我还不如把它留着以备不时之需。

battlesong_fireresistance.en: Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you?
battlesong_fireresistance.trans: 哦，你不会是想听我唱歌吧？

generic.en: It was a fine home once, but it's fallen into disrepair.
generic.trans: 这座曾经精美的房子现如今已经年久失修。

struggle.trans: 发生了什么事？这不应该啊！

generic.en: I'm guessing there's a big chessboard somewhere nearby.
generic.trans: 我猜想附近应该有一个大棋盘。

quagmire_sapbucket.en: We can use it to gather sap from the trees.
quagmire_sapbucket.trans: 我们可以用它采集树液。

generic.en: I'm much more comfortable working with clockwork than... whatever this is.
generic.trans: 我擅长组装发条……而不是这种东西。

activated.en: I suppose that means it's working.
activated.trans: 我想这意味着它在工作。

sweettea.en: Well... I guess there's time for a quick cup of tea.
sweettea.trans: 嗯……我可以抽点时间出来喝杯茶。

generic.en: It's resting, for the moment.
generic.trans: 它暂时在休息。

open.en: Not my preferred way to get around, but it'll do in a pinch.
open.trans: 不是我喜欢的出行方式，但在紧要关头还是可以的。

leafloaf.en: The loaf has been set very fashionably in jelly.
leafloaf.trans: 面包被非常时尚地镶嵌在果冻中。

quagmire_altar_queen.trans: 一座有纪念意义的纪念碑。

battlesong_instant_panic.en: It's her delivery that really scares the Dickens out of you.

hermitcrabtea_petals_evil.en: I'm sure there's a good use for it.

pondfish.en: Can I call it seafood? It's more of a pondfood, really.
pondfish.trans: 我可以管它叫海鲜吗？它更像是池鲜，真的。

wathgrithrhat.en: It's not historically accurate, but I'll just keep that to myself.
wathgrithrhat.trans: 这并不符合历史事实，但我就不说了。

dragonbodyhat.en: I don't like the thought of being inside a dragon's stomach...
dragonbodyhat.trans: 我可不想跑去龙的肚子里……

moon_altar_icon.en: I do wish it would stop with all that frightful whispering.
moon_altar_icon.trans: 我真希望它能停止可怕的低语。

cursed_monkey_token.en: That is one trinket I'd rather not have cluttering my pockets.
cursed_monkey_token.trans: 这个小饰品我就不装在口袋里了。

icestaff.en: It'll freeze anything in its tracks.
icestaff.trans: 它会冻结所有挡它道的人。

carrat_ghostracer.en: Nice try, but you won't fool me.
carrat_ghostracer.trans: 很好的尝试，但你骗不了我。

stump.en: Ah. I suppose that fire wasn't so everlasting after all.
stump.trans: 啊，看来那火焰也不是太永恒啊。

generic.en: It burns with an everlasting fire... how inspiring.
generic.trans: 它闪耀着永恒燃烧的火焰……多么鼓舞人心。

mosquitofertilizer.en: This should expedite the growth of my garden, at least.
mosquitofertilizer.trans: 这个最起码也能加快我的花园的生长速度吧。

mermwatchtower_noking.en: The poor scaly things seem quite lost without a king.
mermwatchtower_noking.trans: 这些可怜的有鳞生物少了国王似乎很迷茫。

trap_teeth.en: That would be a painful misstep to make.

quagmire_key_park.en: I'll park it in my pocket until I get to the park.
quagmire_key_park.trans: 在抵达公园之前，就把它“供“在我的口袋里吧。

tourtiere.en: This is exactly what I first imagined a mincemeat pie would be.
tourtiere.trans: 这正是我最初想象的肉馅饼的样子。

trap_bramble.en: If any intruders come by, they'll be in for a thorny surprise.
trap_bramble.trans: 如果有任何入侵者经过，他们将得到一个棘手的惊喜。

held.en: It never hurts to carry a little emergency light.
held.trans: 携带一个小小的应急灯总不会错。

generic.en: I'll take some light wherever I can get it.
generic.trans: 只要有光就行，我不挑。

wall_hay_item.en: These walls always seem to catch fire at the most inopportune moments.
wall_hay_item.trans: 这些墙似乎总是在最不恰当的时候着火。

boatrace_seastack_monkey.en: Botheration, these buoys are slowing me down!
boatrace_seastack_monkey.trans: 麻烦呐，这些浮标拖慢了我的速度！

dragonfruit_cooked.en: I always forget it looks like that on the inside.
dragonfruit_cooked.trans: 我总是忘记它里面是什么样子的。

alterguardian_contained.en: I should have known it would happen like this again.
alterguardian_contained.trans: 我早该知道会再次发生这样的事情。

pirate_stash.en: Somehow I was not expecting an actual "X" to be there on the ground.
pirate_stash.trans: 反正我是没指望地上真有一个“X”的标识。

minotaurhorn.en: I'm glad I managed to not meet my end at the business end of this horn.
minotaurhorn.trans: 我很高兴这个牛角没有成为我的终点。

held.en: I hope it doesn't start growing in there.
held.trans: 我希望它不会在里面开始生长。

generic.en: They're looking for a place to latch onto.
generic.trans: 他们正在寻找一个可以抓住的地方。

burning.en: Maybe that was supposed to happen.

chopped.en: Its time in this world was cut short.
chopped.trans: 它在这个世界上的时间被缩短了。

burnt.en: Well, what's done is done. For now anyway.
burnt.trans: 哎，也只能接受发生的事情了。现在只好如此。

generic.en: Just another tree.
generic.trans: 只是另一棵树而已。

tallbirdegg_cooked.trans: 它尝起来像偷来的时间。

animal_track.en: Something went that way... hopefully something tasty.
animal_track.trans: 有东西往那边去了……希望是好吃的东西。

wagboss_robot_leg.en: I remember these being useful somehow.

costume_blacksmith_body.en: It looks like it could belong to a blacksmith.

flint.trans: 啊哈，我发现了一些燧石！

wx78module_maxhunger.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_maxhunger.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.en: That could cause some major destruction.
lavaarena_crowndamagerhat.trans: 那家伙能造成巨大破坏。

walterhat.en: What a funny little hat! Sadly, I don't think it would suit me.
walterhat.trans: 多么有趣的小帽子啊！真遗憾，它应该不太适合我。

oceanfish_small_9.en: It's full of spit and vinegar.

playing.en: My timing is impeccable, it's my aim that could use some work...
playing.trans: 我抓时机无可挑剔，只是瞄准需要一些练习……

generic.en: The mechanism won't work without a token.
generic.trans: 这套机械没有代币是不会工作的。

battlesong_durability.en: Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you?
battlesong_durability.trans: 哦，你不会是想听我唱歌吧？

dragonpie.en: When in doubt, bake it into a pie.
dragonpie.trans: 如果有疑问，就把它烤成馅饼。

oceanfish_small_5.trans: 已经是烹饪过的？很完美！

oceanfish_small_8.en: I'd better take care not to scald my hands.

oceanfish_small_2.en: So much effort and so little to show for it.
oceanfish_small_2.trans: 如此多的努力，却没有什么成果可言。

oceanfish_small_1.en: All that time spent just to catch this little fish?
oceanfish_small_1.trans: 花了那么多时间就是为了抓这条小鱼？

wall_moonrock.en: I'd like to see anything break through that! Actually no, I wouldn't.
wall_moonrock.trans: 我想看到有东西穿透它！算了，还是别了。

burning.en: This might end up being an improvement.

burnt.en: I take back what I said, it's much worse this way.
burnt.trans: 我收回我说的话，它变得更糟了。

generic.en: I think our definition of "friendly" differs somewhat.
generic.trans: 我们对“友好”的定义不一样。

beehive.en: I'm sure the bees are working like clockwork in there.
beehive.trans: 我敢肯定蜜蜂在里面像钟表一样辛勤工作。

oceanfish_small_4.en: At least it wasn't too difficult to catch.

ghost.en: Give me a minute, I can fix this!
ghost.trans: 给我一分钟，我能行！

firestarter.en: Not everything needs to be cooked, %s...
firestarter.trans: 不是所有东西都需要烤熟的，%s……

murderer.en: It's hard to fool me %s, did you have this plot cooked up all along?!
murderer.trans: 你别想糊弄我，%s，你是不是蓄谋已久了？

attacker.en: I don't like the look on your face, %s...
attacker.trans: 我不喜欢你脸上的表情，%s……

reviver.en: I'm glad to have someone like you around, %s.
reviver.trans: 我很高兴身旁有你作伴，%s。

generic.en: How good it is to see you, %s! Tell me, have we met yet?
generic.trans: 见到你真是太好了，%s！话说，咱们遇见过没有？

cookedmeat.en: Alright, I guess it was worth taking the time to cook it.
cookedmeat.trans: 好吧，我想这是值得花时间来煮的。

oceanfish_small_3.en: There's hardly enough meat on it to make it worth my time.
oceanfish_small_3.trans: 上面几乎没什么肉，不值得我花时间。

chesspiece_klaus.en: Why would I want to remember him?

quagmire_trader_merm.en: Maybe they'd be willing to trade.

held.en: It's a bit awkward carrying such a large bird around with me...
held.trans: 带着这么大的一只鸟到处走有点怪……

sleeping.en: It's fast asleep.

generic.en: What a jolly looking bird.
generic.trans: 多么欢乐的鸟儿啊。

record_efs.trans: 我更喜欢他们后来的作品。

generic.en: Well, it was worth a try.
generic.trans: 嗯，这值得一试。

carrot_planted.en: I can take it now or come back for it later.
carrot_planted.trans: 我可以现在拿，也可以以后再来拿。

firestarter.en: Hm. I must have my reasons...
firestarter.trans: 哼。我一定有我的理由……

ghost.en: I'm not letting things end for us here!
ghost.trans: 我们的故事不能在这结束！

murderer.en: It looks like there's only room for one of us in this timeline!
murderer.trans: 看来这条时间线只容得下我们中的一个！

attacker.en: Well... they must've deserved it.
attacker.trans: 嗯……一定是他们活该。

reviver.en: I'm glad one of us was able to act in time!
reviver.trans: 我很高兴我们中的一个人能够及时采取行动！

generic.en: Well, fancy running into me here!
generic.trans: 真没想到会在这里碰见我！

dead_sea_bones.en: Not what I was hoping to see on my stroll down the beach.
dead_sea_bones.trans: 这不是我在海滩漫步时希望看到的。

boat_bumper_kelp.en: Anything to prolong the life of my boat.
boat_bumper_kelp.trans: 只要能延长小船的寿命我都愿意用。

ghostlyelixir_shadow.en: A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.
ghostlyelixir_shadow.trans: 一点点玄学上的干预不会伤害任何人。

wagpunk_bits.en: Gears and wires and sprockets, oh my!

malbatross_beak.en: I don't think its owner will be missing it.
malbatross_beak.trans: 它的主人应该不会想它。

deerclops.en: Do we really have to do this again?
deerclops.trans: 我们真的要再来一次吗？

merm_armory_upgraded.en: I doubt there's anything in there worth my time.
merm_armory_upgraded.trans: 我怀疑里面没有值得我花时间的东西。

manrabbit_tail.en: It's nice, so long as I don't think about where it came from.
manrabbit_tail.trans: 挺好的，只要我别去想它的来源。

houndwhistle.en: It might be useful if I ever need to train some unruly dogs.
houndwhistle.trans: 训练一些不听话的狗时可能会派上用场。

batnose_cooked.en: It hardly makes a difference whether it's raw or cooked.
batnose_cooked.trans: 生的还是熟的，几乎没有什么区别。

beefalotreat.en: It's probably better for them than candy from my pockets...
beefalotreat.trans: 这可能比我口袋里的糖果对他们更好……

burning.en: It was the only way.

reviving.en: I don't like it when THEY do it.
reviving.trans: 它们这么做的时候我就不喜欢了。

generic.en: Ugh! I don't want to look at it!
generic.trans: 啊！我不想看它！

uncommon.en: It would look lovely over a fireplace, perhaps next to a fine mantel clock.
uncommon.trans: 它在壁炉上会看起来很可爱，比如放在一个精美的壁炉钟旁边。

rare.en: I should really find a nice cabinet to display it in.
rare.trans: 我真的应该找一个漂亮的柜子来展示它。

generic.en: I feel as though I've seen it a few times before.
generic.trans: 我觉得好像我以前看过几次。

gift.en: Oh! Uh... was I supposed to bring a present too?
gift.trans: 哦！呃……我是不是也应该带一份礼物？

collapsedchest.en: It's a waste of time to repair if someone's just going to destroy it again.
collapsedchest.trans: 要是有人要再弄坏它，那就干脆别浪费时间修了。

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: At least they're quick to assemble.
carnival_prizebooth_kit.trans: 至少它们组装起来很快。

alterguardianhat.en: I-I can see now! The timelines are untangling before my eyes!
alterguardianhat.trans: 我——我现在可以看到了！ 时间线在我眼前一一展开了！

compost.en: At least I won't have to touch it.

generic.en: Well... there's probably time to make a few little trinkets.
generic.trans: 嗯……也许能抽点时间做一些小饰品。

burnt.en: It burned away in no time at all.

empty.en: It's that time of the duodecennial orbital cycle again.
empty.trans: 又到了十二年一次的轨道循环了。

cannonball_rock_item.trans: 这个东西谁都知道是干什么的。

cave_banana_cooked.en: Why did I spend time cooking it?
cave_banana_cooked.trans: 我为什么要花时间烹饪它？

winter_ornament.en: I just can't say no to collecting trinkets.
winter_ornament.trans: 我对收集小饰品完全没有抵抗力。

pepper_oversized.en: Ooooh, I get the feeling this one is going to be extra hot.
pepper_oversized.trans: 我有预感这个会辣上加辣。

cookiecutter.en: Oooh those things give me the shivers.
cookiecutter.trans: 哦，这些东西让我不寒而栗。

wasphive.en: I'd rather not be stung within an inch of my life, thank you.
wasphive.trans: 我一下都不想被蛰，谢谢你。

batcave.en: Don't mind me... just passing through...
batcave.trans: 不要介意我……我只是路过……

butterflymuffin.en: It has a subtle taste, light and fleeting.
butterflymuffin.trans: 它有一种微妙的味道，轻盈而短暂。

balatro_machine.en: Perhaps I have time for a round or two.
balatro_machine.trans: 或许玩上一两把的时间我还是有的。

spidergland.en: That spider left me a thoughtful parting gift.
spidergland.trans: 那只蜘蛛给我留下了一份贴心的离别礼物。

dumbbell_gem.en: What a dreadfully repetitive way to spend one's time.
dumbbell_gem.trans: 反复做同一件事来打发时间简直可怕。

turf_marsh.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_marsh.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

yotb.en: Where's that peculiar judge? He might have an appreciation for this.
yotb.trans: 那个古怪的裁判在哪里？他应该会喜欢这个。

generic.en: I love a nice memento, they help me keep track of when I am.
generic.trans: 我喜欢漂亮的纪念品，能帮助我找到身处何时。

yotd_anchor_item.en: I guess it might be useful... but I'd rather not to stay in one place for too long.
yotd_anchor_item.trans: 我想这可能有用……但我不愿在一个地方呆得太久。

tree_rock_sapling.en: It has its whole life ahead of it.
tree_rock_sapling.trans: 它还有很长的生命之路。

record_dawn.trans: 我更喜欢他们后来的作品。

generic.en: What a terribly off-putting tree.
generic.trans: 这棵树真让人讨厌。

firestarter.en: Children these days, always playing with fire.
firestarter.trans: 现在的孩子啊，没事总瞎玩火。

ghost.en: If only I could turn the clock back for both of you.
ghost.trans: 如果我能够为你们两个人把时间倒回去就好了。

murderer.en: You stay back! I mean it!
murderer.trans: 你别过来！我是认真的！

attacker.en: Hold on now, there's no need for that, %s.
attacker.trans: 等等，没必要那样，%s。

reviver.en: It must be hard for her...
reviver.trans: 她一定很难……

generic.en: Ah, hello %s... sorry, but I'm in a bit of a hurry'.
generic.trans: 啊，你好啊，%s……抱歉，我现在有点急事。

slingshotammo_marble.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_marble.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

oceanwhirlbigportalexit.en: Not how I want to spend my time.
oceanwhirlbigportalexit.trans: 我可不想这么打发时间。

shell_cluster.en: Now, what do we have here?

asparagus_oversized.en: That might be altogether too much asparagus, even for me.
asparagus_oversized.trans: 这么大芦笋，对我来说都太大了。

spear.en: Don't think I won't use it if I have to!

rat.en: I wish it could get quicker faster...
rat.trans: 我希望能快点训练它提速……

burnt.en: That's a bit of a setback.

generic.en: Perfect!
generic.trans: 完美！

cookbook.en: Cooking is so time consuming, look at all these ingredients and methods!
cookbook.trans: 烹饪太花时间了，看看这里有多少原料和方法！

potato.en: One of the more dependable vegetables.

redgem.en: It's amazing how many gems you can find just lying around here.
redgem.trans: 真神奇，这里地上随便就能捡到不少宝石。

stuffed.en: What am I going to do with all these mushrooms?
stuffed.trans: 我要这么多蘑菇做什么？

burnt.en: In the end, it made for a nice little campfire.
burnt.trans: 最后，它成了一把漂亮的小营火。

empty.en: I'm surprised there's no mushrooms growing out of this rotten log.
empty.trans: 我很惊讶这根烂木头上没有长出蘑菇。

slingshotammo_freeze.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_freeze.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

mermguard_shadow.en: It was a merm once. Not anymore.
mermguard_shadow.trans: 它曾是鱼人。如今已不再是。

slingshotammo_poop.en: It seems sensible enough to me, if a bit unpleasant.
slingshotammo_poop.trans: 虽然有些令人不悦，但也能说得通。

burning.en: You're not coming back this time.

reviving.en: Oh botheration! I have to deal with you again?!
reviving.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！我又要处理你？！

generic.en: Finally, it's over!
generic.trans: 总算结束了。

shark.en: Ah, I almost forgot. Another reason to stay away from the ocean!
shark.trans: 啊，我差点忘了。又一个远离海洋的理由！

mandrake_cooked.en: It's just a roasted vegetable, it's just a roasted vegetable...
mandrake_cooked.trans: 就只是烤熟的蔬菜而已，不要多想……

tophat.en: I'd look like quite the gentlewoman in that!
tophat.trans: 我戴上以后肯定英姿飒爽！

wagstaff_npc.en: You, sir! There's a few things I'd like to discuss with you...
wagstaff_npc.trans: 你，先生！有几件事我想和你讨论一下……

armor_bramble.en: Sometimes it pays to have a prickly exterior.
armor_bramble.trans: 有时，拥有一个带刺的外壳是有价值的。

dumbbell_marble.en: What a dreadfully repetitive way to spend one's time.
dumbbell_marble.trans: 反复做同一件事来打发时间简直可怕。

boat_ancient_item.en: This old thing better be seaworthy...

minerhat.en: Quite an improvement on the classic handheld lantern.
minerhat.trans: 相比经典的手持式灯笼有相当大的改进。

anchor.en: I'm more suited to fine-tuning than heavy lifting.
anchor.trans: 我更适合做调校，而不是干重活。

leafymeatburger.en: It has a very interesting texture.

book_elemental.en: I can't make out the text.

active.en: Looks like it's ready to go.
active.trans: 看起来它已经准备好了。

generic.en: A bit redundant, but it'll work in a pinch.
generic.trans: 虽然看着有点累赘，但紧要关头还是管用的。

chesspiece_guardianphase3.en: I hope I won't have to do that again.
chesspiece_guardianphase3.trans: 我希望我不必再这样做。

eyeplant.en: Oh stop staring! Mind your own business!
eyeplant.trans: 哦，别盯着看了！管好你自己的事！

boatfragment03.en: Brrr... so many terrible things can happen out at sea.
boatfragment03.trans: 呜呜呜……在海上会发生很多可怕的事情。

fish_cooked.en: If only I had a bit of vinegar to go with it.
fish_cooked.trans: 如果我有一点醋就好了。

coontail.en: I did what I had to do.

goggleshat.en: I think they go nicely with what I'm wearing.
goggleshat.trans: 我认为它与我穿的衣服很相称。

boatfragment05.en: Someone's boat met an untimely end.

boatfragment04.en: Brrr... so many terrible things can happen out at sea.
boatfragment04.trans: 呜呜呜……在海上会发生很多可怕的事情。

growing.en: Has it grown since I last saw it?
growing.trans: 自从我上次见它后，它是不是长大了？

generic.en: I'm done messing around with beehives.
generic.trans: 我可不要再拿蜂窝捣乱。

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: At least they're quick to assemble.
carnivalgame_shooting_kit.trans: 至少它们组装起来很快。

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: Thankfully it's been designed with room for glasses underneath.
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 设计的很巧妙，下面还有地方放眼镜。

ruins_bat.en: It's a bit unwieldy, don't you think?

sleeping.en: It's still, for the time being.

generic.en: I don't think that spider was assembled properly.
generic.trans: 那个蜘蛛没组装对。

sleeping.en: It's taking a quick little nap.

generic.en: That's the liveliest carrot I've ever seen.
generic.trans: 这是我见过的最有活力的胡萝卜。

lore2.en: This is how it ended for them.
lore2.trans: 这就是他们当初的结局。

lore3.en: They've stood guard for a long time.

lore1.en: I don't think he foresaw this.

rock_moon.en: I never would have predicted I'd see a piece of the moon up close.
rock_moon.trans: 我从来没有预料到有一天我会近距离看到月亮。

anchor_item.en: I guess it might be useful... but I'd rather not to stay in one place for too long.
anchor_item.trans: 我想这可能有用……但我不愿在一个地方呆得太久。

yellowgem.en: It won't do much good by itself.
yellowgem.trans: 它本身不会有什么好处。

charlie_lecturn.en: My daily life is quite dramatic enough.
charlie_lecturn.trans: 我的日常生活已经足够戏剧化了。

atrium_overgrowth.en: It probably says something like "turn back while you can".
atrium_overgrowth.trans: 它说的大概是“回头是岸”吧。

quagmire_salt_rack_item.en: For harvesting salt from the pond.

miniflare.en: It'll show everyone where I am, when I am is another story.
miniflare.trans: 它会让大家看到我在哪里，我什么时候在那就是另一回事了。

rabbitking_lucky.en: I know I should catch that rabbit!
rabbitking_lucky.trans: 我就知道我应该抓住那只兔子！

berries_cooked.en: Well, now they're kind of a hot mush...

basalt.en: That's too strong to break through!

spiderqueen.en: Just whose idea was it to make the spiders here so big?! I'd like to have a word.
spiderqueen.trans: 是谁让这里的蜘蛛长这么大的？我想跟他谈谈。

tacklestation.en: Fishing is so bothersome, it takes so much time and preparation!
tacklestation.trans: 钓鱼太麻烦了，不仅耗时，还要准备！

growing.en: Grow faster! I have things to do!
growing.trans: 长快点！ 我还有事要做！

withered.en: Did I forget to water it again?
withered.trans: 我是不是又忘了给它浇水？

generic.en: It's definitely a plant.
generic.trans: 这绝对是一种植物。

hammer_mjolnir.en: It's a heavy hammer for hitting things.
hammer_mjolnir.trans: 这把敲东西的锤子可真重。

quagmire_turnip_cooked.trans: 做饭就是将科学付诸实践。

raincoat.en: It keeps me warm and dry.

inert.en: Hmm, aren't there supposed to be gems on it? Or does that come later...
inert.trans: 嗯，这上面不是应该有宝石吗？还是后来才有的……

generic.en: Ah! There you are, you old codger!
generic.trans: 啊！你在这里，你这个老顽固！

hungry.en: Oh botheration, I bet you're hungry.
hungry.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我打赌你饿了。

starving.en: I think she might actually eat me if I don't feed her soon.
starving.trans: 如果我不尽快喂她，她可能真的会吃掉我。

generic.en: When did you dye your feathers?
generic.trans: 你是什么时候染的羽毛？

sleeping.en: This is no time for sleeping!

greenmooneye.en: It'll help me keep track of where I've been.
greenmooneye.trans: 它可以帮助我追踪我去过的地方。

krampus_sack.trans: 给我的吗？你不用这么客气！

green_cap_cooked.en: For some reason the thought of eating it isn't so repulsive now.
green_cap_cooked.trans: 不知道为什么，现在想想吃起来也不那么恶心了。

held.en: I hope it doesn't start growing in there.
held.trans: 我希望它不会在里面开始生长。

generic.en: Float along now.
generic.trans: 漂浮起来了。

halloweencandy_9.en: Chewy, and only a little wormy.
halloweencandy_9.trans: 挺有嚼头的，就是虫子多了点。

hiding.en: I know you're hiding in there.

awake.en: You'll never catch me! I've outsmarted you and your ilk at every turn!
awake.trans: 你永远也抓不住我！我每次都比你和你的爪牙更聪明！

rock_avocado_fruit_ripe_cooked.en: I don't know if it was worth the time to cook it.
rock_avocado_fruit_ripe_cooked.trans: 花时间烹饪它也不知道是不是值得。

halloweencandy_7.en: A little extra fiber never hurt anyone.
halloweencandy_7.trans: 一点额外的纤维不会伤害任何人。

robot_blueprint.en: I might need a screwdriver instead of a sewing needle.
robot_blueprint.trans: 我需要的是一把螺丝刀，而不是一根绣花针。

koalefant_winter.en: It's grown a warm winter coat.
koalefant_winter.trans: 它长出了一件温暖的冬衣。

slurtleslime.en: Oh botheration, I think I got some on the bottom of my shoe...
slurtleslime.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！我鞋底好像粘到了一些……

mask_dollhat.en: Something about it makes my skin crawl...
mask_dollhat.trans: 它的某些东西让我皮肤发痒……

gingerbreadwarg.en: I think I've lost my appetite...
gingerbreadwarg.trans: 我想我已经没有任何食欲了……

halloweencandy_1.en: An apple improved by a delicious candy coating.
halloweencandy_1.trans: 涂了美味糖果涂层的苹果。

halloweencandy_2.en: Delicious candied corn to munch on.
halloweencandy_2.trans: 值得咀嚼的美味糖果玉米。

recharging.en: This might take a moment. Nobody do anything dangerous in the meantime!
recharging.trans: 这可能需要一些时间。在此期间，不要做任何危险的事情！

generic.en: I like to be prepared for any eventuality.
generic.trans: 我喜欢为各种终极状况做好准备。

generic.en: It'll extend the expiration date.
generic.trans: 可以延长一下保质期。

halloweencandy_5.en: I'll stash some extras in my pocket, I'm sure the children would love some hard candy.
halloweencandy_5.trans: 我会在我的口袋里多藏一点，我相信有孩子会喜欢硬糖的。

halloweencandy_6.en: Do you think I was born yesterday?
halloweencandy_6.trans: 你认为我是昨天才出生的吗？

halloweencandy_3.en: Who is trying to pass this ordinary corn cob off as candy?
halloweencandy_3.trans: 是谁在拿根普通的玉米棒子混充糖果？

halloweencandy_4.en: That'll be something to chew on for a while.
halloweencandy_4.trans: 这个东西够我嚼一段时间了。

wx78module_music.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_music.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

hungry.en: Is it feeding time again already?

starving.en: Oh botheration, did I forget to feed you again?
starving.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我又忘记喂你了吗？

content.en: She looks about as happy as a bug covered in lava can look.
content.trans: 作为一只被熔岩覆盖的虫子，她看起来已经很高兴了。

generic.en: She seems to like me for some reason.
generic.trans: 出于某种原因，她似乎很喜欢我。

salty_doghat.en: The fur trim is quite fetching.

blueamulet.en: Just looking at it chills me to the bone.
blueamulet.trans: 仅仅是看着它都让我背脊发凉。

bushhat.en: Hiding is always preferable to fighting.

cookiecutterhat.en: If you step back a good ways and squint, it almost looks fashionable.
cookiecutterhat.trans: 如果你退后一步，眯起眼睛，它几乎看起来很时尚。

halloweenpotion_bravery.en: Fear keeps you safe, but bravery keeps you going.
halloweenpotion_bravery.trans: 恐惧使你安全，但勇敢使你前进。

bananapop.en: There's nothing quicker and simpler than fruit on a stick.
bananapop.trans: 没有什么比棍子上的水果更快、更简单了。

bootleg.en: Hmph. That's no proper spacial displacement device, just a cheap knockoff!
bootleg.trans: 呣。那算不上正规的空间位移装置，充其量就是个廉价的冒牌货！
