lightcrab.en: I'm thankful for any speck of light around here.
lightcrab.trans: 我对这里的任何一丝光亮都心存感激。

deer_gemmed.en: It's being controlled by that beast!

moon_fissure_plugged.en: It makes a delightful little toot sound from time to time.
moon_fissure_plugged.trans: 它不时地发出令人愉快的小嘟嘟声。

icepack.en: It'll give my food a longer lifespan.
icepack.trans: 这将使我的食物有更长的寿命。

wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: The dark merm kingdom timeline? Again?
wurt_swampitem_shadow.trans: 黑暗鱼人国度时间线？又来？

upgraded_stacksize.en: I can always use more space for trinkets.
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 存放小饰品的空间再多也不嫌多。

generic.en: Less cluttering up my pockets means less cluttering up my mind.
generic.trans: 减少口袋里的杂物意味着减少思想上的混乱。

burnt.en: I probably should have seen that coming.

grass_umbrella.en: Quite the afternoonified rain napper, isn't it?

boat_ancient_container.en: It's probably a good idea not to leave all my valuables out on the deck.
boat_ancient_container.trans: 我最好别把所有贵重物品都放在甲板上。

burning.en: That doesn't bode well for us.
burning.trans: 这对我们来说不是好兆头。

sleep.en: That young lady is a genius!
sleep.trans: 那位年轻的女士是个天才!

burnt.en: I wonder how quickly she can build a new one...
burnt.trans: 我想知道她能以多快的速度建造一个新的……

generic.en: That young lady is a genius!
generic.trans: 那位年轻的女士是个天才!

gestalt.en: Would making a deal with another mysterious entity be pushing my luck?
gestalt.trans: 与另一个神秘体做交易会不会是玩过头了？

lunarplant_husk.en: What an interesting material, I should make use of it.
lunarplant_husk.trans: 多么有趣的材料，我要利用好它。

critter_lunarmothling.en: Time flies, and so do you!

bonestew.en: Was leaving the bone in really necessary?
bonestew.trans: 真的有必要在里面留下块骨头吗？

yotb_stage_item.trans: 真倒霉，并没有提前组装好。

phonograph.en: Shall we play something new or something old?
phonograph.trans: 播点新歌还是老歌好呢？

halloween_ornament_1.en: What a gloomy way to celebrate.
halloween_ornament_1.trans: 多么阴郁的庆祝方式啊。

halloween_ornament_2.en: I guess I could spend a little time decorating.
halloween_ornament_2.trans: 我想我可以花一点时间来装饰。

halloween_ornament_3.en: Ugh, I don't want to be reminded of them.
halloween_ornament_3.trans: 呃，别让我想起这些东西。

halloween_ornament_4.en: I might as well put it up somewhere.

rat.en: I'm getting dizzy just watching it.
rat.trans: 我光是看着都觉得头晕。

burnt.en: Oh botheration, now I'll have to build another!
burnt.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。这下我又要做一个！

generic.en: I wish I could improve my own sense of direction...
generic.trans: 我希望我可以改善自己的方向感……

lunarthrall_plant.en: This is going to be bothersome...

halloween_ornament_5.en: It's meant to be displayed on a tree, if I recall.
halloween_ornament_5.trans: 我要是没记错的话，是应该挂在树上的。

halloween_ornament_6.en: There's so many real ones flying about, it seems a bit redundant.
halloween_ornament_6.trans: 有那么多活的在飞，它似乎有点多余了。

costume_princess_body.en: A rather fancy outfit for a horse.
costume_princess_body.trans: 给马穿的也未免太花哨了。

burnt.en: Gone in an instant.

generic.en: This will be a giant time sink if I'm not careful...
generic.trans: 我要是稍不留神，就会在这个上花过多的时间……

empty.en: Now, what was the trick with this one?
empty.trans: 这又是怎么回事？

nightmaregrowth.en: They're here! I need to leave, quickly!
nightmaregrowth.trans: 他们来了！我要离开这，快！

webber_spider_minion.en: I guess they're fighting for us.
webber_spider_minion.trans: 可以说他们是在为我们战斗吧。

cutreeds.en: I'll put it in my pocket and use it for something later.
cutreeds.trans: 我先把它放在口袋里，以后再用它来做什么。

pinecone_sapling.en: I think it's growing slowly on purpose, just to annoy me.
pinecone_sapling.trans: 我估计它故意缓慢增长只是为了惹恼我。

ancient_statue.en: What's left from a time long ago.

yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.en: Time to get my carrat up and running.
yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.trans: 该我的胡萝卜鼠跑起来了。

rat.trans: 它看起来已经聪明多了！

generic.en: I want my carrat to be a quick thinker.
generic.trans: 我希望我的胡萝卜鼠反应要快。

burnt.en: That sure burnt away quickly.

book_moon.en: Do we really want to tamper with the moon? Oh, who am I to talk?
book_moon.trans: 我们真的要对月球做手脚吗？嗨，我有什么资格这么说呢？

dug.en: It's not like they were going to use any of that stuff.
dug.trans: 反正他们并不打算使用这些东西。

generic.en: You'll never catch me in one of those.
generic.trans: 我永远都不会钻进去的。

lunarplanthat.en: It's incredible that I can see anything while wearing it.
lunarplanthat.trans: 真没想到戴着它还能看见东西。

turfcraftingstation.en: I've tampered with time, I guess I could tamper with the ground a bit too.
turfcraftingstation.trans: 时间我都能篡改，土地我应该也行。

active.en: With this I can surely pass through space and time!
active.trans: 有了这个，我肯定可以穿越时空！

partial.en: Soon, the invention will be complete!
partial.trans: 很快，这个发明就要大功告成！

generic.en: This appears to be a nexus to another world!
generic.trans: 这好像可以通往另一个世界！

chesspiece_toadstool.en: Such fun memories of almost being killed by a giant toad.
chesspiece_toadstool.trans: 如此有趣的记忆，差点被一只巨大的蟾蜍杀死。

houndbone.en: Old bones. Let's not dwell on them.
houndbone.trans: 一堆旧骨头。不要纠结了。

hivehat.trans: 真是奇怪又令人欢喜啊！

generic.en: Who's a cute little bug thing? You are!
generic.trans: 谁是可爱的小虫子呢？就是你！

sleeping.en: Sleeping again?

otter.en: It's obviously up to no good.
otter.trans: 这家伙一看就图谋不轨。

shadow_forge.en: Quite a nice change of pace to have shadows working for me.
shadow_forge.trans: 让暗影给我打工可真是一个不错的转变呐。

chesspiece_kitcoon.en: Oh, a precariously tall statue, what could go wrong?
chesspiece_kitcoon.trans: 哦，一个岌岌可危的高大雕像，会出什么问题吗？

record_balatro.en: I've heard it before and I'll hear it again.
record_balatro.trans: 我听过这曲子，以后还会再听。

quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.en: I can put a meal together in a pinch.
quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.trans: 在紧要关头，我可以做出一顿美餐。

chesspiece_bearger.en: Not one of my fondest memories.
chesspiece_bearger.trans: 这不是我最美好的记忆之一。

veggie_oversized_rotten.en: Botheration! Time has gotten its claws into it!
veggie_oversized_rotten.trans: 麻烦呐！时间已经把爪子伸进去了！

stalker.en: This was a bad idea. I have regrets.
stalker.trans: 这是个坏主意。我后悔了。

portabletent_item.en: Someone with more time on their hands should set it up.

dug_berrybush.en: No time for picking, I'll just take it all with me!
dug_berrybush.trans: 没有时间挑了，我全部带走好了！

moonglass_rock.en: Jagged glass coming from the ground, what could go wrong?
moonglass_rock.trans: 锯齿状的玻璃从地下冒出来，这能出什么问题？

scraphat.en: I like it much better as a hat.
scraphat.trans: 我更喜欢把它当帽子戴。

unwritten.en: There's nothing written here. What an unhelpful sign!
unwritten.trans: 什么都没写。毫无帮助的指示牌！

burnt.en: That's a bad sign.

generic.en: That must be some kind of sign.
generic.trans: 是个指示牌。

ghost.en: Don't fret, a little isolated time flippery will make you right as rain.
ghost.trans: 不要有顾虑，稍作休息之后身体会更好。

firestarter.en: Is that what passes for "science" now, %s?
firestarter.trans: 现如今你就拿这个混充“科学”了，%s？

murderer.en: %s! What have you done?!
murderer.trans: %s！你都做了什么？！

attacker.en: So much for "gentleman" scientist, %s.
attacker.trans: 别再提什么“绅士”科学家了，%s。

reviver.en: Was that really science, %s? Ah, who am I to question it.
reviver.trans: 那个真是科学吗，%s？啊，我有什么资格质疑呢。

generic.en: %s! I think I was supposed to tell you something, now what was it...
generic.trans: %s！我本来有事情要跟你说的，是什么来着……

quagmire_goatmilk.en: Good if you don't think about where it came from.
quagmire_goatmilk.trans: 挺好的，只要你别去想它的来源。

remains_eye_bone.trans: 它没能承受住旅途跋涉。

remains_glommerflower.trans: 它没能承受住旅途跋涉。

remains_thingie.en: Oh. I don't even remember what that was.
remains_thingie.trans: 哦。我也记不得那是什么了。

generic.en: What a mess.
generic.trans: 真是一团糟

burnt.en: Oh botheration, now I have to build another one!
burnt.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。这下我又要做一个！

generic.en: The ocean is so much more finicky to navigate than the time stream.
generic.trans: 海洋比时间流要难驾驭得多。

leafymeatsouffle.en: This flummery has an odd taste to it.

firepen.en: She should really warn people about borrowing her pens.
firepen.trans: 她应该告诫别人不要借她的笔。

moon_altar_seed.en: This isn't where it needs to be.

stuffing.en: I'm never too full for a little extra stuffing.
stuffing.trans: 我再饱也愿意多吃点馅料。

burning.en: That doesn't bode well for us.
burning.trans: 这对我们来说不是好兆头。

generic.en: I like this very much.
generic.trans: 我十分喜欢这个东西。

burnt.en: I wonder how quickly she can build a new one...
burnt.trans: 我想知道她能以多快的速度建造一个新的……

durian_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
durian_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

cave_banana_burnt.en: It's fine! Just scrape off the burnt edges!
cave_banana_burnt.trans: 没关系的! 只要把烧焦的边缘刮掉就可以了！

pomegranate_cooked.en: It seemed like a better idea in my head.
pomegranate_cooked.trans: 我构思的时候还觉得是个好主意。

beardhair.en: I know it's the wilderness, but does he have to leave whiskers everywhere?
beardhair.trans: 我知道这是荒野，但他就能到处丢胡须吗？

pomegranate_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
pomegranate_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

seastack.en: Don't you dare hit my boat!

cookedmonstermeat.en: Somehow cooking it didn't make it much better.
cookedmonstermeat.trans: 不知为何，烹饪它并没有让它变得更好。

mandrake.en: Oh, I can't bear to look at it...

type3.en: I'm still not sure who left these here.
type3.trans: 我仍然不确定是谁把这些东西留在这里的。

type2.en: I've seen it before and I'll probably see it again.
type2.trans: 我以前见过，以后可能还会遇到。

type1.en: I don't have much patience for art.
type1.trans: 我对艺术没有什么耐心。

generic.en: I can gawk at them later, they're not going anywhere.
generic.trans: 我可以以后再看它们，反正它们哪里也不会去。

carnival_host.en: Hello there, Goodfeather. How long has it been?
carnival_host.trans: 你好，良羽。咱们有多长时间没见了？

eyeofterror_mini.en: My eyes aren't the best, but I'm not looking for replacements anytime soon!
eyeofterror_mini.trans: 我的眼睛虽然一般，但是我近期也没打算换！

underground.en: It's one of those little pests.
underground.trans: 这是其中的一个小捣蛋。

held.en: Got you at last, you little vermin!
held.trans: 终于抓到你了，你这个小捣蛋！

aboveground.en: I've spent enough time dealing with your shenanigans!
aboveground.trans: 我已经花了太多时间对付你的恶作剧了！

cutstone.en: Humans have been building with stone blocks for centuries.
cutstone.trans: 几个世纪以来，人类一直在用石块做建筑。

alterguardian_phase2spike.en: Nice try, but not even time can trap me!
alterguardian_phase2spike.trans: 想得美，但即使是时间也无法困住我！

ghostlyelixir_revive.en: A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.
ghostlyelixir_revive.trans: 一点点玄学上的干预不会伤害任何人。

turf_vault.en: Slightly more interesting to look at, but still just ground.
turf_vault.trans: 虽然看着有意思一点，但终究就是土地。

icecream.en: Alright, maybe just a bowl or two.

has_item.en: Yes, there is something on it.

generic.en: A table. Will wonders never cease.
generic.trans: 一张桌子。奇迹永不停止。

burnt.en: Its days were numbered in a place like this.
burnt.trans: 在这样的地方，它的日子原本就屈指可数。

fishtacos.en: I'll get a taco to go!

merm_tool_upgraded.en: I doubt it'll stand the test of time.
merm_tool_upgraded.trans: 我怀疑它经不起时间的考验。

held.en: Don't you dare peck at my pocket watches while you're in there!
held.trans: 你在里面的时候可别啄我的怀表啊！

generic.en: As long as you don't come with any bad omens, we'll get along fine.
generic.trans: 只要你不带着任何坏兆头来，我们就会相处得很好。

treasurechest_trap.en: Did I leave this here? Hm...
treasurechest_trap.trans: 我把这个留在这里了吗？嗯……

oceanfishingbobber_canary.en: I knew I'd find a use for that feather eventually!
oceanfishingbobber_canary.trans: 我知道我终会为那根羽毛找到用途!

winter_ornamentforge.en: I must have missed this one.

burning.en: That's not good.

picked.trans: 浆果的生长速度如此之慢，令人沮丧！

generic.en: I can hear my stomach growling, and those berries look so tasty...
generic.trans: 我可以听到我的肚子在咕咕叫，那些浆果看起来很好吃……

barren.en: What do berry bushes need to grow again?
barren.trans: 浆果树需要什么才能再次生长？

cane.en: I don't need a cane yet! I feel fit as a fiddle!
cane.trans: 我还不需要拐杖！我觉得自己很健康！

sleepbomb.en: Who would want to spend precious time napping?
sleepbomb.trans: 谁会想把宝贵的时间花在打盹上呢？

wormlight_lesser.en: There's nothing wrong with a few wrinkles!
wormlight_lesser.trans: 有几条皱纹并没有什么不妥！

carnival_ball.trans: 一个色彩斑斓的儿童玩具。

generic.en: Water! Finally!
generic.trans: 水！总算有水了！

empty.en: There might've been water here once... or maybe there will be.
empty.trans: 以前有过水……也可能以后会有水。

sword_lunarplant.en: Oh, I quite like that one.

pepper_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
pepper_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

yotb.en: Where's that peculiar judge? He might have an appreciation for this.
yotb.trans: 那个古怪的裁判在哪里？他应该会喜欢这个。

generic.en: I love a nice memento, they help me keep track of when I am.
generic.trans: 我喜欢漂亮的纪念品，能帮助我找到身处何时。

maxwelllight.trans: 我想知道它们是怎么工作的。

wall_dreadstone.en: It's just a wall, nothing more than that.
wall_dreadstone.trans: 它只是一堵墙，仅此而已。

voidclothhat.en: Oooh, it makes one look rather mysterious, doesn't it?
voidclothhat.trans: 噢，戴上它以后马上就有神秘感了，不是吗？

carnivalfood_corntea.en: The taste is alright, but the texture...

ghostflowerhat.en: Who has time to pick flowers?

orangegem.en: It's beautiful, but more or less useless as it is.
orangegem.trans: 它是很美，但现在这样确实挺废的。

orangemooneye.en: I could fashion even more interesting things with this.
orangemooneye.trans: 我可以用它来设计更多有趣的东西。

jammypreserves.en: A jar! That's what I forgot!
jammypreserves.trans: 一个罐子！这就是我忘记的东西！

pumpkin_oversized.en: It looks like it's ready to roll away.

generic.en: It looks like an oversized chess piece.
generic.trans: 它看起来像一个超大的棋子。

struggle.trans: 发生了什么事？这不应该啊！

snowball_item.en: There's always time for a snowball fight.

shadowthrall_hands.en: Try all you might, you'll never catch me!
shadowthrall_hands.trans: 你尽管试，不可能抓住我的！

lunarrift_portal.en: Sloppy! Just look at those rough edges!
lunarrift_portal.trans: 真邋遢！瞧瞧这些粗糙的毛边！

slingshotmodkit.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

turf_ruinstiles_glow.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_ruinstiles_glow.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

high.en: Oh botheration, I got carried away with the kindling!
high.trans: 哦，麻烦呐，我柴火加多了！

low.en: It needs more to burn if I want it to last.
low.trans: 如果想让它继续烧的话，它需要更多的燃料。

embers.en: I need to give it something to burn, quickly!
embers.trans: 我需要给它一些燃烧的东西，快！

generic.en: It keeps the shadows at bay.
generic.trans: 它能让暗影远离。

out.en: I could get it going again in no time at all.
out.trans: 我马上就能让它重新烧起来。

high.en: Oh botheration, I got carried away with the kindling!
high.trans: 哦，麻烦呐，我柴火加多了！

low.en: It needs more to burn if I want it to last.
low.trans: 如果想让它继续烧的话，它需要更多的燃料。

embers.en: I need to give it something to burn, quickly!
embers.trans: 我需要给它一些燃烧的东西，快！

generic.en: It keeps the shadows at bay.
generic.trans: 它能让暗影远离。

out.en: That was nice while it lasted.

generic.en: Not exactly inviting, is it?
generic.trans: 也不是很好看吧？

burnt.en: Next time I'll use something less flammable.
burnt.trans: 下次我将使用不那么易燃的东西。

glasscutter.en: I'm impressed the glass doesn't shatter on impact.
glasscutter.trans: 玻璃在撞击后没有碎裂，真令人啧啧称奇啊。

wet.en: Oh botheration, it's turned into a wet muck!
wet.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。它变成了一坨湿泥巴!

dry.en: Oh. It's much dryer than I expected.
dry.trans: 哦。这比我想象的要干燥得多。

balanced.en: Perfect! I hope I can remember how I did it...
balanced.trans: 完美！真希望我能记住我是怎么做到的……

generic.en: Just how long is this going to take?
generic.trans: 这需要多长时间？

burnt.en: A fine mess this is...

turf_sandy.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_sandy.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

cattoy_mouse.en: What a clever little clockwork contraption!
cattoy_mouse.trans: 多么小巧的发条装置啊！

axe.en: I'm used to using more delicate tools.
axe.trans: 我习惯于使用更精细的工具。

winter_ornamentpearl.en: I should spend more time with her.

blue_cap_cooked.en: I think I made it worse.

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: It'll make me feel slightly safer at sea. Slightly.
boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 这将使我在海上多一点安全感。只是一点。

lit.en: It really is a lovely little statue.
lit.trans: 这确实是一个可爱的小雕像。

generic.en: That seems a bit out of place, doesn't it?
generic.trans: 似乎有点不太合适，不是吗？

lit.en: It does make a nice little fire, I suppose.
lit.trans: 我想，它确实能生起一小堆火。

generic.en: That seems a bit out of place, doesn't it?
generic.trans: 似乎有点不太合适，不是吗？

quagmire_goatmum.en: Reminds me of my old nanny.
quagmire_goatmum.trans: 让我想起了我的老保姆。

lit.en: I suppose I can stay and watch it, just for a minute or two.
lit.trans: 我觉得我可以留下来看看，就一两分钟。

generic.en: That seems a bit out of place, doesn't it?
generic.trans: 似乎有点不太合适，不是吗？

lavaarena_armormediumdamager.en: That could help me hit a little harder.
lavaarena_armormediumdamager.trans: 有了它我能攻击得猛烈一点。

battlesong_shadowaligned.en: Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you?
battlesong_shadowaligned.trans: 哦，你不会是想听我唱歌吧？

dumbbell.en: What a dreadfully repetitive way to spend one's time.
dumbbell.trans: 反复做同一件事来打发时间简直可怕。

chester.en: Yes, yes, you're very cute. Just be careful with my things please.
chester.trans: 是的，是的，你很可爱。请小心我的东西。

generic.en: How wonderfully efficient!
generic.trans: 效率可真高啊！

grotto_pool_small.en: It's not a pool I'd care to take a dip in.
grotto_pool_small.trans: 我不愿意泡在这池子里。

generic.en: Satisfied?
generic.trans: 满意没？

burnt.en: That's the end of that.

empty.en: What does it want now?
empty.trans: 它现在又想要什么？

warm.en: Something to warm up these old bones.

generic.en: This isn't an ordinary rock.
generic.trans: 这不是一块普通的石头。

bonesoup.en: Was leaving a chunk of bone in it really necessary?
bonesoup.trans: 真的有必要在里面留下一大块骨头吗？

mapscroll.en: It's not a map yet, but it will be in the future.
mapscroll.trans: 现在还不是地图，但将来会是。

otterden_dead.en: Just a matter of time now.

mutator_spitter.en: I don't think the poor child has a future in baking.
mutator_spitter.trans: 这可怜的孩子在烘焙方面应该不会有大发展。

redlantern.en: Luckily for me, the flame can't seem to reach the paper surrounding it.
redlantern.trans: 还好我走运，火焰没烧着包着它的纸。

off.en: Ready to fling at a moment's notice.

on.en: It's a good thing we prepared for just such an eventuality.
on.trans: 还好我们为意外情况做了准备。

boatpatch.en: I hope I won't need them...

barnaclepita.en: The barnacles fit quite nicely in that bread pocket.

wx78module_maxsanity.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

wrong_type.en: Oh botheration, what time of year is it again?
wrong_type.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。现在是什么季节？

generic.en: An empty table isn't really much to look at.
generic.trans: 空荡荡的餐桌没什么好看的。

burnt.en: Dinner might have to wait.

bathbomb.en: It might be nice to have a warm bath and unwind for a moment or two.
bathbomb.trans: 泡个热水澡，放松一两下，也许会很好。

mushroombomb.en: I knew there was a reason I don't like mushrooms!
mushroombomb.trans: 我不喜欢蘑菇是有原因的！

quagmire_grill_item.en: I'll have to grill someone about this.

voidcloth_scythe.en: Did I just hear a whisper? No, I must have imagined it.
voidcloth_scythe.trans: 我刚刚是听到了低声呢喃了？不对，应该是幻听吧。

spring.en: No more rabbit hole, for now.

generic.en: I'd better watch my step, wouldn't want to fall down a rabbit hole.
generic.trans: 我走路要小心点，可别掉进兔子洞里。

closed.trans: 哦，你真的是充满了恶意！

generic.en: I'm not falling for that again.
generic.trans: 我不会再着你的道了。

quagmire_merm_cart1.trans: 里面有什么科学原理吗？

firestarter.en: Ah... it looks like I'm in the bad timeline again.
firestarter.trans: 啊……看来我又进入了坏的时间线。

ghost.en: Don't you fret, soon it'll be like this never even happened!
ghost.trans: 你不要着急，很快这一切就会像没有发生过一样！

murderer.en: Murderer! Do you have nothing to say for yourself?!
murderer.trans: 杀人犯！你都不想为自己辩解吗？

attacker.en: Now hold on just one minute, I don't think that's part of the act!
attacker.trans: 切面，这应该不是表演了！

reviver.en: %s's actions speak louder than his words.
reviver.trans: %s的善行胜于雄辩。

generic.en: Sorry %s, I have no time for charades!
generic.trans: 抱歉，%s，我没时间猜哑谜！

somehoney.en: Why does honey take so long to make?

generic.en: She's quite creative with her limited materials.
generic.trans: 她用有限的材料上发挥出了十足的创意。

burnt.en: It looks like its honey making days are behind it.
burnt.trans: 看起来它制造蜂蜜的日子已经过去。

nohoney.en: Not even a drop of honey inside.
nohoney.trans: 里面连一滴蜂蜜都没有。

cabbagerolls.en: Meat rolled in cabbage, simple as that.
cabbagerolls.trans: 肉卷在卷心菜里，就这么简单。

burning.en: I would've thought the water from the fishbowl would help douse the flames...
burning.trans: 我本来以为鱼缸里的水会浇灭火焰……

burnt.en: I was too late to save it.

generic.en: That's quite an extravagant fishbowl.
generic.trans: 相当奢侈的鱼缸啊。

quagmire_altar_bollard.en: As far as posts go, this one is adequate.
quagmire_altar_bollard.trans: 就柱子而言, 这根足够了。

leif_sparse.en: Even the trees are out to get me!

lobsterbisque.en: Would it be a frivolous use of time travel to go back and eat it over and over again?
lobsterbisque.trans: 穿越回过去一遍一遍的吃它会不会有点过？

yotr_food4.en: What could be better than food on a stick?
yotr_food4.trans: 世间有比签子上串的食物更好的东西吗？

yotr_food3.trans: 多么时尚的果冻甜点啊！

bugnet.en: It'll be faster than trying to catch them with my hands.
bugnet.trans: 这比我用手去抓它们要快。

yotr_food2.en: I'd nearly forgotten what "blue" tasted like.
yotr_food2.trans: 我都差点忘了“蓝色”是什么味道了。

yotr_food1.en: Oh, well, perhaps just a quick slice or two.
yotr_food1.trans: 好吧，那就抓紧吃两片吧。

palmcone_sapling.en: It's about halfway through its life cycle.
palmcone_sapling.trans: 它的生命周期大约过了一半。

slingshotammo_slow.en: Tampering with the timestream, are we? Good lad.

transistor.en: Is this one of those newfangled electric thinga-ma-whoosits?
transistor.trans: 这就是新奇的电动组件吗？

broken_forgeditem.en: It looks well past its prime.
broken_forgeditem.trans: 它看起来已经过了鼎盛时期。

monkey.en: They're up to their old tricks.
monkey.trans: 它们又开始玩起了老把戏。

book_rain.en: Rituals, hm? The old girl's got some tricks up her sleeve.
book_rain.trans: 仪式吗？本姑娘袖子里也藏了不少呢。

generic.en: Do you ever blink?
generic.trans: 你曾经眨过眼吗？

fruitflyfruit.en: I'd rather not start attracting flies, but it could be useful.
fruitflyfruit.trans: 我不想引来苍蝇，但它可能是有用的。

deer_antler.en: This looks like a key piece to a puzzle...
deer_antler.trans: 这看起来像一个关键的拼图……

merm_prince.en: What a delightfully odd way to choose a king!
merm_prince.trans: 这种选国王的方式真是既古怪，又极具娱乐性啊！

lucy.en: "Lucy" was it? Oh botheration, now he's got ME talking to it!
lucy.trans: 是叫“露西”吧？嗷，麻烦呐。这下他让我也开始跟它对话了！

whip.en: This should keep most creatures at bay.
whip.trans: 这个应该能让很多生物听话。

frogfishbowl.en: It tastes better than it looks.
frogfishbowl.trans: 它的味道比它看起来更好。

valid.en: Well, might as well put it to use.

gems.en: I can't believe how much energy this thing requires to work.
gems.trans: 很难相信这东西需要这么多能量才能运转。

desiccant.en: It should keep me from getting too waterlogged.
desiccant.trans: 这样我就不会被浸得湿透。

ghostflower.en: It's little more than a memory.

firestarter.en: Really, %s. You should know better at your age!
firestarter.trans: 真是的，%s。你都这个年龄了还不懂事！

ghost.en: Your time isn't over yet %s, not on my watch!
ghost.trans: 你的时间还没到，%s，有我在，放心吧！

murderer.en: Murderer! Your time ends now!
murderer.trans: 杀人犯！你的时间马上就要结束了！

attacker.en: %s! What's gotten into you?
attacker.trans: %s！你又怎么了？

reviver.en: We should all be more cautious in the future.
reviver.trans: 我们今后都应该更加谨慎。

generic.en: You're looking well, %s!
generic.trans: 你气色不错啊，%s！

waterplant_bomb.en: Oh botheration, I have to contend with angry flower spittle?
waterplant_bomb.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我现在都要跟愤怒的植物唾液斗争了？

generic.en: A frozen chunk of future water.
generic.trans: 一块冻结的未来之水。

crabking_claw.en: You keep those big old snippers away from me!
crabking_claw.trans: 你那些大钳子离我远点！

waterballoon.en: Don't think I won't throw it!

veggieomlet.en: Why waste time washing extra dishes when you can eat out of the pan?
veggieomlet.trans: 既然能从锅里吃东西，为什么还要把时间浪费在洗碗上呢？

wortox_reviver.en: It's more efficient to just avoid dying.

bodypillow_kelp.en: Who thought this was a good idea?

mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.en: A bit unsettling, but at least it casts a decent light.
mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.trans: 有点令人不安，但这道光确实像那么回事。

featherfan.en: I've never seen a feather so big! Or have I...
featherfan.trans: 我从来没有见过这么大的羽毛！对吧……

marked_differentshard.en: It'll be a big jump, but I can make it!
marked_differentshard.trans: 这将是一个很大的跳跃，但我可以做到！

unmarked.en: Ah, that takes me way back.
unmarked.trans: 啊，让我回去了好远一段。

recharging.trans: 快点啊，时间在滴答滴答流走！

marked_sameshard.en: Is it time for me to take a dip in the timestream?
marked_sameshard.trans: 是时候跳进时间流了吗？

generic.en: Ah, that takes me way back.
generic.trans: 啊，让我回去了好远一段。

mast_malbatross_item.en: The sooner I put it on my boat the faster I'll be on my way.
mast_malbatross_item.trans: 我越早把它放在我的船上，我就能越快起航。

scanning.en: Please buzz around elsewhere, you're distracting me!
scanning.trans: 请你去别的地方嗡嗡响，你让我很分神！

hunting.en: Please buzz around elsewhere, you're distracting me!
hunting.trans: 请你去别的地方嗡嗡响，你让我很分神！

generic.en: Please buzz around elsewhere, you're distracting me!
generic.trans: 请你去别的地方嗡嗡响，你让我很分神！

generic.en: Well, this isn't working.
generic.trans: 好吧，这样不行。

open.en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained. Famous last words...
open.trans: 舍不得孩子就套不着狼。这是一个常见的死因……

full.en: Finish up in there, I don't have all day to wait!
full.trans: 里面的人快点结束，我可没时间等你们一天！

spear_wathgrithr.en: ...I should try to stay on her good side.

ghostlyelixir_attack.en: A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.
ghostlyelixir_attack.trans: 一点点玄学上的干预不会伤害任何人。

nightmarepie.en: I usually trust Warly's dishes, but this one seems suspect.
nightmarepie.trans: 沃利的菜肴基本都信得过，但这道菜似乎很可疑。

rocky.en: You keep those claws far away from me!
rocky.trans: 你让那些爪子离我远一点！

rocks.en: A handful of stones, absolutely thrilling!

turf_deciduous.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_deciduous.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

kitcoon_deciduous.en: Oh how adorable, and conveniently pocket-sized!
kitcoon_deciduous.trans: 哦，多么可爱，而且还是便携的口袋款！

peghook.trans: 那家伙喷出来的东西有腐蚀性！

turf_grass.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_grass.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

pigking.en: He can be reasonable enough once you get to know him.
pigking.trans: 一旦你们认识了，他就会变得很通情达理。

butter.en: If only I had some tea and toast.
butter.trans: 如果我有一些茶和吐司就好了。

molehill.en: I thought they were bigger... my memory must've exaggerated it.
molehill.trans: 我以为它们会更大……一定是我的记忆夸大了它。

monstermeat_dried.en: All the life's dried out of it.
monstermeat_dried.trans: 它所有的生命都已经风干了。

panflute.en: I haven't spent much time practicing...

chesspiece_deerclops.en: I'd be happy if I never have to see it again.

saltlick_improved.trans: 能让皮弗娄牛有得忙就行。

dug_marsh_bush.en: I can put it somewhere later. Or maybe even earlier.
dug_marsh_bush.trans: 我以后给它找个地方。或者去以前也行。

lots_of_flowers.en: I hope she finds some comfort in this.
lots_of_flowers.trans: 我希望她能从中找到一些安慰。

lots_of_flowers_blossom.en: I don't want to know what's making that noise.
lots_of_flowers_blossom.trans: 我不想知道是什么在发出那个声音。

some_flowers.en: Well... I guess it wouldn't take too long to gather a few flowers.
some_flowers.trans: 嗯……摘几朵花应该不会很久。

generic.en: Death should be the farthest thing from a child's mind...
generic.trans: 死亡应该是孩子心目中最遥远的事情……

quagmire_swampig.trans: 这是一头超级多毛的猪。

cookedsmallmeat.en: It's at least enough to hold me over for the time being.
cookedsmallmeat.trans: 这至少足以让我在这段时间内不饿肚子。

dock_kit.en: Can't someone with more time on their hands set it up?
dock_kit.trans: 就不能找个更有时间的人把它装好吗？

durian_cooked.en: It tastes better than it smells, but that's not saying much.
durian_cooked.trans: 它的味道比它的气味要好，但也好不到哪去。

mast_malbatross.en: I can finally get this old boat up to speed!
mast_malbatross.trans: 我终于可以让这艘老船提速了!

fig.trans: 一个丰满、甜美的无花果。

wobster_den.trans: 有东西从里面探出头来……

bomb_lunarplant.en: This should end a fight quickly.
bomb_lunarplant.trans: 这东西应该能迅速结束战斗。

surfnturf.en: Perfect for people who can't make up their mind.
surfnturf.trans: 非常适合那些决定困难户。

portableblender_item.en: It does a lively little jig.

amulet.en: I'll breathe easier knowing I have a backup plan.
amulet.trans: 知道我有一个后备计划以后，我松了口气。

ripe.en: It's a shame they're so delicious.
ripe.trans: 真可惜，它们是如此美味。

sleeping.en: I guess it doesn't have anything better to do.
sleeping.trans: 我想它没有什么更好的事情可做。

generic.en: What a funny little creature.
generic.trans: 多么有趣的小生物。

burning.en: That's not good.

picked.en: Why do berries take so long to grow back?
picked.trans: 为什么浆果需要这么长时间才能重新长出来？

withered.en: Everything is withering away in this heat.
withered.trans: 在这种高温下，一切都在枯萎。

generic.en: Aha! A ready supply of food!
generic.trans: 啊哈，一个现成的食物供给！

barren.en: It needs something to get it growing again.
barren.trans: 它需要一些东西来让它重新生长。

bat.en: Stay out of my hair, it's enough of a bat's nest already!
bat.trans: 离我的头发远一点，那里已经像一个蝙蝠窝一样了！

refined_dust.en: It's likely to crumble away at any moment.
refined_dust.trans: 它随时都有可能崩成粉。

magician_chest.en: Oh, what a handy little pocket dimension!
magician_chest.trans: 这个口袋维度太方便了！

buzzard.en: You're wasting your time following me, buzzard.
buzzard.trans: 你跟着我是浪费时间，秃鹫。

purpleamulet.en: Keep that thing away from me!

pepperpopper.en: They took far too long to make... but they are tasty.
pepperpopper.trans: 做这个太花时间了……不过味道真是一绝啊。

fence_gate_item.en: If I don't build it now I'll just have to do it later.
fence_gate_item.trans: 我就算现在不建，以后也得建。

walkingplank_yotd.trans: 华丽了一些，但还是一样的不祥。

orangeamulet.en: I can save so much time if I don't have to stop and pick things up!
orangeamulet.trans: 如果不用停下来捡东西的话，就可以节省很多时间！

mushroomhat.en: I don't like the idea of a mushroom growing on my head.
mushroomhat.trans: 我不喜欢从头顶上长出一颗蘑菇。

turf_meteor.en: Slightly more interesting to look at, but still just ground.
turf_meteor.trans: 虽然看着有意思一点，但终究就是土地。

salsa.en: I guess I could spare some time for a quick snack...
salsa.trans: 我可以抽点时间出来快速地吃点小吃……

minifan.en: You're never too old for a bit of fun!

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: It's given me a new perspective on gardening. Quite literally.
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 它给了我一个看待园艺的新视角。全新的视角。

stump.en: Where'd the tree go? I'm stumped.
stump.trans: 那棵树哪去了？真是一桩谜题。

generic.en: It's full of delicious, delicious sap.
generic.trans: 它含有大量美味可口的树液。

playing.en: Could they not be a bit bigger?

generic.en: It leads down into the game's inner workings.
generic.trans: 它指向了游戏的内部运作。

winter_ornamentlight.en: Is this one of those electric candles I've heard about?
winter_ornamentlight.trans: 这是我听说过的那种电蜡烛吗？

boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.en: This could be troublesome, if deployed at exactly the right moment...
boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.trans: 部署时间得当的话，它可能会带来麻烦……

lava_pond_rock.en: You've seen one rock, you've seen them all.
lava_pond_rock.trans: 见过一块石头就等于见过所有的石头了。

tomato.trans: 丰满多汁的西红柿，真令人愉快。

sleeping.en: Who has time to sleep?

generic.en: So young, so full of life.
generic.trans: 如此年轻，如此充满生机。

book_light_upgraded.en: Let's keep this one close at hand, shall we?
book_light_upgraded.trans: 把这本书随时带在身上可好？

spider_whistle.en: Oh, is he throwing a little spider party?
spider_whistle.trans: 哦，他在举办一个小蜘蛛聚会吗？

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: A quick way to catch big fish? Don't mind if I do!
oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.trans: 快速捕获大鱼的方法？那我就恭敬不如从命了！

maxwelllock.en: Looks almost like a key hole.
maxwelllock.trans: 看起来就像一个钥匙孔。

burnt.en: That's the end of that.

generic.en: Well... I guess I have a little time to spare.
generic.trans: 嗯……我也是可以匀一点时间出来的。

empty.en: Any bright ideas?
empty.trans: 有什么好主意吗？

crimson.en: Oh, it didn't take well to shadow magic, did it?
crimson.trans: 哦，它对影子魔法不感冒吗？

waiting_for_dark.en: I have a rather terrible feeling about this...
waiting_for_dark.trans: 我有一种十分不祥的感觉……

cooldown.en: It's dormant, for the time being at least.
cooldown.trans: 它处于休眠期，至少目前是这样。

spawn_disabled.en: It doesn't seem to be active, perhaps now I can tinker with it...
spawn_disabled.trans: 它似乎待机了，也许现在我可以鼓捣一下它……

enabled.en: Being right all the time is getting old.
enabled.trans: 保持永远正确这种想法已经过时了。

generic.en: Does anyone else feel that shiver of interdimensionality in the air?
generic.trans: 你们其他人感觉到空气中那种跨维度的颤抖了吗？

kelp.en: It tastes about as good as it looks.

lavaarena_lightdamagerhat.en: My strikes would hurt a little more wearing that.

lavaarena_spawner.en: This is where those enemies are coming from.

differentshard.en: It won't stay open forever. Come along everyone, tick-tock!
differentshard.trans: 它不会一直开着。大伙快过来吧，争分夺秒啊！

generic.en: It won't stay open forever. Come along everyone, tick-tock!
generic.trans: 它不会一直开着。大伙快过来吧，争分夺秒啊！

icehound.en: What did I ever do to you?!

generic.en: Turns out a key was the key to getting in.
generic.trans: 没钥匙不行。

dead.en: I like them better this way.

sleeping.en: At least it's not causing any trouble.
sleeping.trans: 至少它没有造成任何麻烦。

generic.en: Why don't you just run along? Go do spider things.
generic.trans: 你不走开还等什么？去做蜘蛛的事情吧。

struggle.trans: 发生了什么事？这不应该啊！

generic.en: Who sculpted these?
generic.trans: 这些是谁雕刻的？

quagmire_beefalo.en: Science says it should have died by now.

woby_treat.en: I suppose with a really strong cup of tea... nah.
woby_treat.trans: 要是配上一杯特别浓的茶……算了。

held.en: It seemed like a good idea at the time.
held.trans: 这在当时似乎是个好主意。

generic.en: It's thinking about stinging me, I can see it in its beady eyes.
generic.trans: 它想蜇我，我可以从它那双炯炯有神的眼睛里看出来。

multiplayer_portal.en: Parts of this mechanism look... familiar...
multiplayer_portal.trans: 这套装置有些地方看着……眼熟……

record_worktobedone.trans: 我更喜欢他们后来的作品。

potatosack.en: Who would want to lug this heavy thing around?
potatosack.trans: 谁想拖着这么重的东西到处走呢？

turf_cotl_brick.en: You've seen one brick, you've seen them all.
turf_cotl_brick.trans: 当你看到了一块砖，你也就看到了所有的砖块。

burning.en: Maybe that was supposed to happen.

poison.en: Mind your own business, you pesky tree!
poison.trans: 管好你自己的事，你这棵讨厌的树！

chopped.en: Its time in this world was cut short.
chopped.trans: 它在这个世界上的时间被缩短了。

generic.en: It's certainly a tree.
generic.trans: 这肯定是一棵树。

burnt.en: Well, what's done is done. For now anyway.
burnt.trans: 哎，也只能接受发生的事情了。现在只好如此。

wagstaff_item_1.en: How did this glove come to be?

yotc_seedpacket_rare.en: They're of a higher quality than the usual seeds.
yotc_seedpacket_rare.trans: 它们的质量比一般的种子要高。

mermwatchtower_regular.en: That little merm is really turning this place around.
mermwatchtower_regular.trans: 那只小鱼人真的让这个地方发生了变化。

generic.en: A particularly bad mushroom.
generic.trans: 一个特别糟糕的蘑菇。

acidcovered.en: I will not soon forget this odor.
acidcovered.trans: 我不会马上忘记这种气味。

lumpy_sapling.trans: 它似乎决心要生存下去。

asparagussoup.en: A nice warm bowl of soup.

bedroll_straw.en: That doesn't look comfortable at all.

generic.en: I think that young man might be more mischievous than he appears.
generic.trans: 那个年轻人长相虽然老实，但可能很调皮。

oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.en: I do like this part of fishing, fiddling with tiny bits and bobs!
oceanfishingbobber_malbatross.trans: 我确实很喜欢钓鱼的这一部分，摆弄鱼饵和浮漂什么的！

figatoni.en: Who knew pasta could be sweet?
figatoni.trans: 谁曾想意大利面还能是甜的？

book_light.en: You know, this one might actually be worthwhile.

lost_toy_42.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_42.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

lost_toy_43.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_43.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

wobster_sheller_dead.en: If it's already dead, I shouldn't let it go to waste.
wobster_sheller_dead.trans: 要是已经死了，那就不应该浪费。

armor_voidcloth.en: I prefer chains that have a pocket watch at the end of them.
armor_voidcloth.trans: 我更喜欢挂着怀表的链子。

marble.trans: 一种永不过时的建筑材料。

fishmeat_small.en: Not much more than a quick fishy snack.

tacklesketch.en: I don't think I've seen this type of tackle before. Or maybe I just forgot...
tacklesketch.trans: 我以前好像没见过这种钓具。也有可能是我忘记了……

waterpump.en: I'm sure I'll be needing it soon enough.
waterpump.trans: 我相信我很快就会需要它了。

support_pillar.en: Everything breaks down over time. Well, most things anyway.
support_pillar.trans: 世间万物都会随着时间的前进而崩塌。好吧，起码大多数事情是这样的。

dirtpile.en: There's something just irresistibly suspicious about it...
dirtpile.trans: 它有一些令人无法抗拒的可疑之处……

taffy.en: I'll never forget, baba used to bring these home for us on special occasions.
taffy.trans: 我永远不会忘记这些，爸爸逢年过节会带一些回家给我们吃。

justeggs.en: Just how I like my eggs, quick and easy.
justeggs.trans: 鸡蛋的话，我喜欢快速而简单的做法。

mast_yotd_item.en: That'll be the... sail holder bit.
mast_yotd_item.trans: 那个将会是……固定风帆的组件。

antler.en: Just keep your antler to yourself!
antler.trans: 把你的鹿角留给自己吧!

generic.en: It could use a haircut, though I'm not one to talk...
generic.trans: 它该理发了，这话由我说有点不合适……

flower_evil.en: I don't have time to stop and smell the-- hold on, what's wrong with that one?
flower_evil.trans: 我没有时间停下来闻一闻——等等，那朵花是不是有问题？

mask_foolhat.en: Something about it makes my skin crawl...
mask_foolhat.trans: 它的某些东西让我皮肤发痒……

cooking_short.en: Surely it won't take too much longer?

cooking_long.en: Ohhh I wish it would just hurry up!

generic.en: I don't like to fuss around with fancy cooking.
generic.trans: 我不喜欢在高级料理上浪费时间。

empty.en: I don't smell anything cooking.
empty.trans: 我没有闻到做菜的味道。

lost_toy_10.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_10.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

portabletent.en: A safe place to spend the night would be a welcome change.
portabletent.trans: 有个安全的地方过夜也算是个积极的变化了。

lost_toy_11.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_11.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

generic.en: That's how we got here. Hopefully how we get back, too.
generic.trans: 能过来，应该也能回去吧？

turf_vent.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_vent.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

lost_toy_14.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_14.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

hermitcrabtea_foliage.en: Only good if I remember to take it beforehand.
hermitcrabtea_foliage.trans: 前提是我要记得提前喝。

generic.en: Empty.
generic.trans: 空的。

burning.en: That's not good.

burnt.en: All that's left are the memories. And some soot.
burnt.trans: 留下的除了回忆，就只有一些烟尘。

generic.en: We'll be able to explore a lot faster if we map out where we've already been.
generic.trans: 如果绘制出已经去过的地方，我们就能更快地探索。

durian_oversized.en: Out of all the things I planted, this is the one that decides to grow well.
durian_oversized.trans: 在我种植的所有东西中，这个生长最为良好。

thulecite_pieces.en: Just what I was looking for!

generic.en: Hopefully this won't take too long.
generic.trans: 希望这不会花太长时间。

mutateddeerclops.en: Ah. I forgot that they do this sometimes.
mutateddeerclops.trans: 啊。我忘了他们有时会这样做。

support_pillar_dreadstone.en: Everything breaks down over time. Well, most things anyway.
support_pillar_dreadstone.trans: 世间万物都会随着时间的前进而崩塌。好吧，起码大多数事情是这样的。

wall_ruins.en: New and old at the same time... did I just create a paradox?
wall_ruins.trans: 既有新，也有旧……我是不是刚刚创造了一个悖论？

has_loot.trans: 我看到个东西。希望它有点用。

generic.en: Empty. Let's move on.
generic.trans: 空的。再换一个吧。

inground.en: Come on out, don't be shy!

generic.en: This feels strangely familiar.
generic.trans: 有种奇怪的熟悉感。

empty.en: Wasn't there something here before? Or maybe that's later.
empty.trans: 这里以前不是有东西吗？或者说那是后来的事。

oar.en: Wouldn't a sail be much faster?

pandoraschest.en: What's the harm in taking an itty-bitty peek?
pandoraschest.trans: 偷看一下有什么坏处呢？

lavaarena_bernie.en: He might make a good distraction for us.
lavaarena_bernie.trans: 我们或许能利用他进行干扰。

bernie_big.en: I could've sworn you were smaller...
bernie_big.trans: 我发誓你那时候比现在小多了……

spidereggsack.en: I should squish them now, it'll save me the hassle later on...
spidereggsack.trans: 我应该现在就把它们压扁，以免后患无穷……

garlic_seeds.en: Why waste time growing them when I can just eat them now?
garlic_seeds.trans: 既然现在就能吃，为什么还要浪费时间种呢？

wx78_scanner_succeeded.en: I suppose you have nothing better to do than wait around?
wx78_scanner_succeeded.trans: 你除了干等着就没事可做了？

hermit_bundle_shells.en: A nice assortment of shells to add to my little collection.
hermit_bundle_shells.trans: 这些漂亮的贝壳可以添加到我的收藏中。

canary_poisoned.en: I think I should take that as a sign to leave.
canary_poisoned.trans: 我想我应该把这作为离开的信号。

gargoyle_werepig.en: Something's nagging at the back of my brain... I'm sure it's nothing.
gargoyle_werepig.trans: 有什么东西在我的脑后喋喋不休……我确信这没什么。

block.en: Chipping away at stone is not my idea of a good time.
block.trans: 凿石头对我来说并不算美好时光。

sculpture.en: I don't even want to think about how much time was spent making it.
sculpture.trans: 我不想去想制作它花了多长时间。

burnt.en: Well, time to move on.
burnt.trans: 好了，是时候继续前进了。

empty.en: I've got more pressing things to do than arts and crafts.
empty.trans: 我有比艺术和手工更紧迫的事情要做。

generic.en: I can't let it slow me down.
generic.trans: 不能让它减慢我的速度。

lavaarena_rechargerhat.en: Those crystals will quicken my abilities.
lavaarena_rechargerhat.trans: 那些水晶的力量加速了我的能力。

lost_toy_18.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_18.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

lost_toy_19.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_19.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

generic.en: I'm going to trip over one of these if I'm not careful.
generic.trans: 要是不小心的话，就会被其中一个绊倒。

acidcovered.en: I will not soon forget this odor.
acidcovered.trans: 我不会马上忘记这种气味。

support_pillar_dreadstone_scaffold.en: Oh! I thought that was done already.

mandrakesoup.en: Maybe in another timeline we won't have to meet this way.
mandrakesoup.trans: 也许换条时间线我们就不用以这样的方式见面了。

playing.en: What an exhilarating lack of danger!
playing.trans: 完全没危险，太令人激动了！

generic.en: It's not in use at the moment.
generic.trans: 现在没人在用。

turf_mosaic_grey.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_mosaic_grey.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

lutefisk.en: This celebration involves a surprising amount of fish.
lutefisk.trans: 这个庆祝活动涉及到的鱼的数量令人吃惊。

monkeyisland_portal_debris.en: I should've remembered sooner. Too late now, I suppose.
monkeyisland_portal_debris.trans: 我应该早点想起来的。现在太晚了，我想。

jellybean.en: I like to keep a bit of candy in my pocket at all times.
jellybean.trans: 我喜欢随时在口袋里放点糖果。

wx78module_taser.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_taser.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

madscience_lab.en: This is a bit outside my area of expertise...
madscience_lab.trans: 这有点超出我的专业领域……

watermelonicle.en: It tastes like a frozen summer day.

prime_mate.en: He seems to think he's in charge.
prime_mate.trans: 他似乎认为自己说了算。

miasma.en: Oh botheration, I've no desire to wade through that vile substance.
miasma.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！我可不想从那团毒霾中间穿过去。

gas.trans: 哎呦，不仅冲鼻子，而且还有毒。

hot.en: I feel sluggish in this heat.

generic.en: Let's go around those, shall we?
generic.trans: 咱们绕开这些好不好？

yotb.en: Where's that peculiar judge? He might have an appreciation for this.
yotb.trans: 那个古怪的裁判在哪里？他应该会喜欢这个。

generic.en: I love a nice memento, they help me keep track of when I am.
generic.trans: 我喜欢漂亮的纪念品，能帮助我找到身处何时。

generic.en: More roses... there's been quite a few popping up lately.
generic.trans: 又是玫瑰……最近冒出来不少啊。

saddle_wathgrithr.trans: 确实给我留下了深刻印象。

ancient_altar.en: It seems like they were a clever bunch. Just not clever enough.
ancient_altar.trans: 看起来他们是一群聪明人。只是还不够聪明。

burnt.en: Something smells good!
burnt.trans: 有什么东西闻起来很香！

generic.en: These carrots stuff themselves full of rabbits.
generic.trans: 这些胡萝卜里全是兔子。

garlic_oversized.en: It's still hard to believe garlic could grow so big.
garlic_oversized.trans: 仍然很难相信大蒜可以长得这么大。

livingtree.en: Oh, what a horrible face it has!

hostile.en: I guess we don't learn from the past.

generic.en: Well this is new.
generic.trans: 呵，新鲜了。

oceanfishingbobber_goose.en: I do like this part of fishing, fiddling with tiny bits and bobs!
oceanfishingbobber_goose.trans: 我确实很喜欢钓鱼的这一部分，摆弄鱼饵和浮漂什么的！

gears.en: They're too big for pocket watches, unfortunately.
gears.trans: 不幸的是，它们对怀表来说太大了。

wagstaff_machinery.en: Someone must have left these in a hurry.
wagstaff_machinery.trans: 这些一定是有人匆匆丢下的。

tacklecontainer.en: Finally, my poor pockets can be free of hooks and fish bait.
tacklecontainer.trans: 我终于不用在口袋里装鱼钩和鱼饵了。

frogglebunwich.en: I've been told it's a local delicacy.
frogglebunwich.trans: 有人告诉我这是当地的一种美食。

freshfruitcrepes.en: Kids these days, with their fancy syrup-less pancakes...
freshfruitcrepes.trans: 现在的孩子们，居然吃那些花哨的无糖浆薄烤饼……

boat_cannon_kit.en: I'd better get that on my boat sooner rather than later.
boat_cannon_kit.trans: 我要尽早把它装上我的船。

bearger.en: All the worst parts of a bear and a badger rolled into one.
bearger.trans: 熊和獾的所有最坏的部分都融为一体了。

dustmeringue.en: Alright, dust was a poor ingredient choice. This is why I don't cook!
dustmeringue.trans: 好吧，灰尘是一个糟糕的原料选择。这就是我不做饭的原因！

bandage_butterflywings.en: This will heal it up in no time at all.

yotb.en: Where's that peculiar judge? He might have an appreciation for this.
yotb.trans: 那个古怪的裁判在哪里？他应该会喜欢这个。

generic.en: I love a nice memento, they help me keep track of when I am.
generic.trans: 我喜欢漂亮的纪念品，能帮助我找到身处何时。

warm.en: I'm headed in the right direction.

generic.en: It's some kind of homing device.
generic.trans: 它是某种自动引导装置。

shallow_grave.en: Must have been in a hurry.

some_kelp.en: How much kelp do they need?

generic.en: Are they incapable of gathering their own kelp?
generic.trans: 没有能力自己采集海带吗？

tentacle_pillar_hole.en: There's a whole maze of tunnels down there.
tentacle_pillar_hole.trans: 下面有一条迷宫般的隧道。

yotb.en: Where's that peculiar judge? He might have an appreciation for this.
yotb.trans: 那个古怪的裁判在哪里？他应该会喜欢这个。

generic.en: I love a nice memento, they help me keep track of when I am.
generic.trans: 我喜欢漂亮的纪念品，能帮助我找到身处何时。

generic.en: Who has time to celebrate? Okay, fine.
generic.trans: 谁有空庆祝？好吧，来吧。

burnt.en: Who saw that coming? Me.

moon_altar_glass.en: It's showing me a place... is it a premonition or a memory?
moon_altar_glass.trans: 它在向我展示一个地方……这是预言还是回忆？

kitcoondecor1_kit.en: Do I really have time to fuss with this?
kitcoondecor1_kit.trans: 我真的有时间浪费在这上面？

perdfan.en: I don't think it was very lucky for the poor bird.
perdfan.trans: 那只可怜的鸟真是不走运。

generic.en: Did I forget to connect this one?
generic.trans: 我忘记连上这根了么？

linked.trans: 绝对终身难忘的电击体验。

hedgehound_bush.en: Was that rosebush there a second ago?
hedgehound_bush.trans: 玫瑰花丛一秒钟前就在那吗？

kitcoon_nametag.en: This will make it easier to remember who's who at least.
kitcoon_nametag.trans: 这至少会使我们更容易记住谁是谁。

quagmire_park_obelisk.trans: 一座有纪念意义的纪念碑。

playing_card.en: What does one do with a single card?

1.en: Oh good, a reminder of another unpleasant encounter.
1.trans: 哦，很好，提醒了我另一次不愉快的遭遇。

chesspiece_pipe.trans: 一个静物。多么引人入胜。

ancientfruit_nightvision.en: Not exactly appetizing, but useful in the dark.
ancientfruit_nightvision.trans: 虽然不太合胃口，但在黑暗中很有用。

glowberrymousse.trans: 多么有用的甜点啊，真令人愉悦！

miniboatlantern.en: The ocean could use a bit more light.
miniboatlantern.trans: 海洋上就应该多一点光照。

ghostlyelixir_slowregen.en: A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.
ghostlyelixir_slowregen.trans: 一点点玄学上的干预不会伤害任何人。

slingshot_band_pigskin.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

bundle.en: Bundled up for quick and efficient carrying.
bundle.trans: 捆绑起来以后可以快速有效地携带。

orangestaff.en: Really? We're just putting the gem on a stick and calling it a day?
orangestaff.trans: 真的吗？只是把宝石放在棍子上，然后就收工了？

pavlova.en: It's crispier than I expected, but not unpleasantly so.
pavlova.trans: 它比我预期的要脆，这样挺好。

firehound.en: I won't meet a fiery end from the likes of you!
firehound.trans: 像你这种家伙还不足以让我走向烈火结局。

pickledherring.en: It must be some sort of delicacy.
pickledherring.trans: 这一定是某种美味佳肴。

oceanfishingbobber_robin.en: I knew I'd find a use for that feather eventually!
oceanfishingbobber_robin.trans: 我知道我终会为那根羽毛找到用途!

slingshotammo_scrapfeather.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_scrapfeather.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

burnt.en: Oh drat.

generic.en: It turns out that science is a lot easier than I thought!
generic.trans: 原来科学比我想象的要简单得多！

burnt.en: I'll have to be more careful next time.

generic.en: Shadow magic's just a tool, like anything else.
generic.trans: 暗影魔法只是一种工具，和其他东西一样。

generic.en: If it works, it works.
generic.trans: 能用就行。

burnt.en: Now I'll have to spend time making another one...

lantern.en: I'd better keep this close, just in case.
lantern.trans: 我最好把这个放在身边，以备不时之需。

moon_altar_crown.en: I'll make better use of it than that old crab did.
moon_altar_crown.trans: 我将比那只老螃蟹更好地利用它。

slingshot_frame_wagpunk.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

moon_altar_astral.en: The pieces are starting to come together.

eyeofterror_mini_grounded.en: It's trying to hatch! I should keep my eye on it.
eyeofterror_mini_grounded.trans: 它想孵化出来！我要盯着点。

alterguardian_phase3trap.en: I can't let myself fall asleep at a time like this!
alterguardian_phase3trap.trans: 我不能让自己在这种时候睡着!

carnivalgame_herding_chick.en: Just you wait, I'm more spry than I look!
carnivalgame_herding_chick.trans: 走着瞧吧，我比我看起来更有活力！

rage.en: I think the pendulum just swung in his favor...
rage.trans: 看来命运的钟摆向他倾斜了……

generic.en: I really should have remembered something like you!
generic.trans: 我真的应该记住像你这样的东西！

wolfgang_whistle.en: There's a time and a place for exercise, I suppose.
wolfgang_whistle.trans: 我猜挤出点时间来锻炼也可以。

bernie_active.en: How incredible that this isn't even the strangest thing I've seen.
bernie_active.trans: 这还不是我见过的最奇怪的事情，多么不可思议。

broken.trans: 也许它的时间已经到头了。

generic.en: It certainly saves time.
generic.trans: 它绝对省时间。

cave_banana.en: I like a quick snack with no fuss.
cave_banana.trans: 我喜欢简单省事的快速零食。

spider_hider.en: Why don't you just skitter around the other way?
spider_hider.trans: 你为什么不从另一个方向溜走呢？

turf_mosaic_red.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_mosaic_red.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

dug_monkeytail.en: There had better not be any monkeys hiding in there.
dug_monkeytail.trans: 希望没有猴子藏在里面。

turf_cotl_gold.en: Surely there's a better use for all that gold?!
turf_cotl_gold.trans: 我敢肯定这些黄金肯定有更好的用途？！

turf_savanna.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_savanna.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

cutgrass.en: It's about as interesting as you'd imagine cut grass to be.
cutgrass.trans: 这就像你想象中的草一样有趣。

saddlehorn.en: I'll finally be able to take the saddle off that poor beast!
saddlehorn.trans: 我终于可以把鞍具从那头可怜的野兽身上取下来了！

firestarter.en: This won't end well...
firestarter.trans: 这不会有好结果的……

ghost.en: Stop pestering me, I'll have you back as quickly as I can!
ghost.trans: 不要再纠缠我了，我会尽快让你回来的！

murderer.en: Stay back! If it's you or me, I'm picking me!
murderer.trans: 别过来！如果非得你死我活，我选我活！

attacker.en: Are you getting up to some trouble, %s?
attacker.trans: 你想惹事啊，%s？

reviver.en: I think you and I are going to get along quite well, %s.
reviver.trans: 咱俩会相处得很好，%s。

generic.en: Sorry %s, I can't stay and chat!
generic.trans: 抱歉，%s，我不能留下来跟你闲聊！

mermking.en: It might be wise to get in his good graces.
mermking.trans: 讨好他也许是明智之举。

barnaclesushi.en: All wrapped up with a little bow.
barnaclesushi.trans: 用一个小蝴蝶结扎了起来。

lunar_grazer.en: Oh botheration, it pops back up as quickly as I can knock it down!
lunar_grazer.trans: 噢，麻烦呐，我刚打倒它，它就又蹦起来了！

chesspiece_minotaur.en: This will help remind me not to venture too far in the caves...
chesspiece_minotaur.trans: 这将有助于提醒我不要在洞穴里走得太远……

tumbleweed.en: I'm sure it's seen a lot during its travels.
tumbleweed.trans: 它在旅程中肯定什么都见过了。

wx78module_nightvision.en: Aha! I was wondering when they'd started making these.
wx78module_nightvision.trans: 啊哈！我就琢磨着应该有人做这种东西了。

pirate_flag_pole.en: As if sea-faring wasn't hazardous enough, now there are pirates to contend with?
pirate_flag_pole.trans: 怎么，还嫌海上航行不够危险？把海盗加进来是几个意思？

chesspiece_muse.en: She went and lost her head.
chesspiece_muse.trans: 她去了，然后就掉了脑袋。

staff_tornado.en: Oh botheration, I thought it was a compass.
staff_tornado.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我还以为是个指南针呢。

purplemooneye.en: I think I can tinker with it even more.
purplemooneye.trans: 我想我还可以再修补一下。

growing.en: Why can't you just grow faster?
growing.trans: 为什么你就不能长得更快呢？

needsfertilizer.en: A bit of fertilizer should speed things up.
needsfertilizer.trans: 施点肥应该能加快进度。

generic.en: Gardening is so time consuming.
generic.trans: 园艺是如此耗时。

burnt.en: All that time, wasted!
burnt.trans: 那么多时间，都被浪费了！

burning.en: This should put an end to it.

generic.en: I know what comes next.
generic.trans: 我知道接着会来什么。

uncarved.en: Pumpkin carving reminds me of a simpler time.
uncarved.trans: 雕刻南瓜让我想起了那些纯真的时光。

generic.en: Yes, that will go nicely.
generic.trans: 对，这样正好。

slingshot_handle_jelly.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

archive_resonator_item.en: I think I took it to the surface before, or maybe I'll do that soon.
archive_resonator_item.trans: 我之前应该把它带到了地表过，也有可能是我很快就会这么做。

moonbutterfly_sapling.en: A moth turning into a tree hardly feels out of the ordinary anymore.
moonbutterfly_sapling.trans: 飞蛾变成一棵树，几乎不觉得有什么不正常。

honeyham.en: You can't go wrong dousing something in honey.
honeyham.trans: 用蜂蜜腌东西一准不会错。

scorched_skeleton.en: Their life was snuffed out long ago.
scorched_skeleton.trans: 这个生命早早之前就熄灭了。

festivefish.en: I didn't think nutmeg and cinnamon would go so well with fish!
festivefish.trans: 我没想到肉豆蔻、肉桂和鱼会如此相配！

costume_king_body.en: It looks like it could belong to a King.

kitcoon_marsh.en: Oh how adorable, and conveniently pocket-sized!
kitcoon_marsh.trans: 哦，多么可爱，而且还是便携的口袋款！

marked_differentshard.en: It'll be a big jump, but we can make it! I think...
marked_differentshard.trans: 这将是一次飞跃，但我可以做到！应该可以……

unmarked.en: Why don't we all take a little jaunt to the past? It'll be fun!
unmarked.trans: 一起回到过去走一走如何？会很有意思的！

recharging.en: It's not ready yet? Botheration, the normal passage of time is so slow!
recharging.trans: 还没好？麻烦呐，时间正常流逝起来是如此的缓慢！

marked_sameshard.en: Is it time for us to take a dip in the timestream?
marked_sameshard.trans: 是时候跳进时间流了吗？

generic.en: Why don't we all take a little jaunt to the past? It'll be fun!
generic.trans: 一起回到过去走一走如何？会很有意思的！

generic.en: What happened to chivalry?
generic.trans: 骑士精神哪儿去了？

dragonfruit_oversized.en: I'll admit, it's an impressive sight.
dragonfruit_oversized.trans: 我承认，这是个令人印象深刻的景象。

yotd_oar.en: Dragonflies are surprisingly well suited for paddling.
yotd_oar.trans: 没想到龙蝇这么适合划桨。

wagpunkbits_kit.en: What will they think of next?
wagpunkbits_kit.trans: 他们还能想出些什么来？

voidcloth_boomerang.en: Right back to where we started... sigh.

wagdrone_beacon.en: Some lines should not be crossed.

dumbbell_bluegem.en: Not the most conventional weapon, but to each their own.
dumbbell_bluegem.trans: 不是最常规的武器，但是各有千秋。

berrysauce.en: Why bother putting it on something when you can just eat it by itself?
berrysauce.trans: 如果能单独吃，为什么还要把它放在其他东西上呢？

eyeofterror.en: I don't think that's supposed to be here...

nightsword.en: It's just a tool after all, why shouldn't I use it?
nightsword.trans: 它毕竟只是一个工具，我为什么不用它？

playing.en: This might be a tricky one.
playing.trans: 这可能是一个棘手的问题。

generic.en: The mechanism won't work without a token.
generic.trans: 这套机械没有代币是不会工作的。

broken.en: This can't be the end. We'll fix this!
broken.trans: 这一定不是结局。我们可以修好它！

generic.en: It looks well-loved.
generic.trans: 它看起来很受喜爱。

oar_monkey.en: I can at least appreciate its ability to multitask.
oar_monkey.trans: 我欣赏它的多任务处理能力。

moon_altar_rock_glass.en: There's definitely something stuck in there. I wonder...
moon_altar_rock_glass.trans: 肯定有东西卡在里面。我想知道……

monkey_mediumhat.en: If I must be at sea, I might as well look the part.
monkey_mediumhat.trans: 既然我非要出海，那就得有航海的服装。

generic.en: Oh! I almost forgot to bring the beefalo!
generic.trans: 哦！我差点忘了带皮弗娄牛！

occupied.en: You'll be the most smartly dressed creature around!
occupied.trans: 你将成为周围最打扮醒目的生物!

burnt.en: Oh botheration, not again.

cave_banana_tree.en: You can barely call it a tree.
cave_banana_tree.trans: 你几乎不能称它为一棵树。

walrus_tusk.en: I should pocket it for future tinkering.
walrus_tusk.trans: 我应该把它装进口袋，将来拿来修补东西。

burning.en: It's burning away.

chopped.trans: 在它最茁壮的时候割下。

generic.en: What a gnarled old tree.
generic.trans: 盘根错节的一颗老树。

burnt.en: It was an ugly tree anyway.
burnt.trans: 本来也是一株难看的树。

potatotornado.en: Time is kind of like a swirly potato.
potatotornado.trans: 时间其实就像一个旋转的土豆。

beaverghost.en: Give me a moment %s, it'll be like this never happened!
beaverghost.trans: 等我一会儿，%s，我保证能让这件事像没发生过一样！

ghost.en: Don't worry, I'll have you back to your old self in no time!
ghost.trans: 别担心，我很快就会让你恢复到以前的状态！

firestarter.en: Well it's hard to surprise me %s, but you managed it.
firestarter.trans: 我万万没想到你居然会这样，%s。

mooseghost.en: Don't worry %s, I won't let things end for you like this!
mooseghost.trans: 别着急，%s，我不会让你就这么完蛋的！

murderer.en: You cut their life short! Why?!
murderer.trans: 你缩短了他们的生命！为什么？！

goose.en: Hmm. I could have sworn he turned into a beaver.
goose.trans: 嗯。我发誓他变成过了一只海狸。

attacker.en: That was just mean and unnecessary, %s!
attacker.trans: 这种刻薄完全没有必要，%s！

moose.en: Hmm. I could have sworn he turned into a goose.
moose.trans: 嗯。我可以发誓，他变成过一头鹅。

gooseghost.en: This isn't the end for you, %s. Not if I can help it!
gooseghost.trans: 这不是你的结局，%s。我不会丢下你不管！

beaver.en: Hmm. I could have sworn he turned into a moose.
beaver.trans: 嗯。我可以发誓，他变成过一只驼鹿。

reviver.en: You really do have a heart as big as your beard, %s.
reviver.trans: 留胡子的果然都是好心人，%s。

generic.en: Sorry %s, no time for pleasantries!
generic.trans: 抱歉，%s。我没时间跟你客套！

bundlewrap.en: It'll keep my things safe from the ravages of time.
bundlewrap.trans: 这将使我的东西免受时间的摧残。

turf_pebblebeach.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_pebblebeach.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

eggplant_oversized.en: I'll be eating eggplant leftovers for weeks.
eggplant_oversized.trans: 我将连续几个星期吃有茄子的剩饭。

beemine.en: You come after me, you get the bees!
beemine.trans: 你敢惹我，叫你尝尝蜜蜂的厉害！

alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.en: I'll never get used to that!
alterguardian_phase4_lunarrift.trans: 我永远都习惯不了那个！

mushgnome.en: This mushroom manages to be worse than most.
mushgnome.trans: 这颗蘑菇比大多数蘑菇都更糟。

carnival_seedpacket.en: A little snack to keep in my pocket.

burning.en: A wise choice.

generic.en: I have a bad feeling about it.
generic.trans: 我对它有种不好的预感。

mutatedwarg.en: Oh botheration, I'm getting deja vu...
mutatedwarg.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐，这情景似曾相识……

generic.en: I'm sure it'll fare better than last time.
generic.trans: 肯定能比上次好。

burnt.en: I probably should have seen this coming.

turf_dirt.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_dirt.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

oceantree.en: It must have had a hard time of it, growing all the way out here.
oceantree.trans: 它在这里一定生长得很艰难。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.en: If it will help me catch a fish faster, I'm all for it.
oceanfishinglure_spinner_green.trans: 如果能帮我更快抓到鱼，那我愿意试。

trinket_41.en: This is definitely going to contaminate the timeline.

trinket_42.en: ...But why does it have a mouse head?

molebat.en: Hmph, and people call me batty!

stafflight.en: A tiny star, what could go wrong?
stafflight.trans: 一颗小星星，能有什么问题？

reflectivevest.en: I don't know if I want to be so easy to spot...
reflectivevest.trans: 穿上这个很容易就被发现……

trinket_45.trans: 它一直发出古怪的声音。

slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_lunarplanthusk.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

yotc_carrat_race_start_item.en: The sooner I find a place for it, the sooner we can start.
yotc_carrat_race_start_item.trans: 我越早为它找到一个地方，我们就能越早开始。

trinket_46.trans: 这东西是怎么到这里来的？

ghostlyelixir_speed.en: A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.
ghostlyelixir_speed.trans: 一点点玄学上的干预不会伤害任何人。

voidcloth_kit.en: Fixing it is faster than making a new one.
voidcloth_kit.trans: 修复它比造一个新的更快。

chesspiece_claywarg.en: I hope this doesn't come back to bite me.
chesspiece_claywarg.trans: 我希望它不会回来咬我一口。

level_3.en: An impressive sight, if I do say so myself!
level_3.trans: 完全可以说是令人印象深刻的景象！

generic.en: It could use a little something or other.
generic.trans: 它还缺点东西。

level_2.en: Putting a few more trinkets around wouldn't hurt.
level_2.trans: 多放一些小饰品也无妨。

trinket_30.en: I wonder whatever happened to the rest of the set. Or the players.
trinket_30.trans: 我想知道这副棋的其他棋子怎么样了；棋手后来怎么样了。

trinket_32.en: It'll only show you one possible future.
trinket_32.trans: 它只会向你展示一个可能的未来。

trinket_31.en: I wonder whatever happened to the rest of the set. Or the players.
trinket_31.trans: 我想知道这副棋的其他棋子怎么样了；棋手后来怎么样了。

charged.en: What happened to you? You look a mess!
charged.trans: 你怎么了？你看起来一塌糊涂！

generic.en: Come here you old goat!
generic.trans: 过来，你这只老山羊！

merm_armory.en: I doubt there's anything in there worth my time.
merm_armory.trans: 我怀疑里面没有值得我花时间的东西。

cooking_short.en: It has to be almost done by now, right?
cooking_short.trans: 现在应该差不多完成了，对吗？

cooking_long.en: This is why I hate cooking. Cooking takes forever!
cooking_long.trans: 这就是为什么我讨厌烹饪。烹饪要花很长时间！

burnt.en: Well that's a setback.

empty.en: I'd say it's been a few centuries since this was last used.
empty.trans: 这玩意已经几个世纪没人用过了。

quagmire_tomato.en: It's red because it's full of science.

trinket_38.en: It helps me see the way ahead.

trinket_37.en: Somewhere there's a vampire having a very bad day.
trinket_37.trans: 在某个地方，有一个吸血鬼过着非常糟糕的一天。

oceanvine_cocoon.en: As long as I don't get too close...
oceanvine_cocoon.trans: 只要我别靠得太近应该就没事……

trinket_39.en: I don't think it's from this timeline...
trinket_39.trans: 应该不是这条时间线里的东西……

trinket_34.en: There's no need to be afraid of curses if you're clever enough to outsmart them.
trinket_34.trans: 如果你足够聪明，能够胜过诅咒，就没有必要害怕诅咒。

trinket_33.en: I keep forgetting it's not real!
trinket_33.trans: 我一直忘了这不是真的！

trinket_36.en: I don't think it's a good idea to put things we find lying around here in our mouths.
trinket_36.trans: 我不认为把我们在这里找到的东西放进嘴里是个好主意。

trinket_35.en: Whatever it held, it's gone now.
trinket_35.trans: 不管它承载了什么，现在已经消失了。

sleeping.en: It's sleeping, for now.

generic.en: He's just winging it.
generic.trans: 羽翼丰满。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.en: It leads down into the game's inner workings.
carnivalgame_feedchicks_nest.trans: 它指向了游戏的内部运作。

high.en: Oh botheration, I got carried away with the kindling!
high.trans: 哦，麻烦呐，我柴火加多了！

low.en: It needs more to burn if I want it to last.
low.trans: 如果想让它继续烧的话，它需要更多的燃料。

embers.en: I need to give it something to burn, quickly!
embers.trans: 我需要给它一些燃烧的东西，快！

generic.en: It keeps the shadows at bay.
generic.trans: 它能让暗影远离。

out.en: I could get it going again in no time at all.
out.trans: 我马上就能让它重新烧起来。

playing.en: I'm not sure that there's any actual skill involved here.
playing.trans: 这东西一点技术含量都没。

generic.en: The mechanism won't work without a token.
generic.trans: 这套机械没有代币是不会工作的。

trinket_20.en: So this is when it ended up!

fence_junk.en: As long as it keeps things out, I don't care how it looks.
fence_junk.trans: 只要它有阻拦的作用，我就不在乎它长什么样。

pigelitefighter1.en: How did I get myself into this?

locked.en: You won't stay locked for long.

generic.en: An ancient puzzle! How exciting!
generic.trans: 一个古老的谜题！多么令人激动啊！

pigelitefighter3.en: Let's just calm down for a minute...

trinket_27.en: I would've rather found the coat.
trinket_27.trans: 我还是宁愿要挂在上面的大衣。

trinket_26.en: Something to sip and snack on all at once!

damaged.en: It's beyond repair but the parts are still good.
damaged.trans: 无法修复了但零件还能用。

generic.en: They're driving me mad!
generic.trans: 它们快把我逼疯了！

goldnugget.en: Hmm... would a solid gold pocket watch be too much?
goldnugget.trans: 嗯……纯金怀表会不会太夸张？

potato_oversized.trans: 这个土豆大的有点荒谬了吧。

trinket_29.en: It seems like you can't walk too far around here without tripping over a chess piece.
trinket_29.trans: 似乎你在这里走不了多远就会被一个棋子绊倒。

trinket_28.en: It seems like you can't walk too far around here without tripping over a chess piece.
trinket_28.trans: 似乎你在这里走不了多远就会被一个棋子绊倒。

merm_shadow.en: It was a merm once. Not anymore.
merm_shadow.trans: 它曾是鱼人。如今已不再是。

trinket_23.en: I'll be able to shave a few seconds off my shoe-changing time.
trinket_23.trans: 我将能够缩短几秒换鞋时间。

trinket_22.en: I'm neither a cat nor a knitter. Maybe someone else will want it.
trinket_22.trans: 我既不是猫，也不织毛衣。这东西给别人吧。

trinket_25.en: It smells like pine needles. Dead, rotten pine needles.
trinket_25.trans: 它闻起来像松针。死掉、腐烂的松针。

trinket_24.en: I'm not much of a cat person.

ivy_snare.en: Oh botheration, now I'll have to clean all of this up!
ivy_snare.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。现在得靠我来打扫了！

icestaff2.en: I could dabble in some ice magic.
icestaff2.trans: 我可以小小涉猎一下冰霜魔法。

icestaff3.en: I'll need a hot cup of tea after this.

picked.en: Now to pick out all the spines. What a tedious vegetable.
picked.trans: 现在还要把所有的刺挑出来。多么单调的一种蔬菜。

generic.en: I wonder if it's really worth the bother.
generic.trans: 真没必要这么麻烦。

resurrectionstone.en: Hopefully I'll never have to use it.
resurrectionstone.trans: 希望我永远都用不到它。

hutch.en: You come with your own lamp? I'm impressed!
hutch.trans: 你带着自己的灯来？真令人刮目相看！

glommerwings.en: I'm just not going to think about where they came from!
glommerwings.trans: 我就不去想它们从哪里来的了！

slingshotammo_thulecite.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_thulecite.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

monkeybarrel.en: At least they make it easy to remember who lives here.
monkeybarrel.trans: 起码让人容易记住谁住在这里。

firestaff.en: Better be careful with that, we don't want a repeat of last time.
firestaff.trans: 最好小心一点，我们不希望重蹈上次的覆辙。

waterplant.en: I seem to recall something... there was a trick with the barnacles...
waterplant.trans: 我似乎想起了什么……好像跟藤壶有关……

charlie_heckler.en: I don't remember asking for their opinion.
charlie_heckler.trans: 我不记得问过它们的意见。

trinket_10.en: Thankfully my teeth seem to have stayed pretty sturdy in my older years.
trinket_10.trans: 还好我的牙齿在我年老的时候也很坚固。

critterlab.en: Shadow creatures! No, wait a tick, it's something else...
critterlab.trans: 暗影生物! 不，等等，是别的东西……

saddle_shadow.en: If one must sit, they might as well be moving.

brewing.en: One must take their time brewing tea.

burnt.en: A shame. I should have seen it coming.
burnt.trans: 真可惜。我早该料到会这样。

generic.en: I hope Pearl is in soon.
generic.trans: 希望珍珠早点来店里。

dragontailhat.en: Hmph, who wants to be last?
dragontailhat.trans: 哼哼，谁想成为最后一个？

chesspiece_beefalo.en: A real one would be marginally more interesting to look at.

trinket_16.en: I have no patience for chess, but it looks simple enough.
trinket_16.trans: 我对象棋没有耐心，但它看起来够简单。

trinket_15.en: I have no patience for chess, but it looks simple enough.
trinket_15.trans: 我对象棋没有耐心，但它看起来够简单。

lighter.en: Oh the havoc you've wreaked across timelines...
lighter.trans: 哦，你在好几条时间线上都造成了破坏……

trinket_18.trans: 难道历史没有告诉我们什么吗？

trinket_17.en: Think about how much time I'll save if I only need to use one utensil!
trinket_17.trans: 想一想，如果我只需要使用一件餐具，将会省下多少时间啊！

trinket_12.en: It's stuck in a perpetual state of decay.
trinket_12.trans: 它停留在了一个永久的腐烂状态。

trinket_11.en: Oh you would look just darling on a shelf next to some porcelain figurines!
trinket_11.trans: 哦，你放在架子上瓷器小雕像旁边会显得很可爱。

sweetpotato.en: An odd recipe, but I can't say I don't enjoy it.
sweetpotato.trans: 一个奇怪的食谱，但我承认我喜欢它。

trinket_13.en: Oooh, I do love a good knickknack.
trinket_13.trans: 我确实喜欢精美的小饰品。

boomerang.en: I think I remember how to use this... yes, it's coming back to me!
boomerang.trans: 我想我记得如何使用这个……是的，它又回到了我身边！

rose.en: I don't have time to stop and smell the roses.
rose.trans: 我没有时间停下来闻玫瑰花。

generic.en: I have far more pressing things to do than pick flowers.
generic.trans: 我有比摘花更紧迫的事情要做。

ghostlyelixir_retaliation.en: A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.
ghostlyelixir_retaliation.trans: 一点点玄学上的干预不会伤害任何人。

burning.en: I'll bet it was one of those newfangled electric candles that started it.
burning.trans: 我敢打赌，是那些新奇电蜡烛引起的。

candecorate.en: It's a fully grown pine tree.
candecorate.trans: 这是一棵长成了的松树。

young.en: A young tree in a little wooden pail.

burnt.en: I suppose that does happen to trees sometimes.
burnt.trans: 这种情况有时确实会发生在树上。

support_pillar_complete.en: I wonder how long it will last.
support_pillar_complete.trans: 我想知道这次能维持多久。

ghost.en: Don't you fret %s, I've got everything under control!
ghost.trans: 你别怕，%s，我会处理好一切的！

firestarter.en: %s might not be very bright...
firestarter.trans: %s可能不是很灵光……

murderer.en: Killer! I'll put you back in the ground you sprung from!
murderer.trans: 凶手！我会把你送回你蹦出来的土里！

attacker.en: Oh of all the... would you settle down?!
attacker.trans: 这世上……你消停点好不好？！

reviver.en: Remind me never to die again.
reviver.trans: 提醒我不要再死了。

generic.en: %s! Have you grown since I last saw you?
generic.trans: %s！自从上次见面以后，你是不是长大了？

slingshot_band_tentacle.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

bananajuice.en: I suppose I can spare a moment to enjoy a sip or two.
bananajuice.trans: 我想我可以抽出一点时间来享受一两口。

yotc_seedpacket.en: I guess I should plant them at some point.

waffles.en: They're best when drenched in syrup.

war_blueprint.en: I wouldn't mind having a beefalo bodyguard.
war_blueprint.trans: 我不介意有只皮弗娄牛当保镖。

bluemooneye.en: I might tinker with it a bit more when I have the time.
bluemooneye.trans: 当我有时间了，我可能会再修补一下。

deerclops_eyeball.en: I'll bet that creature didn't foresee its day ending like this.
deerclops_eyeball.trans: 我敢打赌，那个生物没有预见到它的结局会是这样。

burnt.en: Its chairing days are done.

generic.en: I believe in my time, we called that a chair.
generic.trans:
我们那会儿管那东西
叫椅子。

burnt.en: It can't be that hot out!

generic.en: It might be prudent to keep an eye on the temperature.
generic.trans: 谨慎起见，可能要注意一下温度。

burning.en: Are these the "hot styles" young people are always talking about?
burning.trans: 这些是年轻人们追逐的 “热门”吗？

generic.en: I could always change my look this time around.
generic.trans: 这回我可以随时改变造型了。

burnt.en: One less distraction, I suppose.
burnt.trans: 也算少了一件分心的事情吧。

antchovies.en: Yeesh. Can I toss it back?

wagboss_robot_possessed.trans: 我们永远都不会吸取教训！

carrot_oversized.en: I wonder if eating all those carrots would improve my eyesight.
carrot_oversized.trans: 我想知道吃这些胡萝卜是否能改善我的视力。

turf_desertdirt.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_desertdirt.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

mask_princesshat.en: She has an attitude about her.
mask_princesshat.trans: 她一副颐指气使的样子。

burnt.en: It was just a matter of time.

generic.en: Offering made. Let's get on with it, worm!
generic.trans: 供品都献上了。抓紧开始吧，蠕虫！

empty.en: If I recall, it needs monster meat.
empty.trans: 如果我没记错，它需要怪物肉。

1.en: Oh, please don't slobber on me...
1.trans: 求你别把口水流到我身上……

2.en: Oh, please don't slobber on me...
2.trans: 求你别把口水流到我身上……

horseshoe.trans: 一点好运总不会有坏处。

pumpkinpie.en: Why waste time cutting it into slices when I can just eat the whole thing?
pumpkinpie.trans: 能一口吞的，干嘛还浪费时间把它切成片？

archive_centipede_husk.en: Not one usable bit of clockwork to be found.
archive_centipede_husk.trans: 没有找到一个可用的发条。

crumbs.en: Poor thing, it's leading us right to its home.
crumbs.trans: 可怜的东西，它正把我们引向它的家。

tentacle_garden.en: Another thing I probably shouldn't touch.

carnivalgame_wheelspin_kit.en: At least they're quick to assemble.
carnivalgame_wheelspin_kit.trans: 至少它们组装起来很快。

watertree_root.en: I should steer clear of those if I don't want to meet a watery end.
watertree_root.trans: 我不想葬身大海，所以还是远离那些东西吧。

plantmeat.en: If I wasn't so hungry, I might have second thoughts.
plantmeat.trans: 如果我不是那么饿，我可能会有别的想法。

oceanfishingbobber_ball.en: It looks like a standard bobber to me.
oceanfishingbobber_ball.trans: 我看就是一个标准的浮漂。

cave_entrance.en: I never was good at leaving well enough alone.
cave_entrance.trans: 我从来都不擅长一个人枯井逃生。

shovel_lunarplant.en: An odd, yet extremely efficient design.
shovel_lunarplant.trans: 古怪但却十分高效的设计。

generic.en: I have so much to do, but... it's just such a delightful distraction!
generic.trans: 我有这么多事情要做，但是……这种分心方式真令人愉快。

burning.en: This should put an end to it.

generic.en: I know what comes next.
generic.trans: 我知道接着会来什么。

meatballs.en: Meat in a ball, quick and to the point.
meatballs.trans: 肉捏成团，快速而有针对性。

yotb.en: Where's that peculiar judge? He might have an appreciation for this.
yotb.trans: 那个古怪的裁判在哪里？他应该会喜欢这个。

generic.en: I love a nice memento, they help me keep track of when I am.
generic.trans: 我喜欢漂亮的纪念品，能帮助我找到身处何时。

crabking_icewall.en: I won't let it slow me down.

burning.en: That's not good...

picked.en: No sense in waiting around for it to grow back.
picked.trans: 没必要干等它重新长回来。

generic.en: I'm definitely in a marsh.
generic.trans: 我肯定进了沼泽地了。

goldenaxe.en: What else will I use gold for around here?
goldenaxe.trans: 在这里，我能用黄金做什么？

honey.en: A little something to satisfy my sweet tooth.
honey.trans: 这小东西刚好可以满足我的甜食的渴望。

livingtree_root.en: The root inside is particularly lively.

monsterlasagna.en: Maybe I'm not so hungry after all...

generic.en: I really want to know what makes it tick...
generic.trans: 我想知道它是什么驱动的……

burnt.en: I was too late to save it.

burning.en: It's the right thing to do.

reviving.en: What a terrible fate for that poor merm.
reviving.trans: 可怜的鱼人，命运真悲惨。

generic.en: That merm needs to be burned.
generic.trans: 应该把那鱼人烧掉。

burnt.en: Fate was unkind to it.

generic.en: A bit ramshackle, but definitely an improvement!
generic.trans: 虽说有点破烂，但比之前好了。

golden_farm_hoe.en: Why can't the dirt just move itself?
golden_farm_hoe.trans: 为什么泥土不能自己移动呢？

turf_ruinstrim_glow.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_ruinstrim_glow.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

mosquitosack.en: I think I might be sick...

lunar_forge.en: Why waste time staring at it when I could be making something?
lunar_forge.trans: 与其盯着它浪费时间，不如拿它做点东西多好？

gargoyle_hound.en: The attention to detail is incredible!
gargoyle_hound.trans: 对细节的关注登峰造极！

burnt.en: Erased from the timeline.

generic.en: Dimensional cross-contamination aside, it's quite a lovely chest.
generic.trans: 撇开维度交叉污染不谈，这是个相当可爱的箱子。

generic.en: I bet I could lift it. It... might take a while though.
generic.trans: 我打赌我可以举起它。不过……可能要花点时间。

molebathill.en: What a horrid place to call home.
molebathill.trans: 家安在这种地方多么可怕。

wall_dreadstone_item.en: I'd better get it set up, no time to waste.
wall_dreadstone_item.trans: 快来装好它，没有时间可以浪费了。

ghost.en: %s! When did this happen?!
ghost.trans: %s！这是什么时候的事？！

firestarter.en: I don't think that's the best use of your time, %s...
firestarter.trans: 花时间做这个不好，%s……

murderer.en: %s! How could you?!
murderer.trans: %s！你怎么能这样？！

attacker.en: Nobody likes a bully, %s!
attacker.trans: 不要欺负人，%s！

reviver.en: We should all remember to be more cautious next time.
reviver.trans: 我们都应该记住，下次要更加谨慎。

generic.en: Sorry %s, no time to chat.
generic.trans: 抱歉%s，我没时间闲聊。

boat_bumper_yotd.en: I wouldn't like to be the one bumping into those horns.

ghostlyelixir_lunar.en: A little bit of metaphysical meddling never hurt anyone.
ghostlyelixir_lunar.trans: 一点点玄学上的干预不会伤害任何人。

battlesong_instant_revive.en: Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you?
battlesong_instant_revive.trans: 哦，你不会是想听我唱歌吧？

picked.en: No sense waiting around for it to grow back.
picked.trans: 没必要干等它重新长回来。

inground.en: It's probably just some kind of mushroom.

generic.en: Just a green mushroom.
generic.trans: 就是一颗绿蘑菇。

playing.en: Oooh, that does look like fun...
playing.trans: 哦，那个看起来确实很有趣……

generic.en: The mechanism won't work without a token.
generic.trans: 这套机械没有代币是不会工作的。

armordragonfly.en: I think it looks better on me than it did on the bug.
armordragonfly.trans: 我认为它在我身上比在虫子身上更好看。

blowdart_sleep.en: This should help me avoid some conflict.
blowdart_sleep.trans: 这应该可以帮助我避免一些冲突。

generic.en: Empty.
generic.trans: 空的。

rock_avocado_fruit_ripe.en: After all that waiting, it's finally somewhat edible.
rock_avocado_fruit_ripe.trans: 等了这么久，总算能吃了。

playing.en: Oh botheration, was it this one...?
playing.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐，这个是不是就是……？

generic.en: It leads down into the game's inner workings.
generic.trans: 它指向了游戏的内部运作。

little_walrus.en: Ah, youth. Enjoy it while you can.
little_walrus.trans: 啊，青春。趁你还有的时候抓紧享受它吧。

teleportato_ring.en: A ring that could focus dimensional energies.
teleportato_ring.trans: 一个可以聚集空间能量的圆环。

fig_cooked.en: I'll admit, cooking it did help bring the sweetness out.
fig_cooked.trans: 我承认，烹饪它确实有助于把甜味带出来。

armor_carrotlure.en: I can see why the bunnies love it.
armor_carrotlure.trans: 我知道为什么兔子们喜欢它了。

wereitem_goose.en: That lumberjack's an odd duck, isn't he?
wereitem_goose.trans: 那伐木工人是只怪鸭子，不是吗？

mermhat.en: It's not terribly hard to outwit those scaly creatures.
mermhat.trans: 骗过那些有鳞片的生物并不难。

burning.en: I hope I never see you again.
burning.trans: 但愿我以后都不会再看到你。

generic.en: We should burn it, if I recall correctly.
generic.trans: 如果我没记错，我们应该烧掉它。

moonstorm_spark.trans: 具有强大可能性的一颗斑点。

kitcoon_savanna.en: Oh how adorable, and conveniently pocket-sized!
kitcoon_savanna.trans: 哦，多么可爱，而且还是便携的口袋款！

trunkvest_winter.en: The hair is just as thick on the inside.
trunkvest_winter.trans: 里面的毛皮也是一样的厚。

chesspiece_daywalker.en: Ah yes, how could I forget that time I was nearly smashed to bits?
chesspiece_daywalker.trans: 啊对了，我怎么能不记得那次我差点被砸成碎片？

lucky_goldnugget.en: I won't say no to a little extra luck.
lucky_goldnugget.trans: 我不会对一点额外的运气说不。

baconeggs.en: Who has time to sit and eat breakfast?
baconeggs.trans: 谁有时间坐下来吃早餐？

generic.en: A horrid way to go.
generic.trans: 这种走法太恐怖了。

oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.en: If it will help me catch a fish faster, I'm all for it.
oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.trans: 如果能帮我更快抓到鱼，那我愿意试。

charlie_stage_post.en: Honestly, who has time for these theatrics?
charlie_stage_post.trans: 老实说，谁有时间看这些戏剧的东西？

battlesong_sanityaura.en: Oh, you wouldn't want to hear me sing... would you?
battlesong_sanityaura.trans: 哦，你不会是想听我唱歌吧？

chesspiece_butterfly.trans: 它的美丽被永远地捕获了。

rock.trans: 哦，是一块巨石，真没想到。

ghost.en: Stay away from me! I won't become like you!
ghost.trans: 离我远一点! 我不会变得像你一样的!

skullchest.en: I'm not sure if I want to open it.

mast_yotd.trans: 看起来相当有气势，对不对？

tentaclespots.en: Such a nice pattern, if only it wasn't so slimy and disgusting.
tentaclespots.trans: 这么好的图案，如果它不是那么粘稠和恶心就好了。

beeswax.en: If only I knew how to make candles.
beeswax.trans: 我要是知道怎么做蜡烛就好了。

shroom_skin.en: That creature must've been half decayed. How horrible!
shroom_skin.trans: 那个生物一定是已经腐烂了一半。多吓人！

shadowthrall_horns.en: I will not be your dinner!

lost_toy_1.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_1.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

lost_toy_2.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_2.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

pigelite3.en: Let's just calm down for a minute...

pigelite1.en: How did I get myself into this?

oar_driftwood.en: Wouldn't a sail be much faster?

lost_toy_7.en: Oh botheration, I think I've started hallucinating.
lost_toy_7.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我大概开始出现幻觉了。

hermitcrab_lightpost_item.en: I think she'll be rather pleased with this.

dug_grass.en: I can think of a better place for it.
dug_grass.trans: 我想到了一个更好的地方。

piggyback.en: Do I really want to lug this thing around?
piggyback.trans: 我真要拖着这个东西到处走吗？

carrat_good.en: This one might be a winner!

generic.en: It measures the weight of experience.
generic.trans: 它衡量的是经验的重量。

burnt.en: There isn't much left of it.

critter_eyeofterror.en: An all seeing eye will be quite a useful companion.
critter_eyeofterror.trans: 有全视之眼当伙伴会非常有用。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_kit.en: At least they're quick to assemble.
carnivalgame_feedchicks_kit.trans: 至少它们组装起来很快。

lunar_forge_kit.en: Well, it's not going to build itself.
lunar_forge_kit.trans: 得了，它不会自己建造的。

slingshot_handle_voidcloth.trans: 小朋友居然有这样的创意。

1.en: I'm amazed that young man can keep her under control.
1.trans: 我很惊讶那个年轻人能把她控制住。

2.en: I'm amazed that young man can keep her under control.
2.trans: 我很惊讶那个年轻人能把她控制住。

book_web.en: Ha! Was this written by a spider? I won't let my guard down that easily.
book_web.trans: 哈！这本书是蜘蛛写的吗？我的心防不会轻易卸下。

generic.en: Yuck. They smell like decay.
generic.trans: 咦。闻起来像腐物。

burnt.en: Now they smell like burnt decay.
burnt.trans: 闻起来像是烧焦的腐物。

atrium_statue.en: A frozen moment in ancient history.
atrium_statue.trans: 古代历史上的一个凝固了的时刻。

burnt.en: Well, that's that. Time to move on.
burnt.trans: 好了，就这样。是时候翻篇了。

generic.en: I don't know where he finds the time for such things.
generic.trans: 我不知道他从哪抽出时间做这些事情。

crabking_mob.trans: 螃蟹，别再浪费我时间了！

critter_dragonling.en: I'm not really a pet person... but I'll make an exception for you.
critter_dragonling.trans: 我不是一个养宠物的人……但我会为你破例。

turf_ruinsbrick.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_ruinsbrick.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

corn.en: The nice thing about corn is you don't have to fuss with cooking it.
corn.trans: 玉米的好处是你不必大费周章去烹饪。

hermitcrabtea_moon_tree_blossom.en: The moon imparts an unforgettable taste.
hermitcrabtea_moon_tree_blossom.trans: 月亮赋予了它难以忘怀的味道。

grotto_pool_big.en: It's not a pool I'd care to take a dip in.
grotto_pool_big.trans: 我不愿意泡在这池子里。

yotr_fightring_kit.en: I suppose there are worse ways to spend one's time.
yotr_fightring_kit.trans: 还有比这更糟糕的方式来打发时间。

1.en: No one's here.
1.trans: 空无一人。

2.en: Something destroyed this town.
2.trans: 这个小镇被摧毁了。

ready.en: Salt has gathered on the rope.

generic.en: Science takes time.
generic.trans: 科学是需要时间的。

critter_kitten.trans: 你还真是个好奇的小家伙啊？

palmconetree.en: Have I seen that somewhere before? I can't quite recall.
palmconetree.trans: 我在哪见过它吧？有点想不起来了。

robot.en: %s! There might still be time to bring them back!

default.en: %s! You're not going out like this, not on my watch!
default.trans: %s！有我在，是不会让你就这么走的！
