female.en: %s! You're not going out like this, not on my watch!
female.trans: %s！有我在，是不会让你就这么走的！

male.en: %s! There might still be time to bring him back!

noammo.en: Next time I'll remember to bring cannonballs.

ammoloaded.en: It never hurts to take precautions.

generic.en: I could have sworn I loaded that cannon... maybe it hasn't happened yet.
generic.trans: 我可以发誓我给那门大炮装填好了炮弹……也许只是还不到时间。

lavae.en: Tsk, she just lets her children run wild!
lavae.trans: 啧啧，她就这样让她的孩子们乱跑！

winter_food9.en: A nice cold glass of eggnog might do me some good.
winter_food9.trans: 一杯冰凉的蛋奶酒可能对我有好处。

high.en: Oh botheration, I got carried away with the kindling!
high.trans: 哦，麻烦呐，我柴火加多了！

low.en: It needs more to burn if I want it to last.
low.trans: 如果想让它继续烧的话，它需要更多的燃料。

embers.en: I need to give it something to burn, quickly!
embers.trans: 我需要给它一些燃烧的东西，快！

generic.en: It keeps the shadows at bay.
generic.trans: 它能让暗影远离。

out.en: That was nice while it lasted.

halloweenpotion_drinks_weak.en: I'm a clocksmith, not a chemist.
halloweenpotion_drinks_weak.trans: 我是钟表匠，不是化学家。

moonglass_charged.en: It's not going to stay charged for long.
moonglass_charged.trans: 它不会长时间保持充能。

winter_food5.en: I never understood the appeal of making a dessert that looks like a piece of wood.
winter_food5.trans: 我一直不明白做把甜点做成根木头有什么吸引力。

winter_food6.en: Alright, maybe just a bit of pudding.
winter_food6.trans: 好吧，那就吃一口布丁吧。

winter_food1.en: I half expect it to start running at any moment.
winter_food1.trans: 我觉得它多半很快就会跑掉。

winter_food2.en: It's so hard to stop once you've eaten one.
winter_food2.trans: 一旦你吃了一个，就很难停下来。

moon_altar_rock_seed.en: There's definitely something stuck in there. I wonder...
moon_altar_rock_seed.trans: 肯定有东西卡在里面。我想知道……

record_dusk.trans: 我更喜欢他们早期的作品。

stalagmite.en: You've seen one rock, you've seen them all.
stalagmite.trans: 见过一块石头就等于见过所有的石头了。

playbill_the_veil.en: Rather disturbing if you ask me.
playbill_the_veil.trans: 你问我意见的话，我会说很令人不安。

chesspiece_warg_mutated.en: That's one memory I'd be happy not to revisit.
chesspiece_warg_mutated.trans: 我很乐意不再重温这段记忆。

icebox.en: I'm all for making things last longer.
icebox.trans: 我完全赞成让东西更持久。

quagmire_grill.en: Now all I need is a backyard to put it in.
quagmire_grill.trans: 我现在就差一个摆放它的后院了。

chesspiece_yoth.en: I have mixed emotions about this one.
chesspiece_yoth.trans: 我对它的感受……有些复杂。

damaged.en: It can have a second chance or its parts can give one.
damaged.trans: 它可以自己获得第二次机会，或是献出零件给别人机会。

generic.en: Always in the way!
generic.trans: 一直挡路！

onemanband.en: I can play all these instruments at once, what a time saver!
onemanband.trans: 我可以同时演奏所有乐器了，真是节省时间啊！

wagstaff_npc_mutations.en: Do you think I have all the time in the world for your schemes?
wagstaff_npc_mutations.trans: 你觉得我有时间看你玩这些把戏吗？

chesspiece_yotd.en: Back where it all began... the boat race, anyway.
chesspiece_yotd.trans: 回到一切开始的地方……赛龙舟。

nightmarelight.en: I'd better not get too close.

book_horticulture.en: Say Wickerbottom, do you dabble in temporal magic as well?
book_horticulture.trans: 薇克巴顿，你也会玩时空魔法吗？

gingerbreadpig.en: Oh, these are the ones that run!

slingshotammo_honey.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_honey.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

catcoonhat.en: Their sacrifice will keep me warm and alive.
catcoonhat.trans: 它们的牺牲将使我保持温暖和活力。

minotaurchest.en: Did I open it last time around? I can't recall...
minotaurchest.trans: 我上次打开过吗？我不记得了……

kelphat.en: It's not the craziest thing I've worn.
kelphat.trans: 这不是我穿过的最疯狂的东西。

generic.en: We'd better start cooking some offerings.
generic.trans: 我们最好开始煮些祭品。

full.en: It's in the process of digestinating.

chesspiece_yots.en: And I just managed to forget you.

beefalo_groomer_item.en: Did I not set that up already?
beefalo_groomer_item.trans: 我不是已经设置好了吗？

abysspillar_trial.en: Is it my choice to pull the lever now if I already know what I'm going to do?
abysspillar_trial.trans: 既然我早知道接下来会怎么做，现在拉动拉杆还算不算是做选择？

rabbitkingminion_bunnyman.trans: 确实是从一窝坏窝里生出来的。

moon_cap.en: A mutated mushroom, what could go wrong?
moon_cap.trans: 一颗变异的蘑菇，能出什么问题呢？

glommerfuel.trans: 哦。留下便便了。多可爱啊。

turf_badlands.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_badlands.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

held.en: Well, it's in my pocket. Now what?
held.trans: 嗯，它在我的口袋里了。然后呢？

generic.en: Some kind of red bird.
generic.trans: 某种红色的鸟。

dragonfly.en: Ohhhh I was really hoping to avoid dodging fiery bug monsters today.
dragonfly.trans: 哼，我今天还就不想躲避那只着火的虫怪了。

mermguard.en: I certainly hope they're fighting for our side.
mermguard.trans: 我当然希望他们是为我们一方而战。

turf_ruinsbrick_glow.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_ruinsbrick_glow.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

beemine_maxwell.trans: 被装在地雷里的狂暴蚊子！

generic.en: Let's steer clear of that.
generic.trans: 一定要避开那东西。

lifeinjector.en: I have no use for it, what I need is more time!
lifeinjector.trans: 它对我没有用，我需要的是更多的时间。

yotb_sewingmachine.en: At least it's faster than sewing by hand.

firestarter.en: I see, in this timeline you fancy yourself an arsonist?
firestarter.trans: 我明白了，在这条时间线上，你认为自己是个纵火犯？

ghost.en: %s! Don't worry, I can fix this!
ghost.trans: %s！别怕，我能搞定！

murderer.en: %s! What have you done?!
murderer.trans: %s！你都做了什么？！

attacker.en: I'm keeping my eye on you, %s...
attacker.trans: 你给我小心了，%s……

reviver.en: Th-thank you %s, I won't be so careless again.
reviver.trans: 谢谢你%s，我不会再这么不小心了。

generic.en: Sorry %s, I have no time to stay and chat!
generic.trans: 抱歉，%s，我没时间跟你坐下闲聊！

generic.en: The mechanism won't work without a token.
generic.trans: 这套机械没有代币是不会工作的。

balloon.en: Balloons have such a short lifespan.
balloon.trans: 气球的生命周期太过短暂。

slingshotammo_purebrilliance.en: These obviously weren't made with precision in mind.
slingshotammo_purebrilliance.trans: 这些在制作的时候显然没有考虑到精准度。

costume_tree_body.en: It looks like a... tree costume?

pottedfern.en: I can never seem to keep them alive for long.
pottedfern.trans: 我一直无法让它们活得长久。

chesspiece_wagboss_robot.en: Do we really need a reminder of this?
chesspiece_wagboss_robot.trans: 我们当真需要这东西来做纪念？

fertilizer.en: Manure, conveniently stored in a bucket.
fertilizer.trans: 粪便，方便地储存在了一个桶里。

chesspiece_carrat.en: I don't think this really warranted a statue.
chesspiece_carrat.trans: 我不认为这真的需要一个雕像。

spice_salt.en: I'll just toss a pinch over my shoulder for good luck.
spice_salt.trans: 我在肩膀上撒上一撮，以求好运。

turf_cave.en: Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?
turf_cave.trans: 我为什么要浪费时间盯着地面看？

describe_plantstressed.trans: 有什么东西让它不高兴了。

announce_detach_buff_electricattack.en: I'll miss having electricity at my fingertips.
announce_detach_buff_electricattack.trans: 我会怀念指尖带电的日子。

prey.en: All that time I spent, down the drain.
prey.trans: 我花费的所有时间都付诸东流了。

spider.en: I hope I don't run into him again.
spider.trans: 我希望我不会再碰到他。

generic.en: I've got better things to do.
generic.trans: 饶你小命，我还有重要的事情要做。

announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.en: I know what those are... nothing right about them.
announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.trans: 我知道那些是什么……它们完全不对劲。

announce_thorns.en: Ack! I've got a thorn in my side!

1.en: Finally!
1.trans: 终于好了！

2.en: Found you at last.
2.trans: 总算找到你了。

3.en: So that's where you were hiding this whole time!
3.trans: 原来你一直都藏在这里啊！

4.en: I knew you couldn't hide forever.
4.trans: 我知道你不可能永远躲起来。

announce_oceanfishing_linesnap.trans: 不！我差一点就钓上来了！

announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.en: I guess I can't avoid sleeping forever.
announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 还是躲不开要睡觉的命运啊。

announce_flare_seen.en: Was that a flare? I'd better hurry and see what's going on!
announce_flare_seen.trans: 那是一个信号弹吗？我最好赶快去看看发生了什么事！

wintersfeastfuel.en: I can't explain why, but it reminds me of baba's cooking.
wintersfeastfuel.trans: 我也说不清为什么，但是它让我想起爸爸做的饭。

announce_revived_from_corpse.en: F-for a moment, I thought I was done for...
announce_revived_from_corpse.trans: 有那么一刻，我以为我已经完蛋了……

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: That has to be the last one.

announce_freedom.en: I-I'm free... I'm alive... h-ha! Ha h-haha! Hahahaha!!
announce_freedom.trans: 我——我自由了……我还活着……哈哈！哈哈哈！哈哈哈！哈哈哈！哈哈哈哈！！！

announce_hunt_wrong_fork.en: Who's out there?! Something's watching me, I just know it!
announce_hunt_wrong_fork.trans: 谁在外面？！有东西在看着我，我准没说错！

announce_ticoon_abandoned.en: I've spent enough time following you around for one day.
announce_ticoon_abandoned.trans: 我都跟你一天了，差不多得了。

1.en: Oooh, I don't feel well at all...
1.trans: 喔，我身体不舒服啊……

2.en: Help! I've been poisoned!
2.trans: 救命啊！我中毒了！

announce_nodangersiesta.en: There's more important things to worry about at the moment!
announce_nodangersiesta.trans: 目前有更多重要的事情需要担心！

1.en: Oof...
1.trans: 见鬼……

2.en: I'm getting... too old for this...
2.trans: 我这个年纪……已经不适合这样了……

4.en: I usually... work with... smaller things...
4.trans: 我一般……处理一些小型的东西……

6.en: Come... on...! I... have things... to do...!

7.en: Oh yes... let's let the clockmaker... do the heavy lifting...!
7.trans: 对……咱们就让钟表匠……干重活呗！

announce_lunarhail_bird_sounds.en: I'll never get over that dreadful sound.
announce_lunarhail_bird_sounds.trans: 我永远都忘不了那种可怕的叫声。

announce_elixir_boosted.en: Like a good cup of tea.

announce_pocketwatch_portal.en: We're here! Don't be alarmed, a bit of time sickness is completely normal.
announce_pocketwatch_portal.trans: 我们到了！不要惊慌，有点晕车的感觉是完全正常的。

announce_bees.en: Oh botheration. Those bees really tick me off!
announce_bees.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。这些蜜蜂嗡嗡的烦死人了！

announce_yoth_oncooldown.en: The knights must be preoccupied. Hardly an excuse, if you ask me.
announce_yoth_oncooldown.trans: 那些骑士大概有事情忙。但恕我直言，他们不应该以此为借口。

1.en: Oh no... my bad sense of direction must've rubbed off on it.
1.trans: 完了……我方向感差也影响到它了。

2.en: Wrong way, go back!
2.trans: 走错了，回头！

announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.en: Finally, I don't have to waste time sleeping!
announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 我终于不用浪费时间睡觉了！

announce_shelter.en: I should be protected here for now.
announce_shelter.trans: 我在这里应该能受到保护。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.en: I seem to recall there being one more to find...
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.trans: 我似乎记得还有一个要找……

announce_bravery_potion.en: It doesn't seem quite as scary this time around.
announce_bravery_potion.trans: 这回我好像不那么怕了。

announce_charlie.en: They found me... N-no! Stay away!
announce_charlie.trans: 他们找到我了……不——不！走开！

announce_quake.en: The timeline's collapsing! No, worse, it's the ground!
announce_quake.trans: 时间线在崩溃！不对，更可怕，是地面！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.en: Surely they wouldn't have gone all the way out here?
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.trans: 他们肯定不会大老远跑到这里来吧？

announce_winters_feast_buff_over.en: That was fun... maybe I'll go back and re-live it sometime.
announce_winters_feast_buff_over.trans: 这很有趣……也许我什么时候会回去重新体验一下。

announce_oceanfishing_linetooloose.en: I need to keep the line taut.

announce_crafting_fail.en: Oh botheration. I forgot something again, didn't I?
announce_crafting_fail.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我是不是又丢三落四了？

announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.en: My time being unbothered by acid rain is, sadly, over.
announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.trans: 遗憾啊，我不受酸雨侵扰的时间已经结束。

announce_canfix.en: I've repaired complicated timepieces, fixing this should be easy!
announce_canfix.trans: 钟表那么复杂我都能修，修这个应该很容易！

announce_compass_out.en: I'm not sure how this simple mechanism managed to break, but...
announce_compass_out.trans: 真搞不懂这么简单的机械结构怎么会坏，可是……

announce_wormhole.en: I can't believe I just did that...
announce_wormhole.trans: 我不能相信我刚刚居然那么做了……

announce_hermitcrab_shell_badteleportpoi.en: Well that was a waste of time.

1.en: only_used_by_winona
1.trans: only_used_by_winona

deer.en: This won't go well for you!
deer.trans: 这对你来说不会有什么好结果！

spider_warrior.en: Did I insult you in some other timeline?
spider_warrior.trans: 我是在别的时间线里羞辱过你吗？

spider.en: Dial it back a notch, would you?

generic.en: You ruffian! I'll clean your clock!
generic.trans: 你这个流氓！我要拆散你的零件！

announce_wanda_normaltoyoung.en: Ha! Full of youthful vigor once again!
announce_wanda_normaltoyoung.trans: 哈！再次充满了青春的活力！

announce_floater_held.en: I saw my life flash before my eyes... not in any particular order.
announce_floater_held.trans: 我的一生在眼前闪过……顺序完全打乱了。

announce_wanda_youngtonormal.en: It's alright, I still have time...

announce_weight_heavy.trans:
重量：{weight}
哈！我怎么这么能行！

announce_unimplemented.en: I don't think that belongs in this timeline.
announce_unimplemented.trans: 我认为它不属于这条时间线。

announce_otterboat_outofshallows.en: No, no, no! Now is not the time to start falling apart!
announce_otterboat_outofshallows.trans: 不，不，不！现在还不是崩溃的时候！

describe_plantstressornutrients.en: I'm sure I gave it some fertilizer not too long ago... or maybe I will soon.
describe_plantstressornutrients.trans: 我确信不久前我给它施了些肥料……或者也许我很快就会施。

announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.en: Botheration... it's too bright to sleep while that automaton's about.
announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.trans: 麻烦呐……那个机器人把周围照的太亮，根本没法睡。

announce_hunt_lost_trail.en: Lost it. Maybe I should retrace my steps.
announce_hunt_lost_trail.trans: 跟丢了。也许我应该回头再找找。

announce_mount_lowhealth.en: I think its time in this world is almost over.
announce_mount_lowhealth.trans: 我认为它在这个世界的时间几近结束。

announce_hunt_beast_nearby.en: An animal must've been through here just moments ago.
announce_hunt_beast_nearby.trans: 刚才一定有动物经过这里。

announce_boat_leak.en: Oh no no no! T-the boat's taking on water!!

announce_highresearch.en: That really got the gears in my head turning!
announce_highresearch.trans: 它让我脑袋里面的齿轮转动起来了！

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_start.en: Alright go on now, let's make this quick.
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_start.trans: 好吧，快去吧，咱们麻利点。

announce_sacredchest_yes.en: I knew I could puzzle it out!
announce_sacredchest_yes.trans: 我知道我可以把它解出来！

1.en: The ground is trying to swallow me!
1.trans: 大地要把我吞没了！

2.en: What is that horrible rumble?
2.trans: 那可怕的隆隆声是什么？

describe_planthappy.en: I'd best leave well enough alone.

announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: This is more like it! I'll have everything done in no time at all!
announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.trans: 这才像话啊！我很快就能完成所有的工作了！

announce_winch_claw_no_item.en: I wasted my precious time for nothing.
announce_winch_claw_no_item.trans: 我白白浪费了我的宝贵时间。

announce_tool_tooweak.en: Oh botheration! I'll need something stronger than this...
announce_tool_tooweak.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！我得找个比它更结实的……

describe_plantverystressed.en: I can feel the stress radiating off of it.
describe_plantverystressed.trans: 我能感觉到它所散发出来的压力。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_time_almost_.en: Better hurry, our time's almost up!
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_time_almost_.trans: 要快点，我们的时间快到了！

announce_cant_escape_curse.en: Why can't I seem to...? Oh no...

announce_yotd_noboats.en: I should scootch my boat a bit closer to the starting point.
announce_yotd_noboats.trans: 我得把这船往起点挪一挪。

quagmire_announce_mealburnt.en: I left it on too long.

announce_nodaysleep.en: The sun's shining in my eyes...

announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.en: I'm suddenly feeling a bit unprotected...
announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.trans: 我突然觉得有点不受保护……

announce_tool_slip.en: I'm usually not such a butterfingers.

announce_archive_old_knowledge.en: I know this. Or maybe I will know it soon.
announce_archive_old_knowledge.trans: 这个我知道。或者说我一会儿就会知道。

announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: Oh botheration, I was getting used to being waterproof.
announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我刚刚才适应了防水的能力。

1.en: only_used_by_wolfgang
1.trans: only_used_by_wolfgang

2.en: only_used_by_wolfgang
2.trans: only_used_by_wolfgang

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.en: Yes, this looks more familiar, I'm sure I'll find them here!
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.trans: 是的，看起来很熟悉，我肯定会在这里找到它们的！

announce_hunt_start_fork.en: I don't think I'll like what I find at the end of this trail...
announce_hunt_start_fork.trans: 我应该不会喜欢将在这条踪迹尽头发现的东西……

announce_archive_no_power.en: This place is like a clock that's been left unwound.
announce_archive_no_power.trans: 这地方就像没上发条的钟一样。

announce_monkey_curse_change.en: Oh botheration! I don't have time to monkey about!
announce_monkey_curse_change.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！我可没时间像猴子一样瞎胡闹！

announce_oceanfishing_badcast.en: Maybe I should go back and try that again...
announce_oceanfishing_badcast.trans: 也许我应该回去再试一次……

announce_soaked.en: I'm going to catch my death if I don't dry off soon!

announce_pocketwatch_recall.en: Nothing like a jaunt through time to get the old heart pumping!
announce_pocketwatch_recall.trans: 没有什么能比时空旅行更让这颗老心脏砰砰狂跳了！

announce_nowardrobeonfire.en: I'm not meeting a fiery demise for a change of clothes, thank you!
announce_nowardrobeonfire.trans: 我不会为了换件衣服被烧死，谢谢你！

announce_prefallinvoid.en: Time to get to solid ground!
announce_prefallinvoid.trans: 是时候去踏上坚实的土地了！

announce_moonpotion_failed.en: Well that didn't work out like I hoped.
announce_moonpotion_failed.trans: 哎，并没有像我希望的那样成功。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.en: Oh botheration, I wasn't quick enough.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我还是不够快啊。

announce_detach_buff_attack.en: Whew, I don't know what came over me...
announce_detach_buff_attack.trans: 呼，我也不知道我是怎么了……

announce_scrapbook_full.en: Didn't I already fill out my scrapbook?
announce_scrapbook_full.trans: 我不是已经在图鉴上填上了吗？

announce_kitcoon_found_in_the_wild.en: I thought I might find something hiding there!
announce_kitcoon_found_in_the_wild.trans: 我早就想到能在这找到了！

announce_winch_claw_miss.en: Oh botheration, let's try that again.
announce_winch_claw_miss.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。那我们再试一次吧。

1.en: only_used_by_wolfgang
1.trans: only_used_by_wolfgang

2.en: only_used_by_wolfgang
2.trans: only_used_by_wolfgang

announce_burnt.en: I was almost burnt to a crisp!

announce_nomountedgift.en: I'll just quickly hop off my beefalo first.
announce_nomountedgift.trans: 让我先快速跳下我的皮弗娄牛。

announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.en: Oh botheration, the checkpoints need to be set up before the race, not after!
announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。要在赛前就设置好检查点，不能赛后补！

announce_wanda_normaltoold.en: I don't have much time left!
announce_wanda_normaltoold.trans: 我已经没有多少时间了！

announce_hungry.en: How long has it been since I last ate?

announce_petrifed_trees.en: What was that horrible sound? Did it come from the trees?
announce_petrifed_trees.trans: 是什么可怕的声音？它是从树上传来的吗？

announce_knockedout.en: How long have I been out? How much time did I lose?!
announce_knockedout.trans: 我晕了多久？我失去了多少时间？！

announce_weapon_tooweak.en: Oh botheration! I'll need something stronger than this...
announce_weapon_tooweak.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐！我得找个比它更结实的……

announce_revived_other_corpse.en: Whew... I got here just in time.

announce_carrat_error_stunned.en: This is no time to stand around!
announce_carrat_error_stunned.trans: 现在可不是呆站着的时候！

announce_klaus_enrage.en: I think it's time for me to leave!

announce_ocean_silhouette_incoming.en: I don't like the looks of that shadow...
announce_ocean_silhouette_incoming.trans: 我不喜欢那影子的样子……

announce_ruins_reset.en: I felt a temporal wobble... a part of this timeline just reset itself!
announce_ruins_reset.trans: 我感觉到了时空的晃动……这条时间线的一部分刚刚重设了！

announce_archive_new_knowledge.en: It's showing me strange designs... I don't think I've seen them before.
announce_archive_new_knowledge.trans: 它向我展示了奇怪的设计……我以前没有见过。

announce_attach_buff_electricattack.en: I've never felt so full of energy!
announce_attach_buff_electricattack.trans: 我从来没这么有精神过！

announce_trap_went_off.en: Ack! That wasn't meant to happen!

announce_monkey_curse_changeback.en: Finally! I was starting to think I'd never return to normal!
announce_monkey_curse_changeback.trans: 终于变回来了！我还以为永远不会恢复了！

announce_insufficientfertilizer.en: Hm, did I remember to give it fertilizer?
announce_insufficientfertilizer.trans: 嗯，我有没有记得给它施肥？

no_station.en: I won't be able to make it without a proper workstation.
no_station.trans: 没有适当的工作站，我也做不出来。

no_ingredients.en: Oh botheration, I'll have to pick up a few things first.
no_ingredients.trans: 哦，烦恼，我得先去找点东西。

no_tech.en: I haven't quite figured that one out yet.
no_tech.trans: 我还没有完全搞清楚这个。

describe_smoldering.en: It'll burst into flames any moment now.
describe_smoldering.trans: 它随时都会爆裂出火焰。

announce_pick_disease_warning.en: Uh, is it supposed to smell like that?
announce_pick_disease_warning.trans: 嗯啊，本来就是那味道吗？

describe_plantstressorfamily.en: It wouldn't hurt to plant a few more to keep it company.
describe_plantstressorfamily.trans: 再种上几株来陪伴它也无妨。

1.en: There's a "regal" air about you.
1.trans: 你身上有股“王霸”之气。

2.en: The "crown" suits you.
2.trans: 这“皇冠”跟你太搭了。

announce_winters_feast_buff.en: All this excitement is kind of infectious!
announce_winters_feast_buff.trans: 这种兴奋情绪非常有感染力！

announce_reviving_corpse.trans: 有我在，绝不允许这种情况发生！！

announce_sacredchest_no.en: This was all just a waste of time!
announce_sacredchest_no.trans: 这一切都只是在浪费时间！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: Oh good, {name} finally found the last one.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.trans: 好了，{name}总算找到了最后一个。

announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.en: Nothing seems to be catching its attention.
announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.trans: 似乎没有什么能引起它的注意。

announce_ghostdrain.en: Stop it, I refuse to accept mortality!
announce_ghostdrain.trans: 别闹了，我拒绝接受死亡！

announce_oceanfishing_gotaway.en: I'll get you last time! Err, next time!
announce_oceanfishing_gotaway.trans: 我回上次抓住你！呃，下次也行！

announce_inv_full.en: I'll have to come back for it later. Or earlier.
announce_inv_full.trans: 我必须以后再来找它。或者去以前。

announce_elixir_too_super.en: Ooph. That is far too strong.

describe_plantstressorseason.en: This might not be the best time of year for it.
describe_plantstressorseason.trans: 现在种这个可能不当季。

announce_spooked.en: Ack! I don't need this in my life!!
announce_spooked.trans: 呃！我的生活里不需要这个！！

announce_deerclops.en: Oh botheration, is it that time of year already?
announce_deerclops.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。又到了那个季节了吗？

announce_klaus_callforhelp.en: How does someone like that have friends to call on for help?
announce_klaus_callforhelp.trans: 这样的人怎么会有朋友帮忙？

announce_hunt_avoid_fork.trans: 这条踪迹好像没那么危险。

announce_boat_sink.en: No, wait! I need more time!!
announce_boat_sink.trans: 不，等等！我需要更多的时间！！

announce_ticoon_start_tracking.en: He's certainly in a rush to get somewhere.
announce_ticoon_start_tracking.trans: 他急着要冲去一个地方。

announce_wet.en: It's getting uncomfortably damp around here.
announce_wet.trans: 这里的天气越来越潮湿，令人不舒服。

announce_toadescaping.en: M-maybe I should just let it go.

describe_generic.en: A very particular something or other.
describe_generic.trans: 应该算是特别的东西吧。

announce_yotd_notenoughboats.en: I should clear some space. If I'm not mistaken, a competitor will be dropping in.
announce_yotd_notenoughboats.trans: 我应该腾出点地方了。如果我没猜错的话，有一个对手要进来了。

announce_adventurefail.en: If at first you don't succeed, reverse time and try again.
announce_adventurefail.trans: 如果一开始你没有成功，就扭转时间再试一次。

announce_washed_ashore.en: I-I don't think I'm going on another boat for a while.
announce_washed_ashore.trans: 我——我想我最近不会再上船了。

1.en: Time to move!
1.trans: 该动起来了！

2.en: I need to get out of here!
2.trans: 我得离开这！

3.en: Something's happening... I can't stay here!

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.en: Perhaps I have time for one quick game...
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.trans: 也许可以玩一局快速的游戏……

announce_townportalteleport.en: I've jumped through time and space enough to be used to this sort of thing.
announce_townportalteleport.trans: 我跳跃过多少时间和空间，这种事情早就司空见惯了。

announce_ticoon_dead.en: His time was cut short... and my time's been wasted!
announce_ticoon_dead.trans: 他的时间骤然停止……我的时间也浪费了！

announce_accomplishment_done.en: I think I've accomplished everything I needed to do.
announce_accomplishment_done.trans: 我应该已经完成了所需的一切。

yucky.en: This may be a matter of survival, but I do have SOME standards left.
yucky.trans: 虽然可能事关生死，但我还是有些原则的。

spoiled.en: Can I go back to a time before I ate that?
spoiled.trans: 我能不能去到过去再吃那个？

generic.en: Mmm!
generic.trans: 唔！

stale.en: I think that was getting a bit old.
stale.trans: 那个时间好像有点长了。

announce_pirates_arrive.en: Botheration! I can hear their catchy music getting closer!
announce_pirates_arrive.trans: 麻烦呐！我能听到他们朗朗上口的音乐越来越近了！

announce_attach_buff_playerabsorption.en: I feel a bit safer, strangely.
announce_attach_buff_playerabsorption.trans: 很奇怪，我突然觉得更有安全感了。

announce_carrat_start_race.en: On my mark, three, one, two-- GO!

announce_pocketwatch_open_portal_differe.en: Keep your wits about you, this is going to be a big jump!
announce_pocketwatch_open_portal_differe.trans: 当心了，这一跳非同小可！

announce_torch_out.en: My torch! I need to find another one quickly!
announce_torch_out.trans: 我的火炬！我得赶紧再找一个！

quagmire_announce_lose.en: I have a bad feeling about this.

announce_ticoon_waiting_for_leader.en: Are you waiting for me? What an odd turn of events.
announce_ticoon_waiting_for_leader.trans: 你在等我吗？真是个奇怪的转折。

announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.en: Oh botheration, I didn't find it quick enough.
announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我还是不够快啊。

announce_carrat_error_walking.en: How did I end up with such a slow carrat?
announce_carrat_error_walking.trans: 我怎么遇上一只这么慢的胡萝卜鼠？

announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.en: I suppose we must wait until sundown to finish this squabble.
announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.trans: 看来要等到日落后才能结束这场争吵。

announce_off_script.en: I don't think that's how it's supposed to go.

announce_nohungersiesta.en: I can't rest! I need to find something to eat, quickly!
announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 我不能休息! 我需要找点东西吃，快！

1.en: I can't afford to waste time talking to a plant!
1.trans: 我不能浪费时间与植物交谈！

2.en: I don't really know what to say...
2.trans: 我真的不知道该说些什么……

3.en: Err... can you grow faster, please?

4.en: I don't have time for this!
4.trans: 我可没时间浪费在这个上！

5.en: Maybe I could speed this up a little... you wouldn't mind that, would you?
5.trans: 也许我可以把速度加快一点……你不介意吧？

announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.en: Everything's too soggy, I'm not wasting my time with this.
announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.trans: 所有的东西都太潮湿了，我不会在这上面浪费时间。

announce_eating_not_feasting.en: Maybe I should offer some to the others...
announce_eating_not_feasting.trans: 也许我该分给其他人一些……

announce_enter_dark.en: No! I won't let the darkness take me!!
announce_enter_dark.trans: 不！我不会让黑暗带走我！！

seed_reveal.en: I wonder how long it was stuck in there.
seed_reveal.trans: 我想知道它被卡在那里多久了。

idol_reveal.en: I wonder how long it was stuck in there.
idol_reveal.trans: 我想知道它被卡在那里多久了。

idol_med.trans: 有一些东西悬浮在里面。

seed_med.trans: 有一些东西悬浮在里面。

glass_med.trans: 有一些东西悬浮在里面。

glass_reveal.en: I wonder how long it was stuck in there.
glass_reveal.trans: 我想知道它被卡在那里多久了。

announce_otterboat_denbroken.en: Ah. I forgot that the den holds this platform together...
announce_otterboat_denbroken.trans: 啊，我忘记掉是这个窝是支撑它的关键……

announce_wetter.en: Oooh, my pocket watches are going to rust if this keeps up!
announce_wetter.trans: 哦，如果这样下去，我的怀表要生锈了！

announce_nodangergift.en: I'd like to stay focused on not dying, thank you very much!
announce_nodangergift.trans: 我想把心思花在保命上，非常感谢你！

announce_mosquitos.en: Of course there would be mosquitoes here.

announce_nodangersleep.en: Sorry, the threat of imminent death is making it a bit hard to sleep!
announce_nodangersleep.trans: 对不起，迫在眉睫的死亡威胁让我有点难以入睡！

describe_plantstressormoisture.en: Oh botheration, did I forget to water it again?
describe_plantstressormoisture.trans: 嗷，麻烦呐。我是不是又忘了给它浇水？
